papers.abstract_zh: 实现低远程内存访问延迟仍然是在数据中心内通过以太网实现内存分解的主要挑战。我们提出的 EDM 尝试使用两个关键思想来克服这一挑战。首先，虽然用于通过以太网进行远程内存访问的现有网络协议（例如 TCP/IP 和 RDMA）是在以太网 MAC 层之上实现的，但 EDM 采取了一种激进的方法，在以太网的物理层 (PHY) 内实现用于远程内存访问的整个网络协议栈。这克服了 MAC 层带来的基本延迟和带宽开销，特别是对于小内存消息。其次，EDM 为以太网交换机 PHY 内的内存流量实现了集中式、快速的网络内调度程序。受经典并行迭代匹配 (PIM) 算法的启发，调度程序通过在 PHY 中创建虚拟电路来动态预留计算节点和内存节点之间的带宽，从而消除内存流量交换机上的排队延迟和第 2 层数据包处理延迟，同时保持高带宽利用率。我们的 FPGA 测试台表明，EDM 的网络结构在空载网络中进行远程内存访问时仅产生约 300 ns 的延迟，这比 RoCEv2 等最先进的基于以太网的解决方案低一个数量级，与 CXL 等新兴的基于 PCIe 的解决方案相当。更大规模的网络模拟表明，即使在高网络负载下，EDM 的平均延迟仍保持在其空载延迟的 1.3 倍以内。

papers.title: Efficient Lossless Compression of Scientific Floating-Point Data on CPUs and GPUs.
papers.abstract: The amount of scientific data being produced, transferred, and processed increases rapidly. Whereas GPUs have made faster processing possible, storage limitations and slow data transfers remain key bottlenecks. Data compression can help, but only if it does not create a new bottleneck. This paper presents four new lossless compression algorithms for single- and double-precision data that compress well and are fast even though they are fully compatible between CPUs and GPUs. Averaged over many SDRBench inputs, our implementations outperform most of the 18 compressors from the literature we compare to in compression ratio, compression throughput, and decompression throughput. Moreover, they outperform all of them in either throughput or compression ratio on the two CPUs and two GPUs we used for evaluation. For example, on an RTX 4090 GPU, our fastest code compresses and decompresses at over 500 GB/s while delivering one of the highest compression ratios.
papers.abstract_zh: 产生、传输和处理的科学数据量迅速增加。尽管 GPU 使更快的处理成为可能，但存储限制和缓慢的数据传输仍然是关键瓶颈。数据压缩可以提供帮助，但前提是它不会造成新的瓶颈。本文提出了四种新的用于单精度和双精度数据的无损压缩算法，尽管它们在 CPU 和 GPU 之间完全兼容，但压缩效果良好且速度快。对许多 SDRBench 输入进行平均，我们的实现在压缩比、压缩吞吐量和解压缩吞吐量方面优于我们比较的文献中的 18 种压缩器中的大多数。此外，在我们用于评估的两个 CPU 和两个 GPU 上，它们在吞吐量或压缩比方面都优于所有这些。例如，在 RTX 4090 GPU 上，我们最快的代码压缩和解压缩速度超过 500 GB/s，同时提供最高的压缩比之一。

papers.title: Einsum Trees: An Abstraction for Optimizing the Execution of Tensor Expressions.
papers.abstract: Einsum is a declarative language for tensor expressions that specifies an output tensor in terms of several input tensors. However, it does not specify how to compute the output tensor from the input tensors. A typical computational backend for the einsum language comprises two parts: First, a contraction path algorithm that breaks down an einsum expression into a sequence of binary tensor contractions. Second, the execution of the binary contractions. For efficient binary contractions, the data layout of the tensors must be optimized. So far, the computation of contraction paths and the optimization of the data layout for single, that is, local, binary tensor contractions have been studied in isolation. For optimizing the overall execution times of einsum expressions, we introduce Einsum Tree IR, an intermediate representation for globally optimizing the data layout for a given contraction path. We illustrate the effectiveness of the approach on a state-of-the-art Arm server processor, an x86 server processor, and an x86 desktop system.
papers.abstract_zh: Einsum 是一种张量表达式的声明性语言，它根据多个输入张量指定输出张量。但是，它没有指定如何从输入张量计算输出张量。 einsum 语言的典型计算后端包括两部分：首先，收缩路径算法将 einsum 表达式分解为二进制张量收缩序列。其次，执行二进制收缩。为了有效的二进制收缩，必须优化张量的数据布局。到目前为止，对于单个（即局部）二元张量收缩的收缩路径的计算和数据布局的优化已经被单独研究。为了优化 einsum 表达式的整体执行时间，我们引入了 Einsum Tree IR，这是一种中间表示形式，用于全局优化给定收缩路径的数据布局。我们在最先进的 Arm 服务器处理器、x86 服务器处理器和 x86 桌面系统上展示了该方法的有效性。

papers.title: ElasticMiter: Formally Verified Dataflow Circuit Rewrites.
papers.abstract: Dataflow circuits have been studied for decades as a way to implement both asynchronous and synchronous designs, and, more recently, have attracted attention as the target of high-level synthesis (HLS) compilers. Yet, little is known about mechanisms to systematically transform and optimize the datapaths of the obtained circuits into functionally equivalent but simpler ones. The main challenge is that of equivalence verification: The latency-insensitive nature of dataflow circuits is incompatible with the standard notion of sequential equivalence, which prevents the direct usage of standard sequential equivalence verification strategies and hinders the development of formally verified dataflow circuit transformations in HLS. In this paper, we devise a generic framework for verifying the equivalence of latency-insensitive circuits. To showcase the practical usefulness of our verification framework, we develop a graph rewriting system that systematically transforms dataflow circuits into simpler ones. We employ our framework to verify our graph rewriting patterns and thus prove that the obtained circuits are equivalent to the original ones. Our work is the first to formally verify dataflow circuit transformations and is a foundation for building formally verified dataflow HLS compilers.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据流电路作为一种实现异步和同步设计的方法已经被研究了数十年，并且最近作为高级综合（HLS）编译器的目标而引起了人们的关注。然而，对于将所获得的电路的数据路径系统地转换和优化为功能等效但更简单的电路的机制知之甚少。主要挑战是等价验证：数据流电路的延迟不敏感特性与顺序等价的标准概念不兼容，这阻碍了标准顺序等价验证策略的直接使用，并阻碍了 HLS 中形式验证的数据流电路转换的发展。在本文中，我们设计了一个通用框架来验证延迟不敏感电路的等效性。为了展示我们的验证框架的实际用途，我们开发了一个图形重写系统，可以系统地将数据流电路转换为更简单的电路。我们使用我们的框架来验证我们的图重写模式，从而证明获得的电路与原始电路等效。我们的工作是第一个正式验证数据流电路转换的工作，并且是构建正式验证的数据流 HLS 编译器的基础。

papers.title: Embracing Imbalance: Dynamic Load Shifting among Microservice Containers in Shared Clusters.
papers.abstract:
In a unified resource scheduling architecture, containers within the same microservice often encounter temporal and spatial performance imbalance when deployed in large-scale shared clusters. As a result, the commonly employed load-balancing approach often leads to substantial resource wastage as applications are frequently over-provisioned to meet service level agreements (SLAs).

In this paper, we utilize an alternative approach by leveraging load imbalance. The central concept involves the dynamic load shifting across microservice containers with a focus on imbalance awareness. However, achieving seamless integration between load shifting and resource scaling, while accommodating the demands of partial connection between upstream and downstream containers, remains a challenge. To address this challenge, we introduce Imbres-a new microservice system that optimizes load shifting, connection management, and resource scaling in tandem. One significant advantage of Imbres lies in its rapid responsiveness, relying solely on online gradients of latency, eliminating the need for offline profiling. Evaluation using real microservice benchmarks reveals that Imbres reduces resource allocation by up to 62% and decreases SLA violation probability by up to 82%, compared to state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
在统一的资源调度架构中，同一微服务内的容器在大规模共享集群中部署时，经常会遇到时空性能不平衡的问题。因此，常用的负载平衡方法通常会导致大量资源浪费，因为应用程序经常会过度配置以满足服务级别协议 (SLA)。

在本文中，我们利用负载不平衡的替代方法。核心概念涉及微服务容器之间的动态负载转移，重点是不平衡意识。然而，实现负载转移和资源扩展之间的无缝集成，同时满足上下游容器之间部分连接的需求，仍然是一个挑战。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 Imbres——一种新的微服务系统，可以同时优化负载转移、连接管理和资源扩展。 Imbres 的一项显着优势在于其快速响应能力，仅依赖在线延迟梯度，无需离线分析。使用真实微服务基准进行的评估表明，与最先进的系统相比，Imbres 可减少高达 62% 的资源分配，并将 SLA 违规概率降低高达 82%。

papers.title: Enabling Efficient Mobile Tracing with BTrace.
papers.abstract:
With the growing complexity of smartphone systems, effective tracing becomes vital for enhancing their stability and optimizing the user experience. Unfortunately, existing tracing tools are inefficient in smartphone scenarios. Their distributed designs (with either per-core or per-thread buffers) prioritize performance but lead to missing crucial clues with high probability. While these problems can be overlooked in previous scenarios (e.g., servers), they drastically limit the usefulness of tracing on smartphones.

To enable efficient tracing on smartphones, we propose BTrace : a tracing tool that combines the performance benefits of per-core buffers with the capability of retaining longer continuous traces by partitioning a global buffer into multiple blocks, which are dynamically assigned to the most demanding cores. BTrace further gracefully handles unique requirements of modern smartphones, e.g., core oversubscription and resizing.

BTrace has been deployed in production, recording an average of 2x continuous traces compared to the current best-performing tracer (Linux ftrace) and improving performance by 20%. Using BTrace , we successfully identified numerous bugs that require traces of long duration and are challenging to locate with existing tracers.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着智能手机系统日益复杂，有效的跟踪对于增强其稳定性和优化用户体验变得至关重要。不幸的是，现有的追踪工具在智能手机场景中效率低下。他们的分布式设计（带有每个核心或每个线程缓冲区）优先考虑性能，但很可能会导致丢失关键线索。虽然这些问题在以前的场景（例如服务器）中可以被忽视，但它们极大地限制了智能手机上跟踪的有用性。

为了在智能手机上实现高效跟踪，我们提出了 BTrace：一种跟踪工具，它将每核缓冲区的性能优势与通过将全局缓冲区划分为多个块（动态分配给最苛刻的内核）来保留更长的连续跟踪的能力相结合。 BTrace 进一步优雅地处理现代智能手机的独特要求，例如核心超额订阅和调整大小。

BTrace 已部署在生产中，与当前性能最佳的跟踪器（Linux ftrace）相比，平均记录了 2 倍的连续跟踪，性能提高了 20%。使用 BTrace，我们成功识别了许多需要长时间跟踪且难以使用现有跟踪器进行定位的错误。

papers.title: Energy-aware Scheduling and Input Buffer Overflow Prevention for Energy-harvesting Systems.
papers.abstract: Modern energy-harvesting devices use on-device compute to discard data uninteresting to the application, improving energy availability. These devices capture data at fixed rate, and process captured data at a rate that varies with environmental factors like input power and event activity. If capture rate exceeds processing rate, new inputs are stored in a small on-device input buffer (hundreds of kBs). When the input buffer fills up, the device discards newer inputs, missing potentially interesting events. Energy-harvesting devices must avoid such input buffer overflows (IBO) to avoid missing interesting events. A static solution to IBOs is impossible given dynamic variations in processing rate, and prior research fails to provide a suitable dynamic solution. We propose Quetzal, a new hardware-software solution targeted at avoiding IBOs. Quetzal's software has two parts: a new energy-aware scheduler that selects jobs with the lowest end-to-end latency (including energy recharging), and a runtime which uses queueing-theory to predict if the selected job will cause IBOs. Quetzal reacts to imminent IBOs by degrading the scheduled job. Quetzal's scheduler and runtime use a simple, system-agnostic hardware circuit to measure power at runtime. Quetzal reduces events missed due to IBOs by up to 4.2× compared to several baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代能量收集设备使用设备上的计算来丢弃应用程序不感兴趣的数据，从而提高能源可用性。这些设备以固定速率捕获数据，并以随输入功率和事件活动等环境因素变化的速率处理捕获的数据。如果捕获速率超过处理速率，新输入将存储在设备上的小型输入缓冲区（数百 kB）中。当输入缓冲区填满时，设备会丢弃较新的输入，从而错过潜在的有趣事件。能量收集设备必须避免此类输入缓冲区溢出 (IBO)，以避免错过有趣的事件。考虑到处理速率的动态变化，IBO 的静态解决方案是不可能的，并且先前的研究未能提供合适的动态解决方案。我们提出了 Quetzal，一种旨在避免 IBO 的新硬件软件解决方案。 Quetzal 的软件由两部分组成：一个新的能源感知调度程序，它选择具有最低端到端延迟（包括能源充电）的作业；以及一个运行时，它使用排队理论来预测所选作业是否会导致 IBO。 Quetzal 通过降级预定作业来应对即将到来的 IBO。 Quetzal 的调度程序和运行时使用一个简单的、与系统无关的硬件电路来测量运行时的功率。与几个基线相比，Quetzal 将因 IBO 导致错过的事件减少了 4.2 倍。

papers.title: Enhancing CGRA Efficiency Through Aligned Compute and Communication Provisioning.
papers.abstract:
Coarse-grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) are domain-agnostic accelerators that enhance the energy efficiency of resource-constrained edge devices. The CGRA landscape is diverse, exhibiting trade-offs between performance, efficiency, and architectural specialization. However, CGRAs often overprovision communication resources relative to their modest computing capabilities. This occurs because the theoretically provisioned programmability for CGRAs often proves superfluous in practical implementations.

In this paper, we propose Plaid, a novel CGRA architecture and compiler that aligns compute and communication capabilities, thereby significantly improving energy and area efficiency while preserving its generality and performance. We demonstrate that the dataflow graph, representing the target application, can be decomposed into smaller, recurring communication patterns called motifs. The primary contribution is the identification of these structural motifs within the dataflow graphs and the development of an efficient collective execution and routing strategy tailored to these motifs. The Plaid architecture employs a novel collective processing unit that can execute multiple operations of a motif and route related data dependencies together. The Plaid compiler can hierarchically map the dataflow graph and judiciously schedule the motifs. Our design achieves a 43% reduction in power consumption and 46% area savings compared to the baseline high-performance spatio-temporal CGRA, all while preserving its generality and performance levels. In comparison to the baseline energy-efficient spatial CGRA, Plaid offers a 1.4× performance improvement and a 48% area savings, with almost the same power.
papers.abstract_zh:
粗粒度可重构阵列 (CGRA) 是与域无关的加速器，可提高资源受限的边缘设备的能源效率。 CGRA 景观是多样化的，表现出性能、效率和架构专业化之间的权衡。然而，相对于其适度的计算能力，CGRA 经常过度提供通信资源。出现这种情况是因为理论上为 CGRA 提供的可编程性在实际实现中常常被证明是多余的。

在本文中，我们提出了 Plaid，一种新颖的 CGRA 架构和编译器，可以调整计算和通信功能，从而显着提高能源和面积效率，同时保留其通用性和性能。我们证明，代表目标应用程序的数据流图可以分解为更小的、重复出现的通信模式，称为主题。主要贡献是识别数据流图中的这些结构主题，并开发针对这些主题定制的高效集体执行和路由策略。 Plaid 架构采用了一种新颖的集体处理单元，可以执行主题的多个操作并将相关的数据依赖关系一起路由。 Plaid 编译器可以分层映射数据流图并明智地安排主题。与基线高性能时空 CGRA 相比，我们的设计实现了 43% 的功耗降低和 46% 的面积节省，同时保持了其通用性和性能水平。与基准节能空间 CGRA 相比，Plaid 在几乎相同的功率下提供了 1.4 倍的性能提升和 48% 的面积节省。

papers.title: EXIST: Enabling Extremely Efficient Intra-Service Tracing Observability in Datacenters.
papers.abstract:
The complexity of online applications is rapidly increasing, bringing more sophisticated performance anomalies in today's cloud datacenter. To fully understand application behaviors, we should obtain both inter-service communication data via RPC-level tracing and intra-service execution traces via application-level tracing to precisely reason about event causality. However, the average time overhead of existing intra-service tracing schemes on the traced applications is generally about 5-10%, possibly reaching 18% in the worst case. To realize practical intra-service tracing in shared and stressed datacenters, one must achieve extreme tracing efficiency with an overhead at the per-mille level.

In this work, we present EXIST, an extremely efficient intra-service tracing system based on off-the-shelf hardware tracing capabilities. EXIST consists of three cooperative modules to pursue optimal trade-offs towards extremely low overhead. Firstly, it identifies and eliminates costly tracing control operations to guarantee the performance of the observed applications. Secondly, it allocates limited trace buffer space dynamically based on application status. Thirdly, it optimizes the trace coverage with cluster-level orchestration. We implement and evaluate EXIST on benchmark and real-world applications thoroughly. EXIST achieves 2-10× efficiency improvements compared to existing techniques and over 90% accuracy compared to exhaustive tracing reference. With extremely efficient intra-service tracing observability, we can achieve more explainable datacenter management.
papers.abstract_zh:
在线应用程序的复杂性正在迅速增加，给当今的云数据中心带来了更复杂的性能异常。为了充分理解应用程序的行为，我们应该通过RPC级跟踪获取服务间通信数据，并通过应用级跟踪获取服务内执行跟踪，以精确推理事件因果关系。然而，现有的服务内追踪方案对被追踪应用的平均时间开销一般在5-10%左右，最坏的情况下可能达到18%。为了在共享和压力大的数据中心中实现实用的服务内跟踪，必须以千分之一的开销实现极高的跟踪效率。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 EXIST，这是一种基于现成硬件跟踪功能的极其高效的服务内跟踪系统。 EXIST 由三个协作模块组成，以追求极低开销的最佳权衡。首先，它识别并消除成本高昂的跟踪控制操作，以保证所观察的应用程序的性能。其次，它根据应用程序状态动态分配有限的跟踪缓冲区空间。第三，它通过集群级编排优化了跟踪覆盖范围。我们在基准测试和实际应用程序上彻底实施和评估 EXIST。与现有技术相比，EXIST 的效率提高了 2-10 倍，与详尽的跟踪参考相比，准确率超过 90%。凭借极其高效的服务内跟踪可观察性，我们可以实现更可解释的数据中心管理。

papers.title: Exo 2: Growing a Scheduling Language.
papers.abstract: User-schedulable languages (USLs) help programmers productively optimize programs by providing safe means of transforming them. Current USLs are designed to give programmers exactly the control they want, while automating all other concerns. However, there is no universal answer for what performance-conscious programmers want to control, how they want to control it, and what they want to automate, even in relatively narrow domains. We claim that USLs should, instead, be designed to grow. We present Exo 2, a scheduling language that enables users to define new scheduling operations externally to the compiler. By composing a set of trusted, fine-grained primitives, users can safely write their own scheduling library to build up desired automation. We identify actions (ways of modifying code), inspection (ways of interrogating code), and references (ways of pointing to code) as essential for any user-extensible USL. We fuse these ideas into a new mechanism called Cursors that enables the creation of scheduling libraries in user code. We demonstrate libraries that amortize scheduling effort across more than 80 high-performance kernels, reducing total scheduling code by an order of magnitude and delivering performance competitive with state-of-the-art implementations on three different platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 用户可调度语言 (USL) 通过提供安全的转换方法来帮助程序员高效地优化程序。当前的 USL 旨在为程序员提供他们想要的控制，同时自动化所有其他问题。然而，对于注重性能的程序员想要控制什么、如何控制以及想要自动化什么，即使在相对狭窄的领域中，也没有通用的答案。我们认为，USL 的设计应该是为了增长。我们推出了 Exo 2，一种调度语言，使用户能够在编译器外部定义新的调度操作。通过编写一组可信的、细粒度的原语，用户可以安全地编写自己的调度库来构建所需的自动化。我们认为操作（修改代码的方式）、检查（询问代码的方式）和引用（指向代码的方式）对于任何用户可扩展的 USL 都是必不可少的。我们将这些想法融合到一种称为游标的新机制中，该机制可以在用户代码中创建调度库。我们演示了可以在 80 多个高性能内核中分摊调度工作的库，将总调度代码减少一个数量级，并提供与三个不同平台上最先进的实现相媲美的性能。

papers.title: Extended User Interrupts (xUI): Fast and Flexible Notification without Polling.
papers.abstract: Extended user interrupts (xUI) is a set of processor extensions that builds on Intel's UIPI model of user interrupts, for enhanced performance and flexibility. This paper deconstructs Intel's current UIPI design through analysis and measurement, and uses this to develop an accurate model of its timing. It then introduces four novel enhancements to user interrupts: tracked interrupts, hardware safepoints, a kernel bypass timer, and interrupt forwarding. xUI is modeled in gem5 simulation and evaluated on three use cases -- preemption in a high-performance user-level runtime, IO notification in a layer3 router using DPDK, and IO notification in a synthetic workload with a streaming accelerator modeled after Intel's Data Streaming Accelerator. This work shows that xUI offers the performance of shared memory polling with the efficiency of asynchronous notification.
papers.abstract_zh: 扩展用户中断 (xUI) 是一组基于英特尔用户中断 UIPI 模型构建的处理器扩展，旨在增强性能和灵活性。本文通过分析和测量解构了英特尔当前的 UIPI 设计，并据此开发了其时序的精确模型。然后介绍了对用户中断的四个新颖的​​增强功能：跟踪中断、硬件安全点、内核旁路计时器和中断转发。 xUI 在 gem5 模拟中建模，并在三个用例上进行评估：高性能用户级运行时中的抢占、使用 DPDK 的第 3 层路由器中的 IO 通知，以及使用以英特尔数据流加速器为模型的流加速器的合成工作负载中的 IO 通知。这项工作表明 xUI 提供了共享内存轮询的性能和异步通知的效率。

papers.title: Fast On-device LLM Inference with NPUs.
papers.abstract:
On-device inference for Large Language Models (LLMs), driven by increasing privacy concerns and advancements of mobile-sized models, has gained significant interest. However, even mobile-sized LLMs (e.g., Gemma-2B) encounter unacceptably high inference latency, often bottlenecked by the prefill stage in tasks like screen UI understanding.

We present llm.npu, the first LLM inference system utilizing on-device Neural Processing Unit (NPU) offloading to reduce prefill latency. llm.npu enhances NPU offloading efficiency by re-constructing the prompt and model in three levels: (1) At prompt level, it divides variable-length prompts into multiple fixed-sized chunks while maintaining data dependencies; (2) At tensor level, it identifies and extracts significant outliers to run on the CPU/GPU in parallel with minimal overhead; (3) At block level, it schedules Transformer blocks in an out-of-order manner to the CPU/GPU and NPU based on their hardware affinity and sensitivity to accuracy. Compared to competitive baselines, llm.npu achieves 22.4x faster prefill speed and 30.7x energy savings on average, and up to 32.8x speedup in an end-to-end real-world application. For the first time, llm.npu achieves more than 1,000 tokens/sec prefilling for a billion-sized model.
papers.abstract_zh:
在日益增长的隐私问题和移动规模模型的进步的推动下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 的设备端推理引起了人们的极大兴趣。然而，即使是移动大小的 LLM（例如 Gemma-2B）也会遇到不可接受的高推理延迟，通常会受到屏幕 UI 理解等任务中预填充阶段的瓶颈。

我们推出了 llm.npu，这是第一个利用设备上神经处理单元 (NPU) 卸载来减少预填充延迟的 LLM 推理系统。 llm.npu 通过在三个层面上重构提示和模型来提高 NPU 卸载效率：（1）在提示层面，它将可变长度提示划分为多个固定大小的块，同时保持数据依赖关系； (2) 在张量级别，它识别并提取显着的异常值，以最小的开销在 CPU/GPU 上并行运行； (3) 在块级别，它根据硬件亲和性和对精度的敏感度，以乱序方式将 Transformer 块调度到 CPU/GPU 和 NPU。与竞争基准相比，llm.npu 的预填充速度平均提高了 22.4 倍，节能 30.7 倍，在端到端实际应用中加速高达 32.8 倍。 llm.npu 首次实现了十亿规模模型每秒超过 1,000 个代币的预填充。

papers.title: Faster Chaitin-like Register Allocation via Grammatical Decompositions of Control-Flow Graphs.
papers.abstract:
It is well-known that control-flow graphs (CFGs) of structured programs are sparse. This sparsity has been previously formalized in terms of graph parameters such as treewidth and pathwidth and used to design faster parameterized algorithms for numerous compiler optimization, model checking and program analysis tasks.

In this work, we observe that the known graph sparsity parameters fail to exactly capture the kind of sparsity exhibited by CFGs. For example, while all structured CFGs have a treewidth of at most 7, not every graph with a treewidth of 7 or less is realizable as a CFG. As a result, current parameterized algorithms are solving the underlying graph problems over a more general family of graphs than the CFGs.

To address this problem, we design a new but natural concept of graph decomposition based on a grammar that precisely captures the set of graphs that can be realized as CFGs of programs. We show that our notion of decomposition enables the same type of dynamic programming algorithms that are often used in treewidth/pathwidth-based methods. As two concrete applications, using our grammatical decomposition of CFGs, we provide asymptotically more efficient algorithms for two variants of the classical problem of register allocation as defined by Chaitin, i.e. assigning program variables to a limited number of registers such that variables with intersecting lifetimes are not assigned to the same register. Note that Chaitin's formulation of register allocation does not allow live-range splitting. Our algorithms are asymptotically faster not only in comparison with the non-parameterized solutions for these problems, but also compared to the state-of-the-art treewidth/pathwidth-based approaches in the literature. For minimum-cost register allocation over a fixed number of registers, we provide an algorithm with a runtime of O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 5 ⋅ r ) where | G | is the size of the program, 𝕈 is the set of program variables and r is the number of registers. In contrast, the previous treewidth-based algorithm had a runtime of O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 16 ⋅ r ). For the decision problem of spill-free register allocation, our algorithm's runtime is O (| G | ⋅ r 5 ⋅ r + 5 ) whereas the previous works had a runtime of O (| G | ⋅ r 16 ⋅ r ).

Finally, we provide extensive experimental results on spill-free register allocation, showcasing the scalability of our approach in comparison to previous state-of-the-art methods. Most notably, our approach can handle real-world instances with up to 20 registers, whereas previous works could only scale to 8. This is a significant improvement since most ubiquitous architectures, such as the x86 family, have 16 registers. For such architectures, our approach is the first-ever exact algorithm that scales up to solve the real-world instances of spill-free register allocation.
papers.abstract_zh:
众所周知，结构化程序的控制流图（CFG）是稀疏的。这种稀疏性之前已以图参数（例如树宽和路径宽度）形式化，并用于为众多编译器优化、模型检查和程序分析任务设计更快的参数化算法。

在这项工作中，我们观察到已知的图稀疏性参数无法准确捕获 CFG 所表现出的稀疏性类型。例如，虽然所有结构化 CFG 的树宽最多为 7，但并非每个树宽为 7 或更小的图都可以实现为 CFG。因此，当前的参数化算法正在比 CFG 更通用的图族上解决底层图问题。

为了解决这个问题，我们基于一种语法设计了一种新的但自然的图分解概念，该语法精确地捕获了可以实现为程序 CFG 的图集。我们证明，我们的分解概念可以实现与基于树宽/路径宽度的方法中经常使用的相同类型的动态规划算法。作为两个具体应用，使用 CFG 的语法分解，我们为 Chaitin 定义的寄存器分配经典问题的两种变体提供了渐近更有效的算法，即将程序变量分配给有限数量的寄存器，使得具有相交生命周期的变量不会分配给同一寄存器。请注意，Chaitin 的寄存器分配公式不允许生存范围分割。我们的算法不仅与这些问题的非参数化解决方案相比渐近更快，而且与文献中最先进的基于树宽/路径宽度的方法相比也更快。对于固定数量寄存器上的最小成本寄存器分配，我们提供了一种运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 5 ⋅ r ) 的算法，其中 | G |是程序的大小，𝕈是程序变量的集合，r是寄存器的数量。相比之下，之前基于树宽的算法的运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 16 ⋅ r )。对于无溢出寄存器分配的决策问题，我们的算法的运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ r 5 ⋅ r + 5 )，而之前的算法的运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ r 16 ⋅ r )。

最后，我们提供了关于无溢出寄存器分配的广泛实验结果，展示了我们的方法与以前最先进的方法相比的可扩展性。最值得注意的是，我们的方法可以处理具有多达 20 个寄存器的实际实例，而以前的工作只能扩展到 8 个。这是一个重大改进，因为大多数普遍存在的架构（例如 x86 系列）都有 16 个寄存器。对于此类架构，我们的方法是第一个精确的算法，可以扩展以解决无溢出寄存器分配的现实世界实例。

papers.title: Fat-Tree QRAM: A High-Bandwidth Shared Quantum Random Access Memory for Parallel Queries.
papers.abstract: Quantum Random Access Memory (QRAM) is a crucial architectural component for querying classical or quantum data in superposition, enabling algorithms with wide-ranging applications in quantum arithmetic, quantum chemistry, machine learning, and quantum cryptography. In this work, we introduce Fat-Tree QRAM, a novel query architecture capable of pipelining multiple quantum queries simultaneously while maintaining desirable scalings in query speed and fidelity. Specifically, Fat-Tree QRAM performs O (log( N )) independent queries in O (log( N )) time using O ( N ) qubits, offering immense parallelism benefits over traditional QRAM architectures. To demonstrate its experimental feasibility, we propose modular and on-chip implementations of Fat-Tree QRAM based on superconducting circuits and analyze their performance and fidelity under realistic parameters. Furthermore, a query scheduling protocol is presented to maximize hardware utilization and access the underlying data at an optimal rate. These results suggest that Fat-Tree QRAM is an attractive architecture in a shared memory system for practical quantum computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子随机存取存储器 (QRAM) 是查询叠加中的经典或量子数据的关键架构组件，使算法能够在量子算术、量子化学、机器学习和量子密码学中得到广泛应用。在这项工作中，我们引入了 Fat-Tree QRAM，这是一种新颖的查询架构，能够同时管道化多个量子查询，同时保持查询速度和保真度方面的理想扩展。具体来说，Fat-Tree QRAM 使用 O ( N ) 量子位在 O (log( N )) 时间内执行 O (log( N )) 独立查询，与传统 QRAM 架构相比提供了巨大的并行优势。为了证明其实验可行性，我们提出了基于超导电路的 Fat-Tree QRAM 的模块化和片上实现，并分析了其在实际参数下的性能和保真度。此外，提出了一种查询调度协议，以最大限度地提高硬件利用率并以最佳速率访问底层数据。这些结果表明，Fat-Tree QRAM 是实用量子计算共享内存系统中一种有吸引力的架构。

papers.title: Fault Escaping: Improving Robustness of DPU Enhanced Platform with Mutual Assisted VM Recovery.
papers.abstract:
Modern cloud servers achieve significant performance improvements by exploiting data processing units (DPUs) to offload virtualization overhead. Unlike traditional monolithic hypervisors, this offloading approach splits VM state and distributes hypervisor functions across the DPU and the Host, transforming the cloud server from a single system into a sophisticated orchestration of multiple self-managed processing units. However, the failure rate of these systems has significantly increased, as errors from either the DPU or the Host can crash the entire machine. All these changes necessitate a comprehensive revamp of current VM fault tolerance and isolation mechanisms.

This paper explores a novel approach to VM fault tolerance by treating the split hypervisors on the DPU SoC and the Host as redundant peers. We propose a fault-escaping scheme that enables VMs to escape from a failing SoC or Host. With hybrid synchronization, the entire VM state becomes fully accessible on either the SoC or the Host with minimum synchronization overhead (in kilobytes). Instead of recovering the failed hypervisor, this scheme migrates the verified VM state, allowing the VM to escape from the failure and resume on a new machine. The evaluation demonstrates that the escape-based mechanism introduces no runtime performance overhead, achieves performance levels comparable to VM live migration, and reduces the VM recovery time objective (RTO) by 4x to 14x in one of the largest cloud production environments.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代云服务器通过利用数据处理单元 (DPU) 卸载虚拟化开销，实现了显着的性能改进。与传统的整体虚拟机管理程序不同，这种卸载方法可分割虚拟机状态并在 DPU 和主机之间分配虚拟机管理程序功能，从而将云服务器从单一系统转变为多个自管理处理单元的复杂编排。然而，这些系统的故障率显着增加，因为 DPU 或主机的错误可能导致整个机器崩溃。所有这些变化都需要对当前虚拟机容错和隔离机制进行全面改造。

本文通过将 DPU SoC 和主机上的拆分虚拟机管理程序视为冗余对等点，探索了一种新的 VM 容错方法。我们提出了一种故障逃逸方案，使虚拟机能够逃离发生故障的 SoC 或主机。通过混合同步，整个 VM 状态可以在 SoC 或主机上完全访问，同步开销最小（以千字节为单位）。该方案不是恢复发生故障的虚拟机管理程序，而是迁移经过验证的虚拟机状态，从而允许虚拟机摆脱故障并在新机器上恢复。评估表明，基于转义的机制不会引入运行时性能开销，实现了与虚拟机实时迁移相当的性能水平，并将虚拟机恢复时间目标 (RTO) 在最大的云生产环境之一中降低了 4 倍到 14 倍。

papers.title: FleetIO: Managing Multi-Tenant Cloud Storage with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract:
Cloud platforms have been virtualizing storage devices like flash-based solid-state drives (SSDs) to make effective use of storage resources. They enable either software-isolated instance or hardware-isolated instance for facilitating the storage sharing between multi-tenant applications. However, for decades, they have to combat the fundamental tussle between the performance isolation and resource utilization. They suffer from either long tail latency caused by weak isolation or low storage utilization caused by strong isolation.

In this paper, we present FleetIO, a learning-based storage virtualization framework that employs reinforcement learning (RL) for managing virtualized SSDs. FleetIO explores the unique features of RL to handle the dynamic changes of application workloads and storage states, and integrates the storage scheduling into the RL decision-making process. It achieves both performance isolation and improved storage utilization by enabling dynamic fine-grained storage harvesting across collocated application instances, while minimizing its negative impact on their service-level objectives (SLOs). FleetIO clusters workloads into different types (e.g., latency-sensitive and bandwidth-intensive) based on the collected I/O traces at runtime, and fine-tunes the RL reward functions for each type of workloads. We implement FleetIO on a real programmable SSD board and evaluate it with diverse cloud applications. We show that FleetIO improves the overall storage utilization of the shared SSD by up to 1.4×, and decreases the tail latency of I/O requests by 1.5× on average, compared to the state-of-the-art storage sharing approaches.
papers.abstract_zh:
云平台一直在虚拟化基于闪存的固态硬盘（SSD）等存储设备，以有效利用存储资源。它们支持软件隔离实例或硬件隔离实例，以促进多租户应用程序之间的存储共享。然而，几十年来，他们必须应对性能隔离和资源利用之间的根本斗争。它们要么遭受弱隔离导致的长尾延迟，要么遭受强隔离导致的低存储利用率。

在本文中，我们提出了 FleetIO，这是一种基于学习的存储虚拟化框架，它采用强化学习 (RL) 来管理虚拟化 SSD。 FleetIO 探索了 RL 的独特功能来处理应用程序工作负载和存储状态的动态变化，并将存储调度集成到 RL 决策过程中。它通过在并置应用程序实例之间启用动态细粒度存储收集来实现性能隔离和提高存储利用率，同时最大限度地减少其对服务级别目标 (SLO) 的负面影响。 FleetIO 根据运行时收集的 I/O 跟踪将工作负载分为不同类型（例如，延迟敏感型和带宽密集型），并针对每种类型的工作负载微调 RL 奖励函数。我们在真正的可编程 SSD 板上实现 FleetIO，并使用各种云应用程序对其进行评估。我们发现，与最先进的存储共享方法相比，FleetIO 将共享 SSD 的整体存储利用率提高了 1.4 倍，并将 I/O 请求的尾部延迟平均降低了 1.5 倍。

papers.title: FLEXPROF: Flexible, Side-Channel-Free Memory Access.
papers.abstract: Secure processors must defend against a wide array of microarchitecture side-channels, including those induced by a shared memory controller. Multiple studies have proposed techniques that allocate ''turns'' (within the memory controller) to each co-scheduled virtual machine (VM), and introduce gaps between VM turns to prevent resource conflicts and side-channels. In spite of past advancements in secure memory scheduling, the elimination of side-channels imposes a performance slowdown of 2x. We observe that one of the causes of this slowdown is that the memory controller schedule accommodates the worst case, i.e., it is prepared to handle either reads or writes. The key insight in this work is that the schedule can be more efficient if we designate every turn to handle fixed patterns of reads and writes.In particular, we introduce a read-optimized turn and a write-optimized turn. Coarse-grain application profiling helps determine how often the two types of turns are invoked, without leaking sensitive information. We also add flexibility so that a read-optimized turn can opportunistically also issue writes, and vice versa. This provides a good balance between restrictions and flexibility; between throughput and utilization. The proposed FlexProf memory controller improves performance by up to 33% with a geometric mean gain of 8% on mixed workloads, relative to state-of-the-art methods. Over half the memory-intensive programs evaluated exhibit performance gains of over 10%.
papers.abstract_zh: 安全处理器必须防御各种微架构侧通道，包括由共享内存控制器引起的侧通道。多项研究提出了将“轮次”（在内存控制器内）分配给每个共同调度的虚拟机 (VM) 的技术，并在 VM 轮次之间引入间隙以防止资源冲突和旁道。尽管过去在安全内存调度方面取得了进步，但侧通道的消除导致性能下降了 2 倍。我们观察到，造成这种速度减慢的原因之一是内存控制器调度适应最坏的情况，即它准备处理读取或写入。这项工作的关键见解是，如果我们指定每个轮次来处理固定的读写模式，那么调度会更加高效。特别是，我们引入了读优化轮次和写优化轮次。粗粒度应用程序分析有助于确定调用这两种类型的轮次的频率，而不会泄漏敏感信息。我们还增加了灵活性，以便读取优化的转向也可以机会性地发出写入，反之亦然。这在限制和灵活性之间提供了良好的平衡；吞吐量和利用率之间。相对于最先进的方法，所提出的 FlexProf 内存控制器可将混合工作负载的性能提高高达 33%，几何平均增益为 8%。超过一半的内存密集型程序所评估的性能提升超过 10%。

papers.title: FlexSP: Accelerating Large Language Model Training via Flexible Sequence Parallelism.
papers.abstract:
Extending the context length (i.e., the maximum supported sequence length) of LLMs is of paramount significance. To facilitate long context training of LLMs, sequence parallelism has emerged as an essential technique, which scatters each input sequence across multiple devices and necessitates communication to process the sequence. In essence, existing sequence parallelism methods assume homogeneous sequence lengths (i.e., all input sequences are equal in length) and therefore leverages a single, static scattering strategy for all input sequences. However, in reality, the sequence lengths in LLM training corpora exhibit substantial variability, often following a long-tail distribution, which leads to workload heterogeneity.

In this paper, we show that employing a single, static strategy results in inefficiency and resource under-utilization, highlighting the need for adaptive approaches to handle the heterogeneous workloads across sequences. To address this, we propose a heterogeneity-adaptive sequence parallelism method. For each training step, our approach captures the variability in sequence lengths and assigns the optimal combination of scattering strategies based on workload characteristics. We model this problem as a linear programming optimization and design an efficient and effective solver to find the optimal solution. Furthermore, we implement our method in a high-performance system that supports adaptive parallelization in distributed LLM training. Experimental results demonstrate that our system outperforms state-of-the-art training frameworks by up to 1.98x. Source code is available at https://github.com/PKU-DAIR/Hetu-Galvatron.
papers.abstract_zh:
扩展LLM的上下文长度（即最大支持的序列长度）具有至关重要的意义。为了促进法学硕士的长上下文训练，序列并行性已成为一项基本技术，它将每个输入序列分散在多个设备上，并且需要通信来处理序列。本质上，现有的序列并行方法假设序列长度相同（即所有输入序列长度相等），因此对所有输入序列利用单一的静态分散策略。然而，实际上，LLM 训练语料库中的序列长度表现出很大的可变性，通常遵循长尾分布，这导致工作量异质性。

在本文中，我们表明，采用单一的静态策略会导致效率低下和资源利用不足，强调需要采用自适应方法来处理跨序列的异构工作负载。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种异质性自适应序列并行方法。对于每个训练步骤，我们的方法捕获序列长度的变化，并根据工作负载特征分配分散策略的最佳组合。我们将此问题建模为线性规划优化，并设计一个高效且有效的求解器来找到最佳解决方案。此外，我们在支持分布式 LLM 训练中自适应并行化的高性能系统中实现了我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的系统的性能比最先进的训练框架高出 1.98 倍。源代码可在 https://github.com/PKU-DAIR/Hetu-Galvatron 获取。

papers.title: Forecasting GPU Performance for Deep Learning Training and Inference.
papers.abstract: Deep learning kernels exhibit a high level of predictable memory accesses and compute patterns, making GPU's architecture well-suited for their execution. Moreover, software and runtime system for GPUs further enable optimizations that aim to better utilize the stream multiprocessors, on-chip bandwidth, multiple levels of cache hierarchy, and off-chip high-bandwidth memory. In the context of deep learning, the entire space of models and GPUs is constantly evolving, as newer models emerge with simultaneous upgrades to the device. However, access to newer GPUs is often limited, raising important questions about the performance of new model architectures on existing GPUs, existing models on new GPUs, and new model architectures on new GPUs. To address these questions, we introduce NeuSight, a forecasting framework to predict the performance of a diverse range of deep learning models, for both training and inference, on unseen GPUs, without requiring actual execution of the target model on the target GPU. The framework leverages both GPU hardware behavior and software library optimizations to estimate the end-to-end performance of these models. We observe that prior work in this area suffers from high absolute error percentages when forecasting performance on unseen models and new GPUs, as they attempt to model the complex task of predicting the latency of a deep learning kernel on a GPU directly using a machine learning approach. Instead, with NeuSight , we decompose the prediction into smaller problems, while bounding the prediction through fundamental performance laws. NeuSight decomposes a single deep learning kernel prediction into smaller working sets called tiles, which are executed independently on the GPU. Tile-granularity predictions are determined using a machine learning approach and aggregated to estimate the end-to-end latency. As such, NeuSight outperforms prior work across a variety of deep learning workloads and the most up-to-date GPUs. It reduces the percentage error from 121.4% and 30.8% to 2.3% in predicting the latency of GPT3 model for training and inference on H100, in comparison to state-of-the-art prior work, respectively, where GPT3 and H100 were not used to train any framework.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习内核表现出高水平的可预测内存访问和计算模式，使得 GPU 架构非常适合其执行。此外，GPU 的软件和运行时系统进一步实现了优化，旨在更好地利用流多处理器、片上带宽、多级缓存层次结构和片外高带宽内存。在深度学习的背景下，模型和 GPU 的整个空间都在不断发展，随着新模型的出现和设备的同步升级。然而，对较新 GPU 的访问通常受到限制，从而引发了有关现有 GPU 上的新模型架构、新 GPU 上的现有模型以及新 GPU 上的新模型架构的性能的重要问题。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 NeuSight，这是一个预测框架，用于预测各种深度学习模型在不可见的 GPU 上的训练和推理性能，而无需在目标 GPU 上实际执行目标模型。该框架利用 GPU 硬件行为和软件库优化来估计这些模型的端到端性能。我们观察到，该领域的先前工作在预测未见过的模型和新 GPU 上的性能时存在较高的绝对错误百分比，因为他们试图直接使用机器学习方法对预测 GPU 上深度学习内核的延迟的复杂任务进行建模。相反，通过 NeuSight，我们将预测分解为更小的问题，同时通过基本性能定律限制预测。 NeuSight 将单个深度学习内核预测分解为称为图块的较小工作集，这些工作集在 GPU 上独立执行。分块粒度预测是使用机器学习方法确定的，并进行聚合以估计端到端延迟。因此，NeuSight 在各种深度学习工作负载和最新的 GPU 上都优于之前的工作。与之前最先进的工作（未使用 GPT3 和 H100 来训练任何框架）相比，它在预测 GPT3 模型在 H100 上训练和推理的延迟时，百分比误差分别从 121.4% 和 30.8% 降低到 2.3%。

papers.title: Formalising CXL Cache Coherence.
papers.abstract: We report our experience formally modelling and verifying CXL.cache, the inter-device cache coherence protocol of the Compute Express Link standard. We have used the Isabelle proof assistant to create a formal model for CXL.cache based on the English prose specification. This led to us identifying and proposing fixes to several parts of the specification that were unclear, ambiguous or inaccurate. Nearly all our issues and proposed fixes have been confirmed and tentatively accepted by the CXL consortium for adoption, save for one which is still under discussion. To validate the faithfulness of our model we performed scenario verification of essential restrictions such as ''Snoop-pushes-GO'', and used the Isabelle proof assistant to produce a fully mechanised proof of a coherence property of the model. The considerable size of this proof, comprising tens of thousands of lemmas, prompted us to develop new proof automation tools, which we have made available for other Isabelle users working with similarly cumbersome proofs.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们报告了我们对 CXL.cache 进行正式建模和验证的经验，CXL.cache 是 Compute Express Link 标准的设备间缓存一致性协议。我们使用 Isabelle 证明助手根据英语散文规范创建了 CXL.cache 的形式模型。这导致我们发现并提出了对规范中不明确、不明确或不准确的几个部分的修复建议。除了仍在讨论中的问题外，几乎我们所有的问题和提议的修复方案均已得到 CXL 联盟的确认并暂时接受采用。为了验证模型的真实性，我们对“Snoop-pushes-GO”等基本限制进行了场景验证，并使用 Isabelle 证明助手生成模型一致性属性的完全机械化证明。这个证明的规模相当大，包括数万个引理，促使我们开发新的证明自动化工具，我们已将这些工具提供给其他使用类似繁琐证明的 Isabelle 用户。

papers.title: Frugal: Efficient and Economic Embedding Model Training with Commodity GPUs.
papers.abstract:
Embedding models show superiority in learning representations of massive ID-type features in sparse learning scenarios such as recommendation systems (e.g., user/item IDs) and graph learning (e.g., node/edge IDs). Commodity GPUs are highly favored for their cost-efficient computing power, which is ideally suited for the low computing demand of memory-intensive embedding models. However, directly running embedding model training on commodity GPUs yields poor performance because of their deficient communication resources (including low communication bandwidth and no PCIe P2P support).

This paper presents Frugal , an embedding model training system tailored for commodity GPUs. Based on the observation that the communication between commodity GPUs must be bounced on host memory (due to no PCIe P2P support), the key idea of Frugal is proactively flushing, where each GPU proactively flushes its own parameters that other GPUs will access into host memory, thereby decoupling half of the communication overhead to non-critical paths. To alleviate the communication contention of proactively flushing on foreground training processes, Frugal assigns priorities to each flush operation, and prioritizes flushing parameters that GPUs will access while deferring others. Further, Frugal tailors a two-level priority queue to ensure high scalability for operations involving priorities. Frugal has been applied to train embedding models including recommendation models and graph embedding. Experiments indicate that Frugal can significantly increase training throughput on commodity GPUs, and achieve similar throughput compared to existing systems on datacenter GPUs with 4.0-4.3× improvement in cost-effectiveness.
papers.abstract_zh:
嵌入模型在推荐系统（例如，用户/项目 ID）和图学习（例如，节点/边缘 ID）等稀疏学习场景中学习大量 ID 类型特征的表示方面表现出优越性。商用 GPU 因其经济高效的计算能力而备受青睐，非常适合内存密集型嵌入模型的低计算需求。然而，由于通信资源不足（包括通信带宽低且不支持 PCIe P2P），直接在商用 GPU 上运行嵌入模型训练的性能较差。

本文介绍了 Frugal，这是一种专为商用 GPU 量身定制的嵌入模型训练系统。根据观察，商用 GPU 之间的通信必须在主机内存上反弹（由于没有 PCIe P2P 支持），Frugal 的关键思想是主动刷新，其中每个 GPU 主动将其他 GPU 将访问的自己的参数刷新到主机内存中，从而将一半的通信开销解耦到非关键路径。为了缓解前台训练过程中主动刷新的通信争用，Frugal 为每个刷新操作分配优先级，并优先考虑 GPU 将访问的刷新参数，同时推迟其他操作。此外，Frugal还定制了两级优先级队列，以确保涉及优先级的操作具有较高的可扩展性。 Frugal 已应用于训练嵌入模型，包括推荐模型和图嵌入。实验表明，Frugal 可以显着提高商用 GPU 上的训练吞吐量，与数据中心 GPU 上的现有系统相比，可实现类似的吞吐量，成本效益提高 4.0-4.3 倍。

papers.title: FSMoE: A Flexible and Scalable Training System for Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Models.
papers.abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have tended to leverage sparsity to reduce computations, employing the sparsely activated mixture-of-experts (MoE) technique. MoE introduces four modules, including token routing, token communication, expert computation, and expert parallelism, that impact model quality and training efficiency. To enable ver- satile usage of MoE models, we introduce FSMoE, a flexible training system optimizing task scheduling with three novel techniques: 1) Unified abstraction and online profiling of MoE modules for task scheduling across various MoE implementations. 2) Co-scheduling intra-node and inter-node communications with computations to minimize communication overheads. 3) To support near-optimal task scheduling, we design an adaptive gradient partitioning method for gradient aggregation and a schedule to adaptively pipeline communications and computations. We conduct extensive experiments with configured MoE layers and real-world MoE models on two GPU clusters. Experimental results show that 1) our FSMoE supports four popular types of MoE routing functions and is more efficient than existing implementations (with up to a 1.42× speedup), and 2) FSMoE outperforms the state-of-the-art MoE training systems (DeepSpeed-MoE and Tutel) by 1.18×-1.22× on 1458 MoE layers and 1.19×-3.01× on real-world MoE models based on GPT-2 and Mixtral using a popular routing function. In this work, we present a flexible training system named FSMoE to optimize task scheduling. To achieve this goal: 1) we design unified abstraction and online profiling of MoE modules across various MoE implementations, 2) we co-schedule intra-node and inter-node communications with computations to minimize communication overhead, and 3) we design an adaptive gradient partitioning method for gradient aggregation and a schedule to adaptively pipeline communications and computations. Experimental results on two clusters up to 48 GPUs show that our FSMoE outperforms the state-of-the-art MoE training systems (DeepSpeed-MoE and Tutel) with speedups of 1.18x-1.22x on 1458 customized MoE layers and 1.19x-3.01x on real-world MoE models based on GPT-2 and Mixtral.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的大型语言模型（LLM）倾向于利用稀疏性来减少计算，采用稀疏激活专家混合（MoE）技术。 MoE 引入了四个模块，包括令牌路由、令牌通信、专家计算和专家并行性，这些模块影响模型质量和训练效率。为了实现 MoE 模型的多功能使用，我们引入了 FSMoE，这是一种灵活的训练系统，通过三种新技术优化任务调度：1）MoE 模块的统一抽象和在线分析，用于跨各种 MoE 实现的任务调度。 2）通过计算共同调度节点内和节点间通信，以最小化通信开销。 3）为了支持近乎最优的任务调度，我们设计了一种用于梯度聚合的自适应梯度划分方法以及自适应管道通信和计算的调度。我们在两个 GPU 集群上使用配置的 MoE 层和真实世界的 MoE 模型进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明：1）我们的 FSMoE 支持四种流行类型的 MoE 路由功能，并且比现有实现更高效（加速高达 1.42×），2）FSMoE 在 1458 个 MoE 层上的性能优于最先进的 MoE 训练系统（DeepSpeed-MoE 和 Tutel）1.18×-1.22×，在基于 GPT-2 和 Mixtral 的现实世界 MoE 模型，使用流行的路由功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 FSMoE 的灵活训练系统来优化任务调度。为了实现这一目标：1）我们设计了跨各种 MoE 实现的 MoE 模块的统一抽象和在线分析，2）我们共同调度节点内和节点间通信与计算，以最大限度地减少通信开销，3）我们设计了一种用于梯度聚合的自适应梯度划分方法以及自适应管道通信和计算的调度。两个集群（最多 48 个 GPU）上的实验结果表明，我们的 FSMoE 优于最先进的 MoE 训练系统（DeepSpeed-MoE 和 Tutel），在 1458 个定制 MoE 层上的加速率为 1.18x-1.22x，在基于 GPT-2 和 Mixtral 的真实 MoE 模型上的加速率为 1.19x-3.01x。

papers.title: Fusion: An Analytics Object Store Optimized for Query Pushdown.
papers.abstract:
The prevalence of disaggregated storage in public clouds has led to increased latency in modern OLAP cloud databases, particularly when handling ad-hoc and highly-selective queries on large objects. To address this, cloud databases have adopted computation pushdown, executing query predicates closer to the storage layer. However, existing pushdown solutions are inefficient in erasure-coded storage. Cloud storage employs erasure coding that partitions analytics file objects into fixed-sized blocks and distributes them across storage nodes. Consequently, when a specific part of the object is queried, the storage system must reassemble the object across nodes, incurring significant network latency.

In this work, we present Fusion, an object store for analytics that is optimized for query pushdown on erasure-coded data. It co-designs its erasure coding and file placement topologies, taking into account popular analytics file formats (e.g., Parquet). Fusion employs a novel stripe construction algorithm that prevents fragmentation of computable units within an object, and minimizes storage overhead during erasure coding. Compared to existing erasure-coded stores, Fusion improves median and tail latency by 64% and 81%, respectively, on TPC-H, and up to 40% and 48% respectively, on real-world SQL queries. Fusion achieves this while incurring a modest 1.2% storage overhead compared to the optimal.
papers.abstract_zh:
公共云中分类存储的盛行导致现代 OLAP 云数据库的延迟增加，特别是在处理大型对象的临时和高选择性查询时。为了解决这个问题，云数据库采用了计算下推，在更接近存储层的位置执行查询谓词。然而，现有的下推解决方案在纠删码存储方面效率低下。云存储采用纠删码，将分析文件对象划分为固定大小的块，并将它们分布在存储节点上。因此，当查询对象的特定部分时，存储系统必须跨节点重新组装对象，从而导致显着的网络延迟。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 Fusion，一种用于分析的对象存储，针对纠删码数据的查询下推进行了优化。它共同设计了纠删码和文件放置拓扑，同时考虑到流行的分析文件格式（例如 Parquet）。 Fusion 采用了一种新颖的条带构造算法，可以防止对象内可计算单元的碎片，并最大限度地减少擦除编码期间的存储开销。与现有的纠删码存储相比，Fusion 在 TPC-H 上将中值延迟和尾部延迟分别提高了 64% 和 81%，在实际 SQL 查询上分别提高了 40% 和 48%。 Fusion 实现了这一目标，同时与最佳存储开销相比，存储开销仅为 1.2%。

papers.title: Generalizing Reuse Patterns for Efficient DNN on Microcontrollers.
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) face challenges in deployment on resource-constrained devices due to their high computational demands. Leveraging redundancy in input data and activation maps for computation reuse is an effective way to accelerate DNN inference, especially for microcontrollers where the computing power is very limited. This work points out an important limitation in current reuse-based DNN optimizations, the narrow definition of reuse patterns in data. It proposes the concept of generalized reuse and uncovers the relations between generalized reuse patterns and row/column reorder of a matrix view of the input or activation map of a DNN. It revolutionizes the conventional view of explorable reuse patterns, drastically expanding the reuse space. It further develops two novel analytical models for analyzing the impacts of reuse patterns on the accuracy and latency of DNNs, enabling efficient selection of appropriate reuse patterns. Experiments show that generalized reuse consistently brings significant benefits, regardless of the differences among DNNs or microcontroller hardware. It delivers 1.03-2.2x speedups or 1-8% accuracy improvement over conventional reuse.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于计算需求高，深度神经网络 (DNN) 在资源受限设备上的部署面临着挑战。利用输入数据和激活映射中的冗余进行计算重用是加速 DNN 推理的有效方法，特别是对于计算能力非常有限的微控制器而言。这项工作指出了当前基于重用的 DNN 优化的一个重要限制，即数据中重用模式的狭隘定义。它提出了广义重用的概念，并揭示了广义重用模式与 DNN 输入或激活图的矩阵视图的行/列重新排序之间的关系。它彻底改变了可探索重用模式的传统观点，极大地扩展了重用空间。它还开发了两种新颖的分析模型，用于分析重用模式对 DNN 准确性和延迟的影响，从而能够有效选择适当的重用模式。实验表明，无论 DNN 或微控制器硬件之间存在差异，广义重用始终会带来显着的好处。与传统的重用相比，它的速度提高了 1.03-2.2 倍，准确性提高了 1-8%。

papers.title: Gigaflow: Pipeline-Aware Sub-Traversal Caching for Modern SmartNICs.
papers.abstract:
The success of modern public/edge clouds hinges heavily on the performance of their end-host network stacks if they are to support the emerging and diverse tenants' workloads (e.g., distributed training in the cloud to fast inference at the edge). Virtual Switches (vSwitches) are vital components of this stack, providing a unified interface to enforce high-level policies on incoming packets and route them to physical interfaces, containers, or virtual machines. As performance demands escalate, there has been a shift toward offloading vSwitch processing to SmartNICs to alleviate CPU load and improve efficiency. However, existing solutions struggle to handle the growing flow rule space within the NIC, leading to high miss rates and poor scalability.

In this paper, we introduce G igaflow , a novel caching system tailored for deployment on SmartNICs to accelerate vSwitch packet processing. Our core insight is that by harnessing the inherent pipeline-aware locality within programmable vSwitch pipelines-defining policies (e.g., L2, L3, and ACL) and their execution order (e.g., using P4 and OpenFlow)-we can create cache rules for shared segments (sub-traversals) within the pipeline, rather than caching entire flows. These shared segments can be reused across multiple flows, resulting in higher cache efficiency and greater rule-space coverage. Our evaluations show that G igaflow achieves up to a 51% improvement in cache hit rate (average 25% improvement) over traditional caching solutions (i.e., Megaflow), while capturing up to 450x more rule space within the limited memory of today's SmartNICs-all while operating at line speed.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代公共/边缘云的成功在很大程度上取决于其终端主机网络堆栈的性能，如果它们要支持新兴和多样化的租户工作负载（例如，云中的分布式训练到边缘的快速推理）。虚拟交换机 (vSwitch) 是该堆栈的重要组件，提供统一的接口来对传入数据包实施高级策略并将其路由到物理接口、容器或虚拟机。随着性能需求的不断升级，人们开始转向将 vSwitch 处理卸载到 SmartNIC，以减轻 CPU 负载并提高效率。然而，现有的解决方案难以处理 NIC 内不断增长的流规则空间，导致高丢失率和较差的可扩展性。

在本文中，我们介绍了 G igaflow，这是一种专为部署在 SmartNIC 上而定制的新型缓存系统，以加速 vSwitch 数据包处理。我们的核心见解是，通过利用可编程 vSwitch 管道中固有的管道感知局部性——定义策略（例如，L2、L3 和 ACL）及其执行顺序（例如，使用 P4 和 OpenFlow）——我们可以为管道内的共享段（子遍历）创建缓存规则，而不是缓存整个流。这些共享段可以在多个流中重用，从而提高缓存效率和更大的规则空间覆盖范围。我们的评估表明，与传统缓存解决方案（即 Megaflow）相比，G igaflow 的缓存命中率提高了 51%（平均提高了 25%），同时在当今 SmartNIC 的有限内存内捕获了多达 450 倍的规则空间，而且所有这些都以线速运行。

papers.title: GraphPipe: Improving Performance and Scalability of DNN Training with Graph Pipeline Parallelism.
papers.abstract:
Deep neural networks (DNNs) continue to grow rapidly in size, making them infeasible to train on a single device (e.g. GPU). Pipeline parallelism is commonly used in existing DNN systems to support large-scale DNN training by partitioning a DNN into multiple stages, which concurrently perform DNN computation for different micro-batches of training samples in a pipeline fashion. However, existing pipeline-parallel approaches only consider sequential pipeline stages and thus ignore the topology of a DNN, resulting in missed model-parallel opportunities.

This paper presents graph pipeline parallelism (GPP), a new pipeline-parallel scheme that partitions a DNN into pipeline stages whose dependencies are identified by a directed acyclic graph. GPP generalizes existing sequential pipeline parallelism and preserves the inherent topology of a DNN to enable concurrent execution of computationally-independent operators, resulting in reduced memory requirement and improved GPU performance. In addition, we develop GraphPipe , a distributed system that exploits GPP strategies to enable performant and scalable DNN training. GraphPipe partitions a DNN into a graph of stages, optimizes micro-batch schedules for these stages, and parallelizes DNN training using the discovered GPP strategies. Evaluation on a variety of DNNs shows that GraphPipe outperforms existing pipeline-parallel systems such as PipeDream and Piper by up to 1.6×. GraphPipe also reduces the search time by 9-21× compared to PipeDream and Piper.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN) 的规模持续快速增长，使得它们无法在单个设备（例如 GPU）上进行训练。现有的 DNN 系统通常使用管道并行性，通过将 DNN 划分为多个阶段来支持大规模 DNN 训练，这些阶段以管道方式同时对不同微批次的训练样本执行 DNN 计算。然而，现有的管道并行方法仅考虑顺序管道阶段，因此忽略了 DNN 的拓扑，导致错过了模型并行的机会。

本文提出了图管道并行（GPP），这是一种新的管道并行方案，它将 DNN 划分为管道阶段，其依赖关系由有向无环图识别。 GPP 概括了现有的顺序管道并行性，并保留了 DNN 的固有拓扑，以实现计算独立运算符的并发执行，从而减少内存需求并提高 GPU 性能。此外，我们还开发了 GraphPipe，这是一个分布式系统，利用 GPP 策略来实现高性能和可扩展的 DNN 训练。 GraphPipe 将 DNN 划分为阶段图，优化这些阶段的微批量调度，并使用发现的 GPP 策略并行化 DNN 训练。对各种 DNN 的评估表明，GraphPipe 的性能比 PipeDream 和 Piper 等现有管道并行系统高出 1.6 倍。与 PipeDream 和 Piper 相比，GraphPipe 还减少了 9-21 倍的搜索时间。

papers.title: H-Houdini: Scalable Invariant Learning.
papers.abstract:
Formal verification is a critical task in hardware design today. Yet, while there has been significant progress in improving technique automation and efficiency, scaling to large hardware designs remains a significant challenge.

We address this challenge by proposing H-H OUDINI : a new algorithm for (mostly) push-button inductive invariant learning that scales to large hardware designs. H-H OUDINI combines the strengths of Machine Learning Inspired Synthesis (MLIS) and SAT-based Incremental Learning. The key advance is a method that replaces the monolithic SMT-style checks made by MLIS with a carefully-constructed hierarchy of smaller, incremental SMT checks that can be parallelized, memoized and reassembled into the original 'monolithic' invariant in a correct-by-construction fashion.

We instantiate H-H OUDINI as V eloCT , a framework that proves hardware security properties by learning relational invariants. We benchmark V eloCT on the 'safe instruction set synthesis' problem in microarchitectural security. Here, V eloCT automatically (with no expert annotations) learns an invariant for the RISC-V Rocketchip in under 10s (2880x faster than state of the art). Further, V eloCT is the first work to scale to the RISC-V out-of-order BOOM and can (mostly-automatically) verify all BOOM variants (ranging from Small to Mega) in between 6.95 minutes to 199.1 minutes.
papers.abstract_zh:
形式验证是当今硬件设计中的一项关键任务。然而，尽管在提高技术自动化和效率方面取得了重大进展，但扩展到大型硬件设计仍然是一个重大挑战。

我们通过提出 H-H OUDINI 来应对这一挑战：一种用于（主要是）按钮归纳不变学习的新算法，可扩展到大型硬件设计。 H-H OUDINI 结合了机器学习启发综合 (MLIS) 和基于 SAT 的增量学习的优势。关键的进步是一种方法，该方法用精心构建的较小的增量 SMT 检查层次结构取代了 MLIS 进行的整体式 SMT 式检查，这些检查可以并行化、记忆并以构造正确的方式重新组装成原始的“整体式”不变量。

我们将 H-H OUDINI 实例化为 V eloCT，这是一个通过学习关系不变量来证明硬件安全属性的框架。我们针对微架构安全中的“安全指令集合成”问题对 V eloCT 进行基准测试。在这里，V eloCT 在 10 秒内自动（无需专家注释）学习 RISC-V Rocketchip 的不变量（比现有技术快 2880 倍）。此外，V eloCT 是第一个扩展到 RISC-V 无序 BOOM 的工作，并且可以（主要是自动）在 6.95 分钟到 199.1 分钟之间验证所有 BOOM 变体（范围从小型到巨型）。

papers.title: HALO: Loop-aware Bootstrapping Management for Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
papers.abstract:
Thanks to the computation ability on encrypted data, fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) is an attractive solution for privacy-preserving computation. Despite its advantages, FHE suffers from limited applicability in small programs because repeated FHE multiplications deplete the level of a ciphertext, which is finite. Bootstrapping reinitializes the level, thus allowing support for larger programs. However, its high computational overhead and the risk of level underflow require sophisticated bootstrapping placement, thereby increasing the programming burden. Although a recently proposed compiler automatizes the bootstrapping placement, its applicability is still limited due to lack of loop support.

This work proposes the first loop-aware bootstrapping management compiler, called HALO, which optimizes bootstrapping placement in an FHE program with a loop. To correctly support bootstrapping-enabled loops, HALO matches encryption types and levels between live-in and loop-carried ciphertexts in the loops. To reduce the bootstrapping overheads, HALO decreases the number of bootstrapping within a loop body by packing the loop-carried variables to a single ciphertext, reduces wasted levels in a short loop body by unrolling the loop, and optimizes the bootstrapping latency by adjusting the target level of bootstrapping as needed. For seven machine learning programs with flat and nested loops, HALO shows 27% performance speedup compared to the state-of-the-art compiler that places bootstrapping operations on fully unrolled loops. In addition, HALO reduces the compilation time and code size by geometric means of 209.12x and 11.0x compared to the compiler, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于对加密数据的计算能力，完全同态加密（FHE）是隐私保护计算的一种有吸引力的解决方案。尽管 FHE 有其优点，但它在小型程序中的适用性有限，因为重复的 FHE 乘法会耗尽密文的级别，而密文的级别是有限的。引导重新初始化级别，从而允许支持更大的程序。然而，其高计算开销和电平下溢的风险需要复杂的自举放置，从而增加了编程负担。尽管最近提出的编译器可以自动化引导放置，但由于缺乏循环支持，其适用性仍然受到限制。

这项工作提出了第一个循环感知引导管理编译器，称为 HALO，它优化了带有循环的 FHE 程序中的引导放置。为了正确支持启用引导的循环，HALO 会匹配循环中的实时密文和循环携带的密文之间的加密类型和级别。为了减少引导开销，HALO 通过将循环携带的变量打包到单个密文中来减少循环体内的引导次数，通过展开循环来减少短循环体内浪费的级别，并通过根据需要调整引导的目标级别来优化引导延迟。对于七个具有平面和嵌套循环的机器学习程序，与将引导操作置于完全展开的循环上的最先进的编译器相比，HALO 显示出 27% 的性能加速。此外，与编译器相比，HALO 的编译时间和代码大小分别减少了 209.12 倍和 11.0 倍的几何平均值。

papers.title: Hardware Sentinel: Protecting Software Applications from Hardware Silent Data Corruptions.
papers.abstract: Silent Data Corruptions (SDCs) pose a significant challenge in large-scale infrastructures, affecting data center applications unpredictably and reducing service reliability. Primarily caused by silicon defects, traditional hardware testing methods are insufficient to prevent SDC propagation. SDCs are influenced by various factors, including data randomization, workload characteristics, environmental conditions, and aging, necessitating top-down approaches from the application layer. In this paper, we introduce Hardware Sentinel, a novel framework that detects SDCs through typical software failure indicators such as segmentation faults, core dumps, application crashes, and logs. We have validated our framework in a large-scale data center fleet, across diverse application, kernel, and hardware configurations, achieving a high success rate of SDC detection. Hardware Sentinel has uncovered novel instances of SDCs, surpassing the detection capabilities of published testing techniques. Our analysis of over 6 years' worth of application and system failure data within a large-scale infrastructure has successfully identified hundreds of defective CPUs that triggered SDCs. Notably, the Hardware Sentinel flow increases effective coverage over existing hardware-testing methods like Fleetscanner (out-of-production testing) by 1.74x and Ripple (in-production testing) by 1.92x. We share the top kernel exceptions with the highest correlation to silent data corruption failures. We present results spanning 7 CPU generations from multiple semiconductor manufacturers, 13 large-scale workloads, and 27 data center regions, providing insights into the trade-offs involved in detection and fleet deployment.
papers.abstract_zh: 无声数据损坏 (SDC) 对大规模基础设施构成重大挑战，对数据中心应用产生不可预测的影响并降低服务可靠性。传统的硬件测试方法主要由硅缺陷引起，不足以防止 SDC 传播。 SDC 受到多种因素的影响，包括数据随机化、工作负载特征、环境条件和老化，因此需要从应用层采用自上而下的方法。在本文中，我们介绍了 Hardware Sentinel，这是一种新颖的框架，它通过典型的软件故障指标（例如分段错误、核心转储、应用程序崩溃和日志）来检测 SDC。我们已经在大型数据中心群中跨不同应用程序、内核和硬件配置验证了我们的框架，实现了 SDC 检测的高成功率。 Hardware Sentinel 发现了 SDC 的新实例，其检测能力超越了已发布的测试技术。我们对大型基础设施中 6 年多的应用程序和系统故障数据进行了分析，成功识别出数百个触发 SDC 的有缺陷的 CPU。值得注意的是，Hardware Sentinel 流程将 Fleetscanner（生产外测试）等现有硬件测试方法的有效覆盖范围提高了 1.74 倍，将 Ripple（生产中测试）提高了 1.92 倍。我们分享与静默数据损坏故障相关性最高的顶级内核异常。我们展示了来自多个半导体制造商的 7 代 CPU、13 个大规模工作负载和 27 个数据中心区域的结果，提供了有关检测和车队部署所涉及的权衡的见解。

papers.title: Harmonia: A Unified Framework for Heterogeneous FPGA Acceleration in the Cloud.
papers.abstract:
FPGAs are gaining popularity in the cloud as accelerators for various applications. To make FPGAs more accessible for users and streamline system management, cloud providers have widely adopted the shell-role architecture on their homogeneous FPGA servers. However, the increasing heterogeneity of cloud FPGAs poses new challenges for this architecture. Previous studies either focus on homogeneous FPGAs or only partially address the portability issues for roles, while still requiring laborious shell development for providers and ad-hoc software modifications for users.

This paper presents Harmonia, a unified framework for heterogeneous FPGA acceleration in the cloud. Harmonia operates on two layers: a platform-specific layer that abstracts hardware differences and a platform-independent layer that provides a unified shell for diverse roles and host software. In detail, Harmonia provides automated platform adapters and lightweight interface wrappers to manage hardware differences. Next, it builds a modularized shell composed of Reusable Building Blocks and employs hierarchical tailoring to provide a resource-efficient and easy-to-use shell for different roles. Finally, it presents a command-based interface to minimize software modifications across distinct platforms. Harmonia has been deployed in a large service provider, Douyin, for several years. It reduces shell development workloads by 69%-93% and simplifies role and software configurations with negligible overhead (<0.63%). Compared with other frameworks, Harmonia supports cross-vendor FPGAs, reduces resource consumption by 3.5%-14.9% and simplifies software configurations by 15-23X while maintaining comparable performance.
papers.abstract_zh:
FPGA 作为各种应用的加速器在云中越来越受欢迎。为了使用户更容易访问 FPGA 并简化系统管理，云提供商在其同构 FPGA 服务器上广泛采用了 shell 角色架构。然而，云 FPGA 日益增加的异构性给这种架构带来了新的挑战。以前的研究要么侧重于同质 FPGA，要么仅部分解决角色的可移植性问题，同时仍然需要提供商进行费力的 shell 开发，并为用户进行临时软件修改。

本文介绍了 Harmonia，一个用于云端异构 FPGA 加速的统一框架。 Harmonia 在两层上运行：一个特定于平台的层，用于抽象硬件差异；另一个与平台无关的层，为不同的角色和主机软件提供统一的 shell。具体来说，Harmonia 提供自动化平台适配器和轻量级接口包装器来管理硬件差异。接下来，它构建由可重用构建块组成的模块化外壳，并采用分层剪裁为不同角色提供资源高效且易于使用的外壳。最后，它提供了一个基于命令的界面，以最大限度地减少不同平台上的软件修改。 Harmonia 已在大型服务提供商抖音中部署多年。它将 shell 开发工作量减少了 69%-93%，并简化了角色和软件配置，而开销可以忽略不计 (<0.63%)。与其他框架相比，Harmonia 支持跨供应商 FPGA，在保持相当性能的同时，资源消耗降低了 3.5%-14.9%，软件配置简化了 15-23 倍。

papers.title: Has Machine Learning for Systems Reached an Inflection Point?
papers.abstract:
A wide range of research areas - from natural language processing to computer vision and software engineering - have been (or are being) revolutionized by machine learning and artificial intelligence. Each of these areas went through an inflection point where they transitioned from ML as one of many approaches to ML becoming a predominant approach of the field. No example symbolizes this better than the AlexNet paper from 2012, which fundamentally transformed the field of computer vision.

Computer systems remain a notable exception. In this talk, I will discuss emerging trends in the ML for Systems domain, how systems differ from these other areas, and what an ''AlexNet Moment'' for systems might look like. Along the way, I will describe a framework for categorizing work in the field and discuss emerging research problems and opportunities.
papers.abstract_zh:
机器学习和人工智能已经（或正在）彻底改变了从自然语言处理到计算机视觉和软件工程的广泛研究领域。这些领域中的每一个都经历了一个拐点，从机器学习作为众多方法之一转变为该领域的主要方法。没有比 2012 年 AlexNet 论文更能体现这一点的例子了，该论文从根本上改变了计算机视觉领域。

计算机系统仍然是一个明显的例外。在本次演讲中，我将讨论系统机器学习领域的新兴趋势、系统与其他领域有何不同，以及系统的“AlexNet 时刻”可能是什么样子。在此过程中，我将描述一个对该领域工作进行分类的框架，并讨论新出现的研究问题和机遇。

papers.title: Helix: Serving Large Language Models over Heterogeneous GPUs and Network via Max-Flow.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Helix, a distributed system for high-throughput, low-latency large language model (LLM) serving in heterogeneous GPU clusters. The key idea behind Helix is to formulate inference computation of LLMs over heterogeneous GPUs and network connections as a max-flow problem on directed, weighted graphs, whose nodes represent GPU instances and edges capture both GPU and network heterogeneity through their capacities. Helix then uses a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) algorithm to discover highly optimized strategies to serve LLMs on heterogeneous GPUs. This approach allows Helix to jointly optimize model placement and request scheduling, two highly entangled tasks in heterogeneous LLM serving. Our evaluation on several heterogeneous clusters ranging from 24 to 42 GPU nodes shows that Helix improves serving throughput by up to 3.3x and reduces prompting and decoding latency by up to 66% and 24%, respectively, compared to existing approaches. Helix is available at https://github.com/Thesys-lab/Helix-ASPLOS25.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Helix，这是一种在异构 GPU 集群中提供高吞吐量、低延迟大型语言模型 (LLM) 的分布式系统。 Helix 背后的关键思想是将异构 GPU 和网络连接上的 LLM 推理计算制定为有向加权图上的最大流问题，其节点代表 GPU 实例，边通过其能力捕获 GPU 和网络异构性。然后，Helix 使用混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 算法来发现高度优化的策略，以在异构 GPU 上为 LLM 提供服务。这种方法允许 Helix 联合优化模型放置和请求调度，这是异构 LLM 服务中两个高度纠缠的任务。我们对 24 到 42 个 GPU 节点的多个异构集群的评估表明，与现有方法相比，Helix 将服务吞吐量提高了 3.3 倍，并将提示和解码延迟分别减少了 66% 和 24%。 Helix 可从 https://github.com/Thesys-lab/Helix-ASPLOS25 获取。

papers.title: HetEC: Architectures for Heterogeneous Quantum Error Correction Codes.
papers.abstract:
Quantum Error Correction (QEC) is essential for future quantum computers due to its ability to exponentially suppress physical errors. The surface code is a leading error-correcting code candidate because of its local topological structure, experimentally achievable thresholds, and support for universal gate operations with magic states. However, its physical overhead scales quadratically with number of correctable errors. Conversely, quantum low-density parity-check (qLDPC) codes offer superior scaling but lack, on their own, a clear path to universal logical computation. Therefore, it is becoming increasingly evident that there are significant advantages to designing architectures using multiple codes. Heterogeneous architectures provide a clear path to universal logical computation as well as the ability to access different resource trade offs.

To address this, we propose integrating the surface code and gross code using an ancilla bus for inter-code data movement. This approach involves managing trade-offs, including qubit overhead, a constrained instruction set, and gross code (memory) routing and management. While our focus is on the gross-surface code architecture, our method is adaptable to any code combination and the constraints generated by that specific architecture.

Motivated by the potential reduction of physical qubit overhead, an important feature in the realization of fault-tolerant computation, we perform the first full system study of heterogeneous error-correcting codes, discovering architectural trade-offs and optimizing around them. We demonstrate physical qubit reductions of up to 6.42x when executing an algorithm to a logical error rate, at the cost of up to a 3.43x increase in algorithm time.
papers.abstract_zh:
量子纠错（QEC）对于未来的量子计算机至关重要，因为它能够以指数方式抑制物理错误。表面码是领先的纠错码候选者，因为它具有局部拓扑结构、实验上可实现的阈值以及对具有神奇状态的通用门操作的支持。然而，其物理开销与可纠正错误的数量呈二次方关系。相反，量子低密度奇偶校验（qLDPC）码提供了卓越的扩展能力，但其本身缺乏通向通用逻辑计算的清晰路径。因此，越来越明显的是，使用多种代码设计架构具有显着的优势。异构架构提供了通向通用逻辑计算的清晰路径以及访问不同资源权衡的能力。

为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用辅助总线集成表面代码和总代码以进行代码间数据移动。这种方法涉及管理权衡，包括量子位开销、受限指令集以及总代码（内存）路由和管理。虽然我们的重点是总表面代码架构，但我们的方法适用于任何代码组合以及该特定架构生成的约束。

受物理量子位开销潜在减少（实现容错计算的一个重要特征）的推动，我们对异构纠错码进行了首次完整的系统研究，发现架构权衡并围绕它们进行优化。我们证明，当执行逻辑错误率算法时，物理量子比特减少高达 6.42 倍，但代价是算法时间增加了 3.43 倍。

papers.title: Hierarchical Prefetching: A Software-Hardware Instruction Prefetcher for Server Applications.
papers.abstract: The large working set of instructions in server-side applications causes a significant bottleneck in the front-end, even for high-performance processors equipped with fetch-directed instruction prefetching (FDIP). Prefetchers specifically designed for server scenarios typically rely on a record-and-replay mechanism that exploits the repetitiveness of instruction sequences. However, the efficacy of these techniques is compromised by discrepancies between actual and predicted control flows, resulting in loss of coverage and timeliness. This paper proposes Hierarchical Prefetching, a novel approach that tackles the limitations of existing prefetchers. It identifies common coarse-grained functionality blocks (called Bundles) within the server code and prefetches them as a whole. Bundles are significantly larger than typical prefetch targets, encompassing tens to hundreds of kilobytes of code. The approach combines simple software analysis of code for bundle formation and light-weight hardware for record-and-replay prefetching. The prefetcher requires under 2KB of on-chip storage by keeping most of the metadata in main memory. Experiments with 11 popular server workloads reveal that Hierarchical Prefetching significantly improves miss coverage and timeliness over prior techniques, achieving a 6.6% average performance gain over FDIP.
papers.abstract_zh: 服务器端应用程序中的大量工作指令集会导致前端出现严重瓶颈，即使对于配备了直接取指指令预取 (FDIP) 的高性能处理器也是如此。专为服务器场景设计的预取器通常依赖于利用指令序列的重复性的记录和重放机制。然而，这些技术的功效因实际控制流和预测控制流之间的差异而受到影响，从而导致覆盖范围和及时性的损失。本文提出了分层预取，这是一种解决现有预取器局限性的新方法。它识别服务器代码中常见的粗粒度功能块（称为捆绑包）并将它们作为一个整体进行预取。捆绑包比典型的预取目标大得多，包含数十到数百 KB 的代码。该方法结合了用于捆绑形成的简单代码软件分析和用于记录和重放预取的轻量级硬件。通过将大部分元数据保存在主存储器中，预取器需要不到 2KB 的片上存储空间。对 11 种流行服务器工作负载进行的实验表明，与现有技术相比，分层预取显着提高了缺失覆盖率和及时性，与 FDIP 相比，平均性能提高了 6.6%。

papers.title: Hopps: Leveraging Sparsity to Accelerate Automata Processing.
papers.abstract:
Automata processing (AP) is a key kernel in data analytics and scientific computing. AP workloads process a stream of symbols with many automata (FSMs) in parallel, e.g., pattern-matching network traffic against many malicious strings.

The need for high-performance AP has sparked the design of specialized accelerators. But prior AP accelerators are inefficient: AP workloads have substantial sparsity, but accelerators exploit no or limited sparsity. Specifically, each AP workload can be expressed as the concurrent traversal of all automata, which are encoded as graphs. But state-of-the-art accelerators store these graphs uncompressed, using bitsets. This allows the use of specialized memory crossbars that provide high parallelism and efficiency when graphs are dense. But many graphs are highly sparse, making crossbar-based accelerators inefficient.

We present Hopps, the first automata processing accelerator that exploits sparse data representations. Hopps combines two types of processing units: one represents data uncompressed, which achieves high throughput but is space-inefficient, while the other uses a compressed-sparse representation, which achieves high space efficiency but lower and more variable throughput. To use Hopps well, we present a novel automata mapping algorithm that maps most work to high-throughput units, while keeping a large fraction of state in space-efficient units. Hopps's hybrid design relaxes several constraints in crossbar-based designs, allowing for more efficient high-throughput units (e.g., by using a large number of smaller crossbars). Thus, by making the uncommon case cheap, Hopps makes the common case even faster.

We evaluate Hopps on AutomataZoo benchmarks. Hopps outperforms prior state-of-the-art accelerators Impala and SpAP by gmean 2.5x and 2.2x when using equal area.
papers.abstract_zh:
自动机处理（AP）是数据分析和科学计算的关键核心。 AP 工作负载使用许多自动机 (FSM) 并行处理符号流，例如针对许多恶意字符串对网络流量进行模式匹配。

对高性能 AP 的需求激发了专用加速器的设计。但之前的 AP 加速器效率低下：AP 工作负载具有很大的稀疏性，但加速器没有利用稀疏性或利用有限的稀疏性。具体来说，每个AP工作负载可以表示为所有自动机的并发遍历，这些自动机被编码为图。但最先进的加速器使用位集来存储这些未压缩的图。这允许使用专门的内存交叉开关，在图形密集时提供高并行性和效率。但许多图高度稀疏，使得基于交叉开关的加速器效率低下。

我们推出了 Hopps，这是第一个利用稀疏数据表示的自动机处理加速器。 Hopps结合了两种类型的处理单元：一种表示未压缩的数据，可实现高吞吐量，但空间效率低下；另一种使用压缩稀疏表示，可实现高空间效率，但吞吐量较低且变化较大。为了很好地使用 Hopps，我们提出了一种新颖的自动机映射算法，该算法将大部分工作映射到高吞吐量单元，同时将大部分状态保留在节省空间的单元中。 Hopps 的混合设计放宽了基于交叉开关的设计中的几个限制，允许更高效的高吞吐量单元（例如，通过使用大量较小的交叉开关）。因此，通过使不常见的情况变得便宜，霍普斯使常见的情况变得更快。

我们在 AutomataZoo 基准测试上评估 Hopps。当使用相同面积时，Hopps 的性能比先前最先进的加速器 Impala 和 SpAP 的性能分别高出 gmean 2.5 倍和 2.2 倍。

papers.title: HybridTier: an Adaptive and Lightweight CXL-Memory Tiering System.
papers.abstract: Modern workloads are demanding increasingly larger memory capacity. Compute Express Link (CXL)-based memory tiering has emerged as a promising solution for addressing this problem by utilizing traditional DRAM alongside slow-tier CXL memory devices. We analyze prior tiering systems and observe two challenges for high-performance memory tiering: adapting to skewed but dynamically varying data hotness distributions while minimizing memory and cache overhead due to tiering. To address these challenges, we propose HybridTier, an adaptive and lightweight tiering system for CXL memory. HybridTier tracks both long-term data access frequency and short-term access momentum simultaneously to accurately capture and adapt to shifting hotness distributions. HybridTier reduces the metadata memory overhead by tracking data accesses probabilistically, obtaining higher memory efficiency by trading off a small amount of tracking inaccuracy that has a negligible impact on application performance. To reduce cache overhead, HybridTier uses lightweight data structures that optimize for data locality to track data hotness. Our evaluations show that HybridTier outperforms prior systems by up to 91% (19% geomean), incurring 2.0-7.8x less memory overhead and 1.7-3.5x less cache misses.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代工作负载需要越来越大的内存容量。基于 Compute Express Link (CXL) 的内存分层已成为解决此问题的一种有前途的解决方案，它利用传统 DRAM 和慢速层 CXL 内存设备。我们分析了现有的分层系统，并观察了高性能内存分层的两个挑战：适应倾斜但动态变化的数据热度分布，同时最大限度地减少分层带来的内存和缓存开销。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 HybridTier，这是一种适用于 CXL 内存的自适应轻量级分层系统。 HybridTier 同时跟踪长期数据访问频率和短期访问动量，以准确捕获和适应不断变化的热度分布。 HybridTier 通过概率跟踪数据访问来减少元数据内存开销，通过权衡对应用程序性能影响可以忽略不计的少量跟踪不准确性来获得更高的内存效率。为了减少缓存开销，HybridTier 使用针对数据局部性进行优化的轻量级数据结构来跟踪数据热度。我们的评估表明，HybridTier 的性能比之前的系统高出 91%（19% geomean），内存开销减少了 2.0-7.8 倍，缓存未命中减少了 1.7-3.5 倍。

papers.title: HyperHammer: Breaking Free from KVM-Enforced Isolation.
papers.abstract:
Hardware-assisted virtualization is a key enabler of the modern cloud. It decouples virtual machine execution from the hardware it runs on, allowing increased flexibility through services such as dynamic hardware provisioning and live migration. Underlying this flexibility is the security promise that guest virtual machines are isolated from each other. However, due to the level of sharing between VMs, hardware vulnerabilities present a serious threat to this usage. One such vulnerability is Rowhammer, which allows attackers to modify the contents of memory to which they have no access. While the attack has been known for over a decade, published applications against such environments are limited, compromising only co-resident VMs, but not the hypervisor. Moreover, due to security concerns, a key component enabling their attack has been disabled. Hence, this attack is no longer applicable in a contemporary virtualized environment.

In this paper, we examine how Rowhammer can affect virtualized systems. We present HyperHammer, a Rowhammer attack that breaks hypervisor-enforced memory isolation and further compromises the hypervisor. Due to the highly specific system requirements for leveraging Rowhammer bit flips, HyperHammer is demonstrated on a very particular system configuration. Therefore, as demonstrated, HyperHammer is more a proof-of-concept than an immediate threat to computer systems. Nonetheless, our work demonstrates that hardware-assisted virtualization does not fully protect the hypervisor, and that with sufficient engineering a determined attacker might achieve complete hypervisor compromise.
papers.abstract_zh:
硬件辅助虚拟化是现代云的关键推动者。它将虚拟机执行与其运行的硬件解耦，从而通过动态硬件配置和实时迁移等服务提高灵活性。这种灵活性的基础是来宾虚拟机彼此隔离的安全承诺。然而，由于虚拟机之间的共享级别，硬件漏洞对此使用构成了严重威胁。 Rowhammer 就是此类漏洞之一，它允许攻击者修改他们无权访问的内存内容。虽然这种攻击已经存在十多年了，但针对此类环境发布的应用程序非常有限，仅损害共存的虚拟机，但不会损害虚拟机管理程序。此外，出于安全考虑，导致其攻击的关键组件已被禁用。因此，这种攻击不再适用于当代虚拟化环境。

在本文中，我们研究了 Rowhammer 如何影响虚拟化系统。我们提出了 HyperHammer，这是一种 Rowhammer 攻击，它破坏了虚拟机管理程序强制执行的内存隔离，并进一步损害了虚拟机管理程序。由于利用 Rowhammer 位翻转的高度特定的系统要求，HyperHammer 在非常特殊的系统配置上进行了演示。因此，正如所证明的那样，HyperHammer 更多的是一种概念验证，而不是对计算机系统的直接威胁。尽管如此，我们的工作表明，硬件辅助虚拟化并不能完全保护虚拟机管理程序，并且通过足够的工程设计，坚定的攻击者可能会实现完全的虚拟机管理程序妥协。

papers.title: Instruction-Aware Cooperative TLB and Cache Replacement Policies.
papers.abstract:
Modern server and data center applications are characterized not only by big datasets, but also by large instruction footprints that incur frequent cache and Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB) misses due to instruction accesses. Instruction TLB misses are particularly problematic since they cause pipeline stalls that significantly harm performance.

This paper proposes cooperative last-level TLB (STLB) and L2 cache (L2C) replacement policies targeting workloads with large instruction footprints. We propose the Instruction Translation Prioritization (iTP) , an STLB replacement policy that maximizes the number of instruction hits in the STLB at the expense of increasing data page walks. To compensate for the increase of data page walks, we propose the extended Page Table Prioritization (xPTP) , a new L2C replacement policy that amplifies the benefits of iTP by effectively reducing L2C misses due to data page walks. Our proposal, iTP + xPTP , combines iTP at STLB and xPTP at L2C. In addition, iTP + xPTP employs an adaptive mechanism that switches between xPTP and LRU policies at L2C based on the pressure placed on the virtual memory subsystem. Our proposal improves single-core geometric mean performance by 18.9% over a baseline that uses the LRU replacement policy at both STLB and L2C across a set of contemporary server workloads. Under SMT co-location, the corresponding performance uplift is 11.4%. Finally, we show that our proposal outperforms the state-of-the-art STLB and cache replacement policies.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代服务器和数据中心应用程序的特点不仅是大数据集，而且还具有大量指令占用空间，这些指令占用空间会因指令访问而导致频繁的缓存和转换后备缓冲区 (TLB) 丢失。指令 TLB 未命中尤其成问题，因为它们会导致管道停顿，从而严重损害性能。

本文提出了针对具有大指令占用空间的工作负载的协作末级 TLB (STLB) 和 L2 缓存 (L2C) 替换策略。我们提出了指令翻译优先级（iTP），这是一种 STLB 替换策略，它以增加数据页遍历为代价来最大化 STLB 中的指令命中数量。为了补偿数据页遍历的增加，我们提出了扩展页表优先级（xPTP），这是一种新的 L2C 替换策略，通过有效减少数据页遍历导致的 L2C 缺失来放大 iTP 的优势。我们的建议 iTP + xPTP 结合了 STLB 的 iTP 和 L2C 的 xPTP。此外，iTP+xPTP采用自适应机制，根据虚拟内存子系统的压力在L2C上在xPTP和LRU策略之间切换。与在一组当代服务器工作负载中在 STLB 和 L2C 上使用 LRU 替换策略的基准相比，我们的建议将单核几何平均性能提高了 18.9%。在SMT主机托管下，相应的性能提升为11.4%。最后，我们表明我们的建议优于最先进的 STLB 和缓存替换策略。

papers.title: KernelGPT: Enhanced Kernel Fuzzing via Large Language Models.
papers.abstract:
Bugs in operating system kernels can affect billions of devices and users all over the world. As a result, a large body of research has been focused on kernel fuzzing, i.e., automatically generating syscall (system call) sequences to detect potential kernel bugs or vulnerabilities. Kernel fuzzing aims to generate valid syscall sequences guided by syscall specifications that define both the syntax and semantics of syscalls. While there has been existing work trying to automate syscall specification generation, this remains largely manual work, and a large number of important syscalls are still uncovered.

In this paper, we propose KernelGPT, the first approach to automatically synthesizing syscall specifications via Large Language Models (LLMs) for enhanced kernel fuzzing. Our key insight is that LLMs have seen massive kernel code, documentation, and use cases during pre-training, and thus can automatically distill the necessary information for making valid syscalls. More specifically, KernelGPT leverages an iterative approach to automatically infer the specifications, and further debug and repair them based on the validation feedback. Our results demonstrate that KernelGPT can generate more new and valid specifications and achieve higher coverage than state-of-the-art techniques. So far, by using newly generated specifications, KernelGPT has already detected 24 new unique bugs in Linux kernel, with 12 fixed and 11 assigned with CVE numbers.
