At the architecture level, an instruction-driven architecture consisting of configurable and high-performance function units is designed, supporting the flexible and efficient ISA. Evaluations show that FEASTA has 5.40× geomean energy efficiency improvements compared to GPU among various workloads. FEASTA delivers 1.47× and 3.19× higher performance on sparse matrix multiplication kernels compared to state-of-the-art sparse matrix accelerator and CPU extension. Across diverse kernels, FEASTA achieves 1.69-12.70× energy efficiency over existing architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，稀疏张量代数（SpTA）在机器学习中发挥着越来越重要的作用。然而，由于 SpTA 的非结构化稀疏性，通用处理器（例如 GPU 和 CPU）由于硬件资源未得到充分利用而效率低下。稀疏内核加速器针对特定任务进行了优化。然而，它们的专用处理单元和数据路径无法有效支持具有不同数据流和各种稀疏度的其他SpTA任务，从而导致性能下降。本文提出了 FEASTA，一种灵活高效的稀疏张量代数加速器。为了高效处理各种稀疏度的通用SpTA任务，我们从三个层面精心设计了FEASTA。在数据流抽象层面，我们将爱因斯坦求和应用于稀疏光纤树数据结构，以对通用SpTA的统一执行流程进行建模，即加入和合并光纤树。在指令集架构（ISA）层面，基于执行流程提出了通用的SpTA ISA。它包括针对密集和稀疏数据的不同类型的指令，实现指令级别的灵活性和效率。在架构层面，设计了由可配置的高性能功能单元组成的指令驱动架构，支持灵活高效的ISA。评估显示，在各种工作负载下，FEASTA 与 GPU 相比，能效提高了 5.40 倍几何平均值。与最先进的稀疏矩阵加速器和 CPU 扩展相比，FEAST 在稀疏矩阵乘法内核上的性能提高了 1.47 倍和 3.19 倍。在不同的内核中，FEAST 的能效比现有架构高出 1.69-12.70 倍。

papers.title: Felix: Optimizing Tensor Programs with Gradient Descent.
papers.abstract:
Obtaining high-performance implementations of tensor programs such as deep neural networks on a wide range of hardware remains a challenging task. Search-based tensor program optimizers can automatically find high-performance programs on a given hardware platform, but the search process in existing tools suffer from low efficiency, requiring hours or days of time to discover good programs due to the size of the search space.

We present Felix , a novel gradient-based compiler optimization framework for tensor-based programs. Felix creates a differentiable space of tensor programs that is amenable to search by gradient descent. Felix applies continuous relaxation on the space of programs and creates differentiable estimator of program latency, allowing efficient search of program candidates using gradient descent, in contrast to conventional approaches that search over a non-differentiable objective function over a discrete search space.

We perform an extensive evaluation on six deep neural networks for vision and natural language processing tasks on three GPU-based platforms. Our experiments show that Felix surpasses the performance of off-the-shelf inference frameworks - PyTorch, Tensorflow, and TensorRT - within 7 minutes of search time on average. Felix also finds optimized programs significantly faster than TVM Ansor, a state-of-the-art search-based optimizer for tensor programs.
papers.abstract_zh:
在各种硬件上获得张量程序（例如深度神经网络）的高性能实现仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。基于搜索的张量程序优化器可以在给定的硬件平台上自动查找高性能程序，但现有工具中的搜索过程效率低下，由于搜索空间的大小，需要数小时或数天的时间才能发现好的程序。

我们推出了 Felix，一种新颖的基于梯度的编译器优化框架，适用于基于张量的程序。 Felix 创建了一个可微分的张量程序空间，可以通过梯度下降进行搜索。 Felix 在程序空间上应用连续松弛，并创建程序延迟的可微估计器，允许使用梯度下降有效搜索候选程序，这与在离散搜索空间上搜索不可微目标函数的传统方法形成鲜明对比。

我们在三个基于 GPU 的平台上对用于视觉和自然语言处理任务的六个深度神经网络进行了广泛的评估。我们的实验表明，Felix 的性能超过了现成的推理框架（PyTorch、Tensorflow 和 TensorRT），平均搜索时间为 7 分钟。 Felix 发现优化程序的速度也比 TVM Ansor 快得多，TVM Ansor 是最先进的基于搜索的张量程序优化器。

papers.title: Fermihedral: On the Optimal Compilation for Fermion-to-Qubit Encoding.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Fermihedral, a compiler framework focusing on discovering the optimal Fermion-to-qubit encoding for targeted Fermionic Hamiltonians. Fermion-to-qubit encoding is a crucial step in harnessing quantum computing for efficient simulation of Fermionic quantum systems. Utilizing Pauli algebra, Fermihedral redefines complex constraints and objectives of Fermion-to-qubit encoding into a Boolean Satisfiability problem which can then be solved with high-performance solvers. To accommodate larger-scale scenarios, this paper proposed two new strategies that yield approximate optimal solutions mitigating the overhead from the exponentially large number of clauses. Evaluation across diverse Fermionic systems highlights the superiority of Fermihedral, showcasing substantial reductions in implementation costs, gate counts, and circuit depth in the compiled circuits. Real-system experiments on IonQ's device affirm its effectiveness, notably enhancing simulation accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Fermihedral，这是一个编译器框架，专注于为目标费米哈密顿量发现最佳的费米子到量子位编码。费米子到量子位的编码是利用量子计算有效模拟费米子量子系统的关键步骤。利用泡利代数，费米面体将费米子到量子位编码的复杂约束和目标重新定义为布尔可满足性问题，然后可以使用高性能求解器来解决。为了适应更大规模的场景，本文提出了两种新策略，可以产生近似最优解决方案，从而减轻指数级大量子句带来的开销。对不同费米子系统的评估凸显了费米面体的优越性，展示了编译电路中实施成本、门数和电路深度的大幅降低。 IonQ 设备上的真实系统实验证实了其有效性，显着提高了模拟精度。

papers.title: Flexible Non-intrusive Dynamic Instrumentation for WebAssembly.
papers.abstract: A key strength of managed runtimes over hardware is the ability to gain detailed insight into the dynamic execution of programs with instrumentation. Analyses such as code coverage, execution frequency, tracing, and debugging, are all made easier in a virtual setting. As a portable, low-level byte-code, WebAssembly offers inexpensive in-process sandboxing with high performance. Yet to date, Wasm engines have not offered much insight into executing programs, supporting at best bytecode-level stepping and basic source maps, but no instrumentation capabilities. In this paper, we show the first non-intrusive dynamic instrumentation system for WebAssembly in the open-source Wizard Research Engine. Our innovative design offers a flexible, complete hierarchy of instrumentation primitives that support building high-level, complex analyses in terms of low-level, programmable probes. In contrast to emulation or machine code instrumentation, injecting probes at the bytecode level increases expressiveness and vastly simplifies the implementation by reusing the engine's JIT compiler, interpreter, and deoptimization mechanism rather than building new ones. Wizard supports both dynamic instrumentation insertion and removal while providing consistency guarantees, which is key to composing multiple analyses without interference. We detail a fully-featured implementation in a high-performance multi-tier Wasm engine, show novel optimizations specifically designed to minimize instrumentation overhead, and evaluate performance characteristics under load from various analyses. This design is well-suited for production engine adoption as probes can be implemented to have no impact on production performance when not in use.
papers.abstract_zh: 与硬件相比，托管运行时的一个关键优势是能够通过仪器详细了解程序的动态执行。代码覆盖率、执行频率、跟踪和调试等分析在虚拟环境中都变得更加容易。作为一种可移植的低级字节代码，WebAssembly 提供了廉价的进程内沙箱和高性能。然而迄今为止，Wasm 引擎还没有提供对执行程序的太多洞察，最多支持字节码级步进和基本源映射，但没有仪表功能。在本文中，我们展示了开源 Wizard Research Engine 中第一个用于 WebAssembly 的非侵入式动态检测系统。我们的创新设计提供了灵活、完整的仪器原语层次结构，支持根据低级可编程探针构建高级、复杂的分析。与模拟或机器代码检测相比，在字节码级别注入探针可以提高表现力，并通过重用引擎的 JIT 编译器、解释器和去优化机制而不是构建新的机制来极大地简化实现。向导支持动态仪器插入和移除，同时提供一致性保证，这是无干扰地进行多个分析的关键。我们详细介绍了高性能多层 Wasm 引擎中的全功能实现，展示了专门为最大限度地减少仪器开销而设计的新颖优化，并通过各种分析评估了负载下的性能特征。这种设计非常适合生产引擎的采用，因为探针在不使用时不会对生产性能产生影响。

papers.title: FMCC: Flexible Measurement-based Quantum Computation over Cluster State.
papers.abstract: Measurement-based quantum computing (MBQC) is a promising quantum computing paradigm that performs computation through "one-way" measurements on entangled quantum qubits. It is widely used in photonic quantum computing (PQC), where the computation is carried out on photonic cluster states (i.e., a 2-D mesh of entangled photons). In MBQC-based PQC, the cluster state depth (i.e., the length of one-way measurements) plays an important role in the overall execution time and circuit error. In this paper, we propose FMCC, a compilation framework that employs dynamic programming with heuristics to efficiently minimize the cluster state depth. Experimental results on six quantum applications show that FMCC achieves 51.7%, 57.4%, and 56.8% average depth reductions in small, medium, and large qubit counts compared to the state-of-the-art MBQC compilations.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于测量的量子计算（MBQC）是一种有前途的量子计算范式，它通过对纠缠量子位的“单向”测量来执行计算。它广泛用于光子量子计算 (PQC)，其中计算是在光子簇态（即纠缠光子的二维网格）上进行的。在基于 MBQC 的 PQC 中，簇状态深度（即单向测量的长度）在整体执行时间和电路误差中起着重要作用。在本文中，我们提出了 FMCC，这是一种编译框架，它采用启发式动态编程来有效地最小化集群状态深度。六种量子应用的实验结果表明，与最先进的 MBQC 编译相比，FMCC 在小型、中型和大型量子位计数方面的平均深度减少了 51.7%、57.4% 和 56.8%。

papers.title: FOCAL: A First-Order Carbon Model to Assess Processor Sustainability.
papers.abstract: Sustainability in general and global warming in particular are grand societal challenges. Computer systems demand substantial materials and energy resources throughout their entire lifetime. A key question is how computer engineers and scientists can reduce the environmental impact of computing. To overcome the inherent data uncertainty, this paper proposes FOCAL, a parameterized first-order carbon model to assess processor sustainability using first principles. FOCAL's normalized carbon footprint (NCF) metric guides computer architects to holistically optimize chip area, energy and power consumption to reduce a processor's environmental footprint. We use FOCAL to analyze and categorize a broad set of archetypal processor mechanisms into strongly, weakly or less sustainable design choices, providing insight and intuition into how to reduce a processor's environmental footprint with implications to both hardware and software. A case study illustrates a pathway for designing strongly sustainable multicore processors delivering high performance while at the same time reducing their environmental footprint.
papers.abstract_zh: 总体可持续性，特别是全球变暖是重大的社会挑战。计算机系统在其整个生命周期中都需要大量的材料和能源。一个关键问题是计算机工程师和科学家如何减少计算对环境的影响。为了克服固有的数据不确定性，本文提出了 FOCAL，一种参数化一阶碳模型，用于使用第一原理评估处理器的可持续性。 FOCAL 的标准化碳足迹 (NCF) 指标指导计算机架构师全面优化芯片面积、能源和功耗，以减少处理器的环境足迹。我们使用 FOCAL 来分析一系列广泛的原型处理器机制，并将其分类为强、弱或不太可持续的设计选择，从而提供有关如何减少处理器环境足迹（对硬件和软件都有影响）的见解和直觉。案例研究说明了设计强可持续多核处理器的途径，该处理器可提供高性能，同时减少对环境的影响。

papers.title: Formal Mechanised Semantics of CHERI C: Capabilities, Undefined Behaviour, and Provenance.
papers.abstract:
Memory safety issues are a persistent source of security vulnerabilities, with conventional architectures and the C codebase chronically prone to exploitable errors. The CHERI research project has shown how one can provide radically improved security for that existing codebase with minimal modification, using unforgeable hardware capabilities in place of machine-word pointers in CHERI dialects of C, implemented as adaptions of Clang/LLVM and GCC. CHERI was first prototyped as extensions of MIPS and RISC-V; it is currently being evaluated by Arm and others with the Arm Morello experimental architecture, processor, and platform, to explore its potential for mass-market adoption, and by Microsoft in their CHERIoT design for embedded cores.

There is thus considerable practical experience with CHERI C implementation and use, but exactly what CHERI C's semantics is (or should be) remains an open question. In this paper, we present the first attempt to rigorously and comprehensively define CHERI C semantics, discuss key semantics design questions relating to capabilities, provenance, and undefined behaviour, and clarify them with semantics in multiple complementary forms: in prose, as an executable semantics adapting the Cerberus C semantics, and mechanised in Coq.

This establishes a solid foundation for CHERI C, for those porting code to it, for compiler implementers, and for future semantics and verification.
papers.abstract_zh:
内存安全问题是安全漏洞的持久来源，传统架构和 C 代码库长期容易出现可利用的错误。 CHERI 研究项目展示了如何通过最少的修改，使用不可伪造的硬件功能代替 C CHERI 方言中的机器字指针（以 Clang/LLVM 和 GCC 的改编实现），从根本上提高现有代码库的安全性。 CHERI 最初的原型是作为 MIPS 和 RISC-V 的扩展；目前，Arm 和其他公司正在使用 Arm Morello 实验架构、处理器和平台对其进行评估，以探索其大众市场采用的潜力，而 Microsoft 也正在其嵌入式内核的 CHERIoT 设计中对其进行评估。

因此，CHERI C 的实现和使用有相当多的实践经验，但 CHERI C 的语义到底是什么（或应该是什么）仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们首次尝试严格、全面地定义 CHERI C 语义，讨论与功能、来源和未定义行为相关的关键语义设计问题，并用多种互补形式的语义来澄清它们：在散文中，作为适应 Cerberus C 语义的可执行语义，并在 Coq 中机械化。

这为 CHERI C、向其移植代码的人员、编译器实现者以及未来的语义和验证奠定了坚实的基础。

papers.title: FPGA Technology Mapping Using Sketch-Guided Program Synthesis.
papers.abstract: FPGA technology mapping is the process of implementing a hardware design expressed in high-level HDL (hardware design language) code using the low-level, architecture-specific primitives of the target FPGA. As FPGAs become increasingly heterogeneous, achieving high performance requires hardware synthesis tools that better support mapping to complex, highly configurable primitives like digital signal processors (DSPs). Current tools support DSP mapping via handwritten special-case mapping rules, which are laborious to write, error-prone, and often overlook mapping opportunities. We introduce Lakeroad, a principled approach to technology mapping via sketch-guided program synthesis. Lakeroad leverages two techniques---architecture-independent sketch templates and semantics extraction from HDL---to provide extensible technology mapping with stronger correctness guarantees and higher coverage of mapping opportunities than state-of-the-art tools. Across representative microbenchmarks, Lakeroad produces 2--3.5× the number of optimal mappings compared to proprietary state-of-the-art tools and 6--44× the number of optimal mappings compared to popular open-source tools, while also providing correctness guarantees not given by any other tool.
papers.abstract_zh: FPGA 技术映射是使用目标 FPGA 的低级、特定于架构的原语来实现以高级 HDL（硬件设计语言）代码表示的硬件设计的过程。随着 FPGA 变得越来越异构，要实现高性能，需要硬件综合工具更好地支持映射到复杂的、高度可配置的原语，例如数字信号处理器 (DSP)。当前的工具通过手写的特殊情况映射规则来支持 DSP 映射，但这些规则编写起来很费力、容易出错，并且经常忽略映射机会。我们介绍 Lakeroad，这是一种通过草图引导程序合成进行技术映射的原则性方法。 Lakeroad 利用两种技术（独立于架构的草图模板和 HDL 语义提取）提供可扩展的技术映射，与最先进的工具相比，具有更强的正确性保证和更高的映射机会覆盖率。在代表性的微基准测试中，与专有的最先进工具相比，Lakeroad 产生的最佳映射数量是 2--3.5 倍，与流行的开源工具相比，最佳映射数量是 6--44 倍，同时还提供任何其他工具无法提供的正确性保证。

papers.title: Fractal: Joint Multi-Level Sparse Pattern Tuning of Accuracy and Performance for DNN Pruning.
papers.abstract: Model pruning, which eliminates redundant parameters and reduces computational complexity, emerges as a viable strategy for efficient deep neural network (DNN) deployment. Owing to the irregular memory access and computation patterns in the sparse DNN models after pruning, existing arts have suggested various structured sparse patterns to enhance sparse DNN performance. In this work, we propose a unique perspective of understanding existing sparse pattern design as computation-skipping after tiling the tensor computation into multi-level hierarchies. This unified perspective opens up a new design space of multi-level sparse tiling to maximize the sparsity benefits of DNNs, as opposed to the single-level choice in current practices. We present Fractal, an auto-tuning system for sparse patterns that identifies the optimal multi-level sparse tiling pattern. We introduce PatternIR, a novel high-level intermediate representation (IR), to express a diverse range of multi-level sparse patterns. By leveraging insights from prior dense operator optimizations, we translate PatternIR into low-level compiler IRs, facilitating further operator optimization and code generation. Our evaluations demonstrate that Fractal yields substantial speedups of up to on average 3.16× on CUDA Core, 2.52× on TensorCore of GPUs compared to the state-of-art dense baseline under 75% sparsity while upholding minimal accuracy degradation compared to prior sparse operator libraries.
papers.abstract_zh: 模型剪枝消除了冗余参数并降低了计算复杂性，成为高效部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 的可行策略。由于稀疏DNN模型在修剪后的不规则内存访问和计算模式，现有技术提出了各种结构化稀疏模式来增强稀疏DNN性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种独特的视角，将现有的稀疏模式设计理解为将张量计算平铺为多级层次结构后的计算跳跃。这种统一的视角开辟了多级稀疏平铺的新设计空间，以最大限度地发挥 DNN 的稀疏性优势，而不是当前实践中的单级选择。我们提出了 Fractal，这是一种稀疏模式自动调整系统，可以识别最佳的多级稀疏平铺模式。我们引入 PatternIR，一种新颖的高级中间表示（IR），来表达各种多级稀疏模式。通过利用先前密集算子优化的见解，我们将 PatternIR 转换为低级编译器 IR，从而促进进一步的算子优化和代码生成。我们的评估表明，与 75% 稀疏度下最先进的稠密基线相比，Fractal 在 CUDA Core 上平均提高了 3.16 倍，在 GPU 的 TensorCore 上平均提高了 2.52 倍，同时与之前的稀疏算子库相比，保持了最小的精度下降。

papers.title: FUYAO: DPU-enabled Direct Data Transfer for Serverless Computing.
papers.abstract:
Serverless computing typically relies on the third-party forwarding method to transmit data between functions. This method couples control flow and data flow together, resulting in significantly slow data transmission speeds. This challenge makes it difficult for the serverless computing paradigm to meet the low-latency requirements of web services.

To solve this problem, we propose decoupling the control flow from the data flow, enabling direct data transfer between functions. We introduce Fuyao, the first intermediate data transfer solution capable of reducing data transfer latency to the sub-millisecond level. Fuyao provides four different data transfer methods to cater to diverse data transfer requirements within or between nodes. For function pairs that communicate frequently, Fuyao builds a stateful direct connection between them, enabling rapid inter-function data exchange. We evaluate Fuyao using real-world representative benchmarks. Experimental results show that Fuyao outperforms state-of-the-art systems by up to 57× on latency.
papers.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算通常依赖第三方转发方法在功能之间传输数据。这种方法将控制流和数据流耦合在一起，导致数据传输速度明显变慢。这一挑战使得无服务器计算范式很难满足 Web 服务的低延迟要求。

为了解决这个问题，我们建议将控制流与数据流解耦，从而实现函数之间的直接数据传输。我们推出福耀，这是第一个能够将数据传输延迟降低到亚毫秒级的中间数据传输解决方案。福耀提供四种不同的数据传输方式，以满足节点内或节点间不同的数据传输需求。对于频繁通信的功能对，福耀在它们之间建立有状态的直接连接，从而实现功能间的快速数据交换。我们使用现实世界的代表性基准来评估福耀。实验结果表明，福耀在延迟方面比最先进的系统高出 57 倍。

papers.title: Getting a Handle on Unmanaged Memory.
papers.abstract: The inability to relocate objects in unmanaged languages brings with it a menagerie of problems. Perhaps the most impactful is memory fragmentation, which has long plagued applications such as databases and web servers. These issues either fester or require Herculean programmer effort to address on a per-application basis because, in general, heap objects cannot be moved in unmanaged languages. In contrast, managed languages like C# cleanly address fragmentation through the use of compacting garbage collection techniques built upon heap object movement. In this work, we bridge this gap between unmanaged and managed languages through the use of handles, a level of indirection allowing heap object movement. Handles open the door to seamlessly employing runtime features from managed languages in existing, unmodified code written in unmanaged languages. We describe a new compiler and runtime system, Alaska, that acts as a drop-in replacement for malloc. Without any programmer effort , the Alaska compiler transforms pointer-based code to utilize handles, with optimizations to minimize performance impact. A codesigned runtime system manages this new level of indirection and exploits heap object movement via an extensible service interface. We investigate the overheads of Alaska on large benchmarks and applications spanning multiple domains. To show the power and extensibility of handles, we use Alaska to eliminate fragmentation on the heap through defragmentation, reducing memory usage by up to 40% in Redis.
papers.abstract_zh: 在非托管语言中无法重新定位对象会带来一系列问题。也许影响最大的是内存碎片，它长期以来一直困扰着数据库和 Web 服务器等应用程序。这些问题要么会恶化，要么需要程序员付出巨大的努力才能在每个应用程序的基础上解决，因为一般来说，堆对象不能在非托管语言中移动。相比之下，C# 等托管语言通过使用基于堆对象移动构建的压缩垃圾收集技术来干净地解决碎片问题。在这项工作中，我们通过使用句柄（允许堆对象移动的间接级别）来弥合非托管语言和托管语言之间的差距。句柄打开了在用非托管语言编写的现有未修改代码中无缝使用托管语言的运行时功能的大门。我们描述了一个新的编译器和运行时系统 Alaska，它可以作为 malloc 的直接替代品。无需任何程序员的努力，Alaska 编译器即可将基于指针的代码转换为利用句柄，并进行优化以最大程度地减少性能影响。协同设计的运行时系统管理这种新的间接级别，并通过可扩展的服务接口利用堆对象移动。我们调查了阿拉斯加在跨多个领域的大型基准和应用程序上的开销。为了展示句柄的强大功能和可扩展性，我们使用 Alaska 通过碎片整理来消除堆上的碎片，从而将 Redis 中的内存使用量减少高达 40%。

papers.title: GIANTSAN: Efficient Memory Sanitization with Segment Folding.
papers.abstract:
Memory safety sanitizers, the sharp weapon for detecting invalid memory operations during execution, employ runtime metadata to model the memory and help find memory errors hidden in the programs. However, location-based methods, the most widely deployed memory sanitization methods thanks to their high compatibility, face the low protection density issue: the number of bytes safeguarded by one metadata is limited. As a result, numerous memory accesses require loading excessive metadata, leading to a high runtime overhead.

To address this issue, we propose a new shadow encoding with segment folding to increase the protection density. Specifically, we characterize neighboring bytes with identical metadata by building novel summaries, called folded segments , on those bytes to reduce unnecessary metadata loadings. The new encoding uses less metadata to safeguard large memory regions, speeding up memory sanitization.

We implement our designed technique as GiantSan. Our evaluation using the SPEC CPU 2017 benchmark shows that GiantSan outperforms the state-of-the-art methods with 59.10% and 38.52% less runtime overhead than ASan and ASan-, respectively. Moreover, under the same redzone setting, GiantSan detects 463 fewer false negative cases than ASan and ASan- in testing the real-world project PHP.
papers.abstract_zh:
内存安全清理器是在执行期间检测无效内存操作的利器，它利用运行时元数据对内存进行建模，并帮助发现隐藏在程序中的内存错误。然而，基于位置的方法由于其高兼容性而成为最广泛部署的内存清理方法，但面临着保护密度低的问题：一个元数据保护的字节数有限。因此，大量的内存访问需要加载过多的元数据，从而导致较高的运行时开销。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种带有分段折叠的新影子编码，以提高保护密度。具体来说，我们通过在这些字节上构建新颖的摘要（称为折叠段）来表征具有相同元数据的相邻字节，以减少不必要的元数据加载。新编码使用更少的元数据来保护大内存区域，从而加快内存清理速度。

我们将我们设计的技术实现为 GiantSan。我们使用 SPEC CPU 2017 基准测试进行的评估表明，GiantSan 的性能优于最先进的方法，运行时开销分别比 ASan 和 ASan 少 59.10% 和 38.52%。此外，在相同的红区设置下，在测试真实项目 PHP 时，GiantSan 检测到的误报案例比 ASan 和 ASan 少 463 个。

papers.title: GMLake: Efficient and Transparent GPU Memory Defragmentation for Large-scale DNN Training with Virtual Memory Stitching.
papers.abstract: Large-scale deep neural networks (DNNs), such as large language models (LLMs), have revolutionized the artificial intelligence (AI) field and become increasingly popular. However, training or fine-tuning such models requires substantial computational power and resources, where the memory capacity of a single acceleration device like a GPU is one of the most important bottlenecks. Owing to the prohibitively large overhead (e.g., 10×) of GPUs' native memory allocator, DNN frameworks like PyTorch and TensorFlow adopt a caching allocator that maintains a memory pool with a splitting mechanism for fast memory (de)allocation. Unfortunately, the caching allocator's efficiency degrades quickly for popular memory reduction techniques such as re-computation, offloading, distributed training, and low-rank adaptation. The primary reason is that those memory reduction techniques introduce frequent and irregular memory (de)allocation requests, leading to severe fragmentation problems for the splitting-based caching allocator. To mitigate this fragmentation problem, we propose a novel memory allocation framework based on low-level GPU virtual memory management called GPU memory lake (GMLake). GMLake employs a novel virtual memory stitching (VMS) mechanism, which can fuse or combine non-contiguous memory blocks with a virtual memory address mapping. GMLake can reduce average of 9.2 GB (up to 25 GB) GPU memory usage and 15% (up to 33%) fragmentation among eight LLM models on GPU A100 with 80 GB memory. GMLake is completely transparent to the DNN models and memory reduction techniques and ensures the seamless execution of resource-intensive deep-learning tasks. We have open-sourced GMLake at https://github.com/intelligent-machine-learning/glake/tree/main/GMLake.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 等大规模深度神经网络 (DNN) 彻底改变了人工智能 (AI) 领域并变得越来越受欢迎。然而，训练或微调此类模型需要大量的计算能力和资源，其中 GPU 等单个加速设备的内存容量是最重要的瓶颈之一。由于 GPU 的本机内存分配器的开销过大（例如 10 倍），PyTorch 和 TensorFlow 等 DNN 框架采用缓存分配器，该分配器通过分裂机制维护内存池，以实现快速内存（解除）分配。不幸的是，对于流行的内存减少技术（例如重新计算、卸载、分布式训练和低秩适应），缓存分配器的效率会迅速下降。主要原因是这些内存减少技术引入了频繁且不规则的内存（解除）分配请求，导致基于拆分的缓存分配器出现严重的碎片问题。为了缓解这种碎片问题，我们提出了一种基于低级 GPU 虚拟内存管理的新型内存分配框架，称为 GPU 内存湖 (GMLake)。 GMLake 采用了一种新颖的虚拟内存拼接（VMS）机制，该机制可以将非连续内存块与虚拟内存地址映射融合或组合。在具有 80 GB 内存的 GPU A100 上的 8 个 LLM 模型中，GMLake 可以平均减少 9.2 GB（最高 25 GB）GPU 内存使用量和 15%（最高 33%）的碎片。 GMLake 对 DNN 模型和内存缩减技术完全透明，确保资源密集型深度学习任务的无缝执行。我们在 https://github.com/intelligent-machine-learning/glake/tree/main/GMLake 上开源了 GMLake。

papers.title: GMT: GPU Orchestrated Memory Tiering for the Big Data Era.
papers.abstract: As the demand for processing larger datasets increases, GPUs need to reach deeper into their (memory) hierarchy to directly access capacities that only storage systems (SSDs) can hold. However, the state-of-the-art mechanisms to reach storage either employ software stacks running on the host CPUs as intermediaries (e.g. Dragon, HMM), which has been noted to perform poorly and not able to meet the throughput needs of GPU cores, or directly access SSDs through NVMe queues (BaM) which does not benefit from lower latencies that may be possible by having the host memory as an intermediate tier. This paper presents the design and implementation of GPU Memory Tiering ( GMT ) by implementing a GPU-orchestrated 3-tier hierarchy comprising GPU memory, host memory and SSDs, where the GPU orchestrates most of the transfers that are bandwidth/latency sensitive. Additionally, it is important to not blindly transfer pages from the GPU memory to host memory upon an eviction, and GMT employs a reuse-prediction based practical insertion policy to perform discretionary page placement/bypass. An implementation and evaluation on an actual platform demonstrates that GMT performs 50% better than the state-of-the-art 2-tier strategy (BaM) and over 350% better than the state-of-the-art 3-tier strategy that is orchestrated by host CPUs (HMM), over a number of GPU applications with diverse memory access characteristics.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着处理更大数据集的需求增加，GPU 需要更深入地了解其（内存）层次结构，以直接访问只有存储系统 (SSD) 才能容纳的容量。然而，最先进的存储访问机制要么采用在主机 CPU 上运行的软件堆栈作为中介（例如 Dragon、HMM），但众所周知，这种方式性能较差且无法满足 GPU 核心的吞吐量需求；或者通过 NVMe 队列 (BaM) 直接访问 SSD，但这种方式无法从通过将主机内存作为中间层可能实现的较低延迟中获益。本文通过实现由 GPU 内存、主机内存和 SSD 组成的 GPU 协调的 3 层层次结构来介绍 GPU 内存分层 (GMT) 的设计和实现，其中 GPU 协调大部分对带宽/延迟敏感的传输。此外，重要的是，在驱逐时不要盲目地将页面从 GPU 内存传输到主机内存，并且 GMT 采用基于重用预测的实用插入策略来执行酌情页面放置/旁路。在实际平台上的实现和评估表明，在许多具有不同内存访问特性的 GPU 应用程序中，GMT 的性能比最先进的 2 层策略 (BaM) 好 50%，比最先进的由主机 CPU 编排的 3 层策略 (HMM) 好 350% 以上。

papers.title: Going Green for Less Green: Optimizing the Cost of Reducing Cloud Carbon Emissions.
papers.abstract: The continued exponential growth of cloud datacenter capacity has increased awareness of the carbon emissions when executing large compute-intensive workloads. To reduce carbon emissions, cloud users often temporally shift their batch workloads to periods with low carbon intensity. While such time shifting can increase job completion times due to their delayed execution, the cost savings from cloud purchase options, such as reserved instances, also decrease when users operate in a carbon-aware manner. This happens because carbon-aware adjustments change the demand pattern by periodically leaving resources idle, which creates a trade-off between carbon emissions and cost. In this paper, we present GAIA, a carbon-aware scheduler that enables users to address the three-way trade-off between carbon, performance, and cost in cloud-based batch schedulers. Our results quantify the carbon-performance-cost trade-off in cloud platforms and show that compared to existing carbon-aware scheduling policies, our proposed policies can double the amount of carbon savings per percentage increase in cost, while decreasing the performance overhead by 26%.
papers.abstract_zh: 云数据中心容量的持续指数增长提高了人们对执行大型计算密集型工作负载时的碳排放的认识。为了减少碳排放，云用户通常会暂时将批处理工作负载转移到碳强度较低的时期。虽然这种时间转移会由于延迟执行而增加作业完成时间，但当用户以碳意识方式操作时，通过云购买选项（例如保留实例）节省的成本也会减少。发生这种情况是因为碳意识调整通过定期使资源闲置来改变需求模式，从而在碳排放和成本之间进行权衡。在本文中，我们提出了 GAIA，一种碳感知调度程序，使用户能够在基于云的批处理调度程序中解决碳、性能和成本之间的三向权衡。我们的结果量化了云平台中的碳性能成本权衡，并表明与现有的碳感知调度策略相比，我们提出的策略可以使成本每增加一个百分比而节省一倍的碳，同时将性能开销降低 26%。

papers.title: GPU-based Private Information Retrieval for On-Device Machine Learning Inference.
papers.abstract: On-device machine learning (ML) inference can enable the use of private user data on user devices without revealing them to remote servers. However, a pure on-device solution to private ML inference is impractical for many applications that rely on embedding tables that are too large to be stored on-device. In particular, recommendation models typically use multiple embedding tables each on the order of 1--10 GBs of data, making them impractical to store on-device. To overcome this barrier, we propose the use of private information retrieval (PIR) to efficiently and privately retrieve embeddings from servers without sharing any private information. As off-the-shelf PIR algorithms are usually too computationally intensive to directly use for latency-sensitive inference tasks, we 1) propose novel GPU-based acceleration of PIR, and 2) co-design PIR with the downstream ML application to obtain further speedup. Our GPU acceleration strategy improves system throughput by more than 20× over an optimized CPU PIR implementation, and our PIR-ML co-design provides an over 5× additional throughput improvement at fixed model quality. Together, for various on-device ML applications such as recommendation and language modeling, our system on a single V100 GPU can serve up to 100,000 queries per second---a > 100× throughput improvement over a CPU-based baseline---while maintaining model accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 设备上机器学习 (ML) 推理可以在用户设备上使用私有用户数据，而无需将其泄露给远程服务器。然而，对于许多依赖于太大而无法存储在设备上的嵌入表的应用程序来说，针对私有 ML 推理的纯设备上解决方案是不切实际的。特别是，推荐模型通常使用多个嵌入表，每个嵌入表的数据量约为 1--10 GB，这使得它们在设备上存储不切实际。为了克服这一障碍，我们建议使用私有信息检索（PIR）来高效、私密地从服务器检索嵌入，而无需共享任何私有信息。由于现成的 PIR 算法通常计算量太大，无法直接用于延迟敏感的推理任务，因此我们 1) 提出基于 GPU 的新型 PIR 加速，2) 与下游 ML 应用程序共同设计 PIR，以获得进一步的加速。与优化的 CPU PIR 实现相比，我们的 GPU 加速策略将系统吞吐量提高了 20 倍以上，而我们的 PIR-ML 协同设计在固定模型质量下将吞吐量提高了 5 倍以上。总之，对于推荐和语言建模等各种设备上的 ML 应用程序，我们的系统在单个 V100 GPU 上每秒可处理多达 100,000 个查询，与基于 CPU 的基准相比吞吐量提高了 100 倍以上，同时保持模型准确性。

papers.title: Grafu: Unleashing the Full Potential of Future Value Computation for Out-of-core Synchronous Graph Processing.
papers.abstract:
As graphs exponentially grow recently, out-of-core graph systems have been invented to process large-scale graphs by keeping massive data in storage. Among them, many systems process the graphs iteration-by-iteration and provide synchronous semantics that allows easy programmability by forcing the computation dependency of vertex values between iterations. On the other hand, although future value computation is an effective IO optimization for out-of-core graph systems by computing vertex values of future iterations in advance, it is challenging to take full advantage of future value computation while guaranteeing iteration-based dependency. In fact, based on our investigation, even state-of-the-art work along this direction has a wide gap from optimality in IO reduction and further requires substantial overhead in computation as well as extra memory consumption.

This paper presents Grafu, an out-of-core graph system unleashing the full potential of future value computation while providing synchronous semantics. For this goal, three main designs are proposed to optimize future value computation from different perspectives. First, we propose a new elevator execution order to significantly increase the number of future-computed vertices for considerable IO reduction. Second, unlike existing work that uses high-cost barriers to ensure dependency under future value computation, we present conditional barrier to alleviate this computational overhead by adaptively removing the barriers while guaranteeing dependency. Third, we introduce a new graph reordering technique, greedy coloring , to reduce the extra memory consumption required for future value computation. Our evaluation of various billion-scale graphs reveals that Grafu significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
随着图最近呈指数级增长，已经发明了核外图系统，通过在存储中保存大量数据来处理大规模图。其中，许多系统逐次迭代地处理图，并提供同步语义，通过强制迭代之间顶点值的计算依赖性来允许轻松编程。另一方面，虽然未来值计算通过提前计算未来迭代的顶点值，对于核外图系统来说是一种有效的IO优化，但在保证基于迭代的依赖性的同时充分利用未来值计算是具有挑战性的。事实上，根据我们的调查，即使是这个方向上最先进的工作，在 IO 减少方面与最优性也存在很大差距，并且还需要大量的计算开销以及额外的内存消耗。

本文介绍了 Grafu，一个核外图系统，在提供同步语义的同时释放了未来价值计算的全部潜力。为此，提出了三种主要设计，从不同角度优化未来价值计算。首先，我们提出了一个新的电梯执行顺序，以显着增加未来计算的顶点数量，从而显着减少 IO。其次，与使用高成本障碍来确保未来价值计算下的依赖性的现有工作不同，我们提出了条件障碍，通过在保证依赖性的同时自适应地去除障碍来减轻这种计算开销。第三，我们引入了一种新的图重新排序技术，贪婪着色，以减少未来值计算所需的额外内存消耗。我们对各种十亿级图表的评估表明，Grafu 的性能显着优于其他最先进的系统。

papers.title: Greybox Fuzzing for Concurrency Testing.
papers.abstract: Uncovering bugs in concurrent programs is a challenging problem owing to the exponentially large search space of thread interleavings. Past approaches towards concurrency testing are either optimistic --- relying on random sampling of these interleavings --- or pessimistic --- relying on systematic exploration of a reduced (bounded) search space. In this work, we suggest a fresh, pragmatic solution neither focused only on formal, systematic testing, nor solely on unguided sampling or stress-testing approaches. We employ a biased random search which guides exploration towards neighborhoods which will likely expose new behavior. As such it is thematically similar to greybox fuzz testing, which has proven to be an effective technique for finding bugs in sequential programs. To identify new behaviors in the domain of interleavings, we prune and navigate the search space using the "reads-from" relation. Our approach is significantly more efficient at finding bugs per schedule exercised than other state-of-the art concurrency testing tools and approaches. Experiments on widely used concurrency datasets also show that our greybox fuzzing inspired approach gives a strict improvement over a randomized baseline scheduling algorithm in practice via a more uniform exploration of the schedule space. We make our concurrency testing infrastructure "Reads-From Fuzzer" (RFF) available for experimentation and usage by the wider community to aid future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于线程交错的搜索空间呈指数级增长，发现并发程序中的错误是一个具有挑战性的问题。过去的并发测试方法要么是乐观的——依赖于这些交错的随机采样——要么是悲观的——依赖于对缩小的（有界）搜索空间的系统探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖、务实的解决方案，既不只关注正式的系统测试，也不只关注无指导的抽样或压力测试方法。我们采用有偏见的随机搜索来引导探索可能会暴露新行为的社区。因此，它在主题上类似于灰盒模糊测试，灰盒模糊测试已被证明是查找顺序程序中的错误的有效技术。为了识别交错领域中的新行为，我们使用“读取”关系来修剪和导航搜索空间。与其他最先进的并发测试工具和方法相比，我们的方法在按计划查找错误方面要高效得多。对广泛使用的并发数据集的实验还表明，我们的灰盒模糊测试方法通过对调度空间进行更统一的探索，在实践中对随机基线调度算法进行了严格改进。我们使我们的并发测试基础设施“Reads-From Fuzzer”（RFF）可供更广泛的社区进行实验和使用，以帮助未来的研究。

papers.title: GSCore: Efficient Radiance Field Rendering via Architectural Support for 3D Gaussian Splatting.
papers.abstract: This paper presents GSCore, a hardware acceleration unit that efficiently executes the rendering pipeline of 3D Gaussian Splatting with algorithmic optimizations. GSCore builds on the observations from an in-depth analysis of Gaussian-based radiance field rendering to enhance computational efficiency and bring the technique to wide adoption. In doing so, we present several optimization techniques, Gaussian shape-aware intersection test, hierarchical sorting, and subtile skipping, all of which are synergistically integrated with GSCore. We implement the hardware design of GSCore, synthesize it using a commercial 28nm technology, and evaluate the performance across a range of synthetic and real-world scenes with varying image resolutions. Our evaluation results show that GSCore achieves a 15.86× speedup on average over the mobile consumer GPU with a substantially smaller area and lower energy consumption.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 GSCore，这是一种硬件加速单元，可通过算法优化有效地执行 3D 高斯 Splatting 的渲染管道。 GSCore 基于对基于高斯的辐射场渲染的深入分析的观察结果，以提高计算效率并使该技术得到广泛采用。在此过程中，我们提出了几种优化技术、高斯形状感知相交测试、分层排序和小图块跳过，所有这些技术都与 GSCore 协同集成。我们实现了 GSCore 的硬件设计，使用商用 28nm 技术对其进行合成，并评估了一系列具有不同图像分辨率的合成场景和真实场景的性能。我们的评估结果表明，GSCore 比移动消费 GPU 平均加速 15.86 倍，且面积显着缩小，能耗更低。

papers.title: GUST: Graph Edge-Coloring Utilization for Accelerating Sparse Matrix Vector Multiplication.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) plays a vital role in various scientific and engineering fields, from scientific computing to machine learning. Traditional general-purpose processors often fall short of their peak performance with sparse data, leading to the development of domain-specific architectures to enhance SpMV. Yet, these specialized approaches, whether tailored explicitly for SpMV or adapted from matrix-matrix multiplication accelerators, still face challenges in fully utilizing hardware resources as a result of sparsity. To tackle this problem, we introduce GUST, a hardware/software co-design, the key insight of which lies in separating multipliers and adders in the hardware, thereby enabling resource sharing across multiple rows and columns, leading to efficient hardware utilization and ameliorating negative performance impacts from sparsity. Resource sharing, however, can lead to collisions, a problem we address through a specially devised edge-coloring scheduling algorithm. Our comparisons with various prior domain specific architectures using real-world datasets shows the effectiveness of GUST, with an average hardware utilization of 33.67%. We further evaluate GUST by comparing SpMV execution time and energy consumption of length-256 and -87 GUST with length-256 1-dimensional systolic array (1D), achieving an average speedup of 411× and 108×, and energy efficiency improvement of 137× and 148×, respectively. To asses the implementation aspect, we compare resource consumption of GUST with 1D as a baseline through FPGA synthesis. Length-256 GUST uses the same number of arithmetic units as length-256 1D, while length-87 GUST uses considerably less. We also compare GUST with Serpens, a state-of-the-art FPGA-based SpMV accelerator, with GUST achieving lower execution time on seven out of nine matrices and lower energy consumption on four.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 在从科学计算到机器学习的各个科学和工程领域中发挥着至关重要的作用。传统的通用处理器在处理稀疏数据时通常无法达到峰值性能，因此需要开发特定领域的架构来增强 SpMV。然而，这些专门的方法，无论是专门为 SpMV 定制的还是改编自矩阵-矩阵乘法加速器的，由于稀疏性，仍然面临着充分利用硬件资源的挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了GUST，一种硬件/软件协同设计，其关键在于分离硬件中的乘法器和加法器，从而实现多行和多列的资源共享，从而实现高效的硬件利用率并改善稀疏性对性能的负面影响。然而，资源共享可能会导致冲突，我们通过专门设计的边缘着色调度算法解决了这个问题。我们使用真实数据集与各种先前的特定领域架构进行比较，显示了 GUST 的有效性，平均硬件利用率为 33.67%。我们通过将长度为256和-87的GUST与长度为256的一维脉动阵列（1D）的SpMV执行时间和能耗进行比较来进一步评估GUST，分别实现了411×和108×的平均加速比以及137×和148×的能效提升。为了评估实现方面，我们通过 FPGA 综合将 GUST 的资源消耗与 1D 作为基线进行比较。 Length-256 GUST 使用与 length-256 1D 相同数量的算术单元，而 length-87 GUST 使用的算术单元数量要少得多。我们还将 GUST 与 Serpens（一种最先进的基于 FPGA 的 SpMV 加速器）进行比较，GUST 在九个矩阵中的七个上实现了较低的执行时间，并在四个矩阵上实现了较低的能耗。

papers.title: Harnessing the Power of Specialization for Sustainable Computing.
papers.abstract:
Computing is critical to address some of the most pressing needs of humanity today, including climate change mitigation and adaptation. However, it is also the source of a significant and steadily increasing carbon toll, attributed in part to the exponential growth in energy-demanding workloads, such as artificial intelligence (AI). Due to the demise of Dennard scaling, we can no longer count on exponentially-improve energy efficiency of general-purpose processors. Therefore, today's operational efficiency gains rely on specialized hardware.

In this talk I will discuss the promise and the perils of harnessing specialization on the road to sustainable computing.
papers.abstract_zh:
计算对于解决当今人类最紧迫的一些需求至关重要，包括减缓和适应气候变化。然而，它也是碳排放量显着且稳定增加的根源，部分原因是人工智能 (AI) 等能源需求工作负载呈指数级增长。由于登纳德缩放的消亡，我们不能再指望通用处理器的能源效率呈指数级提高。因此，当今运营效率的提高依赖于专用硬件。

在本次演讲中，我将讨论在可持续计算之路上利用专业化的前景和风险。

papers.title: Harp: Leveraging Quasi-Sequential Characteristics to Accelerate Sequence-to-Graph Mapping of Long Reads.
papers.abstract:
Read mapping is a crucial task in computational genomics. Recently, there has been a significant paradigm shift from sequence-to-sequence mapping (S2S) to sequence-to-graph mapping (S2G). The S2G mapping incurs high graph processing overheads and leads to an unnoticed shift of performance hotspots. This presents a substantial challenge to current software implementations and hardware accelerators.

This paper introduces Harp, a novel S2G mapping acceleration system. Harp leverages the structural similarities between genome graphs and sequences, significantly reducing graph processing overhead by exploiting their quasi-sequential characteristic. The Harp accelerator is co-designed with two main algorithmic components: (1) HarpTree, a compact data structure that explicitly reveals the quasi-sequential characteristic, enabling simplifications of graph processing algorithms in S2G mapping, and (2) HarpExt, a multi-stage seed-extension algorithm that mitigates graph operation overhead while maintaining the sight of S2G mapping. Harp achieves an average 140× speedup over the latest S2G mapping software and outperforms the state-of-the-art S2G accelerator by 23.6× while reducing the chip area by 72% in S2G mapping of long reads.
papers.abstract_zh:
读取映射是计算基因组学中的一项关键任务。最近，从序列到序列映射（S2S）到序列到图映射（S2G）发生了重大范式转变。 S2G 映射会产生较高的图形处理开销，并导致性能热点发生未被注意到的变化。这对当前的软件实现和硬件加速器提出了巨大的挑战。

本文介绍了 Harp，一种新颖的 S2G 地图加速系统。 Harp 利用基因组图和序列之间的结构相似性，通过利用其准序列特征显着减少图处理开销。 Harp 加速器与两个主要算法组件共同设计：(1) HarpTree，一种紧凑的数据结构，显式地揭示了准序列特性，可简化 S2G 映射中的图形处理算法；(2) HarpExt，一种多阶段种子扩展算法，可在保持 S2G 映射的可视性的同时减轻图形操作开销。 Harp 比最新的 S2G 映射软件平均加速 140 倍，比最先进的 S2G 加速器高 23.6 倍，同时在长读取的 S2G 映射中将芯片面积减少 72%。

papers.title: Hassert: Hardware Assertion-Based Verification Framework with FPGA Acceleration.
papers.abstract:
Hardware verification is typically the bottleneck of the chip development cycle, mainly due to the time-consuming simulation and debugging process using software simulators. Assertion-Based Verification (ABV) has been widely adopted to provide better visibility into microarchitecture details and automatically detect unexpected behaviors. While ABV significantly improves verification efficiency, checking assertions using software simulators requires extremely long times for large benchmarks. Prototyping designs on an FPGA is a potential alternative to verify hardware, but it lacks fine-grained debugging capabilities for when errors occur.

To address these challenges, we present Hassert, an efficient ABV framework that combines high-performance verification on FPGAs with fine-grained debugging in software. Hassert automates the scheduling and mapping of SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) to the available FPGA fabric with the design-under-test (DUT), allowing for extensive hardware testing. Hassert also enables dynamic switching between different assertions, either user-specified or based on SVA coverage satisfaction, by partially reconfiguring the FPGA at runtime, eliminating the need to recompile the DUT.

To further improve debugging efficiency, we also propose a microarchitecture-guided hardware snapshot scheme. If any assertion is fired, Hassert automatically generates snapshots of the current status of the entire FPGA hardware. These snapshots are then transferred to an external simulator, where the operation is reconstructed in software for further debugging. We demonstrate that these contributions can improve significant verification efficiency over traditional software simulation-based approaches for various hardware benchmarks and RISC-V processor designs whilst maintaining full visibility and debugging capabilities at the cost of only a small area overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
硬件验证通常是芯片开发周期的瓶颈，主要是由于使用软件模拟器进行耗时的模拟和调试过程。基于断言的验证 (ABV) 已被广泛采用，以提供对微架构细节的更好可见性并自动检测意外行为。虽然 ABV 显着提高了验证效率，但使用软件模拟器检查断言对于大型基准测试来说需要极长的时间。 FPGA 上的原型设计是验证硬件的潜在替代方案，但它缺乏针对发生错误时的细粒度调试功能。

为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 Hassert，这是一种高效的 ABV 框架，它将 FPGA 上的高性能验证与软件中的细粒度调试相结合。 Hassert 通过被测设计 (DUT) 自动调度和映射 SystemVerilog 断言 (SVA) 到可用的 FPGA 结构，从而允许进行广泛的硬件测试。 Hassert 还可以通过在运行时部分重新配置 FPGA，实现不同断言之间的动态切换（用户指定或基于 SVA 覆盖满意度），从而无需重新编译 DUT。

为了进一步提高调试效率，我们还提出了微架构引导的硬件快照方案。如果触发任何断言，Hassert 会自动生成整个 FPGA 硬件当前状态的快照。然后，这些快照被传输到外部模拟器，在软件中重建操作以进行进一步调试。我们证明，与传统的基于软件模拟的方法相比，这些贡献可以显着提高各种硬件基准和 RISC-V 处理器设计的验证效率，同时仅以很小的面积开销为代价保持完整的可见性和调试功能。

papers.title: Hector: An Efficient Programming and Compilation Framework for Implementing Relational Graph Neural Networks in GPU Architectures.
papers.abstract: Relational graph neural networks (RGNNs) are graph neural networks with dedicated structures for modeling the different types of nodes and edges in heterogeneous graphs. While RGNNs have been increasingly adopted in many real-world applications due to their versatility and accuracy, they pose performance and system design challenges: inherent memory-intensive computation patterns, the gap between the programming interface and kernel APIs, and heavy programming effort required to optimize kernels caused by their coupling with data layout and heterogeneity. To systematically address these challenges, we propose Hector, a novel two-level intermediate representation and its code generator framework that (a) captures the key properties of RGNN models, and opportunities to reduce memory accesses in inter-operator scheduling and materialization, (b) generates code with flexible data access schemes to eliminate redundant data copies, and (c) decouples model semantics, data layout, and operators-specific optimizations from each other to reduce programming effort. By building on one general matrix multiply (GEMM) template and a node/edge traversal template, Hector achieves up to 9.9× speed-up in inference and 43.7× speed-up in training compared with the state-of-the-art public systems on select models, RGCN, RGAT and HGT, when running heterogeneous graphs provided by Deep Graph Library (DGL) and Open Graph Benchmark (OGB). In addition, Hector does not trigger any out-of-memory (OOM) exception in these tests. We also propose linear operator reordering and compact materialization to further accelerate the system by up to 3.8×. As an indicator of the reduction of programming effort, Hector takes in 51 lines of code expressing the three models and generates a total of 8K lines of CUDA and C++ code. Through profiling, we found that higher memory efficiency allows Hector to accommodate larger input and therefore attain higher throughput in forward propagation, while backward propagation is bound by latency introduced by atomic updates and outer products.
papers.abstract_zh: 关系图神经网络（RGNN）是具有专用结构的图神经网络，用于对异构图中不同类型的节点和边进行建模。虽然 RGNN 由于其多功能性和准确性而在许多实际应用中得到越来越多的采用，但它们也带来了性能和系统设计挑战：固有的内存密集型计算模式、编程接口和内核 API 之间的差距，以及由于与数据布局和异构性的耦合而导致优化内核所需的大量编程工作。为了系统地解决这些挑战，我们提出了 Hector，一种新颖的两级中间表示及其代码生成器框架，该框架（a）捕获 RGNN 模型的关键属性，以及减少操作员间调度和物化中内存访问的机会，（b）使用灵活的数据访问方案生成代码以消除冗余数据副本，以及（c）将模型语义、数据布局和特定于操作员的优化相互解耦以减少编程工作。通过建立在一个通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM) 模板和一个节点/边遍历模板的基础上，在运行深度图库 (DGL) 和开放图基准 (OGB) 提供的异构图时，与选定模型 RGCN、RGAT 和 HGT 上最先进的公共系统相比，Hector 的推理速度提高了 9.9 倍，训练速度提高了 43.7 倍。此外，Hector 在这些测试中没有触发任何内存不足 (OOM) 异常。我们还提出线性算子重排序和紧凑物化，以进一步将系统加速高达 3.8 倍。作为减少编程工作量的一个指标，Hector 使用了 51 行代码来表达这三个模型，并生成了总共 8K 行 CUDA 和 C++ 代码。通过分析，我们发现更高的内存效率允许 Hector 容纳更大的输入，从而在前向传播中获得更高的吞吐量，而后向传播则受到原子更新和外部产品引入的延迟的限制。

papers.title: Heet: Accelerating Elastic Training in Heterogeneous Deep Learning Clusters.
papers.abstract:
Modern GPU clusters inherently exhibit heterogeneity, encompassing various aspects such as computation and communication. This heterogeneity poses a significant challenge for the elastic scheduling of deep learning workloads. Unfortunately, existing elastic schedulers often overlook the impact of heterogeneity on scaling efficiency , resulting in considerably prolonged job completion times.

In this paper, we present Heet, a new Heterogeneity-aware system explicitly developed for elastic training in DL clusters. Heet addresses two critical issues. First, it utilizes a 3-D collaborative filtering method to accurately measure the scaling efficiency of all elastic configurations on heterogeneous hosts, substantially reducing profiling overhead. Second, Heet introduces a unique price function to effectively balance scaling efficiency and scheduling efficiency. Building upon this function, Heet incorporates a scalable mechanism that employs minimum-weight full bipartite matching and opportunistic resource trading to generate dynamic scheduling decisions. Evaluations conducted on cloud clusters and large-scale simulations demonstrate that Heet can reduce job completion time by up to 2.46× compared to existing solutions.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代 GPU 集群本质上表现出异构性，涵盖计算和通信等各个方面。这种异构性对深度学习工作负载的弹性调度提出了重大挑战。不幸的是，现有的弹性调度程序经常忽视异构性对扩展效率的影响，导致作业完成时间大大延长。

在本文中，我们提出了 Heet，这是一种专门为深度学习集群中的弹性训练而开发的新的异构感知系统。 Heet 解决了两个关键问题。首先，它利用3D协同过滤方法来准确测量异构主机上所有弹性配置的扩展效率，从而大大减少分析开销。其次，Heet引入了独特的价格函数，有效平衡扩展效率和调度效率。在此功能的基础上，Heet 结合了一种可扩展的机制，该机制采用最小权重完全二方匹配和机会资源交易来生成动态调度决策。对云集群和大规模模拟进行的评估表明，与现有解决方案相比，Heet 可以将作业完成时间缩短高达 2.46 倍。

papers.title: HIDA: A Hierarchical Dataflow Compiler for High-Level Synthesis.
papers.abstract: Dataflow architectures are growing in popularity due to their potential to mitigate the challenges posed by the memory wall inherent to the Von Neumann architecture. At the same time, high-level synthesis (HLS) has demonstrated its efficacy as a design methodology for generating efficient dataflow architectures within a short development cycle. However, existing HLS tools rely on developers to explore the vast dataflow design space, ultimately leading to suboptimal designs. This phenomenon is especially concerning as the size of the HLS design grows. To tackle these challenges, we introduce HIDA 1 , a new scalable and hierarchical HLS framework that can systematically convert an algorithmic description into a dataflow implementation on hardware. We first propose a collection of efficient and versatile dataflow representations for modeling the hierarchical dataflow structure. Capitalizing on these representations, we develop an automated optimizer that decomposes the dataflow optimization problem into multiple levels based on the inherent dataflow hierarchy. Using FPGAs as an evaluation platform, working with a set of neural networks modeled in PyTorch, HIDA achieves up to 8.54× higher throughput compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) HLS optimization tool. Furthermore, despite being fully automated and able to handle various applications, HIDA achieves 1.29× higher throughput over the SOTA RTL-based neural network accelerators on an FPGA.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据流架构越来越受欢迎，因为它们有可能减轻冯·诺依曼架构固有的内存墙带来的挑战。与此同时，高级综合（HLS）已经证明了其作为一种设计方法的功效，可以在较短的开发周期内生成高效的数据流架构。然而，现有的 HLS 工具依赖开发人员探索广阔的数据流设计空间，最终导致设计不理想。随着 HLS 设计规模的增大，这种现象尤其令人担忧。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 HIDA 1，这是一种新的可扩展的分层 HLS 框架，可以系统地将算法描述转换为硬件上的数据流实现。我们首先提出了一组高效且通用的数据流表示形式，用于对分层数据流结构进行建模。利用这些表示，我们开发了一个自动优化器，它根据固有的数据流层次结构将数据流优化问题分解为多个级别。 HIDA 使用 FPGA 作为评估平台，与 PyTorch 中建模的一组神经网络配合使用，与最先进的 (SOTA) HLS 优化工具相比，吞吐量提高了 8.54 倍。此外，尽管 HIDA 是完全自动化的并且能够处理各种应用，但其吞吐量比 FPGA 上基于 SOTA RTL 的神经网络加速器高出 1.29 倍。

papers.title: Hydride: A Retargetable and Extensible Synthesis-based Compiler for Modern Hardware Architectures.
papers.abstract: As modern hardware architectures evolve to support increasingly diverse, complex instruction sets for meeting the performance demands of modern workloads in image processing, deep learning, etc., it has become ever more crucial for compilers to provide robust support for evolution of their internal abstractions and retargetable code generation support to keep pace with emerging instruction sets. We propose Hydride, a novel approach to compiling for complex, emerging hardware architectures. Hydride uses vendor-defined pseudocode specifications of multiple hardware ISAs to automatically design retargetable instructions for AutoLLVM IR , an extensible compiler IR which consists of (formally defined) language-independent and target-independent LLVM IR instructions to compile to those ISAs, and automatically generated instruction selection passes to lower AutoLLVM IR to each of the specified hardware ISAs. Hydride also includes a code synthesizer that automatically generates code generation support for schedule-based languages, such as Halide, to optimally generate AutoLLVM IR. Our results show that Hydride is able to represent 3,557 instructions combined in x86, Hexagon, ARM architectures using only 397 AutoLLVM IR instructions, including (Intel) SSE2, SSE4, AVX, AVX2, AVX512, (Qualcomm) Hexagon HVX, and (ARM) NEON vector ISAs. We created a new Halide compiler with Hydride using only a formal semantics of Halide IR, leveraging the auto-generated AutoLLVM IR and back-ends for the three hardware architectures. Across kernels from deep learning and image processing, this compiler is able to perform just as well as the mature, production Halide compiler on Hexagon, and outperform on x86 by 8% and ARM by 3%. Hydride also outperforms the production Halide's LLVM back end by 12% on x86, 100% on HVX, and 26% on ARM across the same kernels.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着现代硬件架构不断发展以支持日益多样化、复杂的指令集，以满足图像处理、深度学习等现代工作负载的性能需求，编译器为其内部抽象的发展提供强大的支持以及可重定向代码生成支持以跟上新兴指令集的步伐变得越来越重要。我们提出了 Hydride，这是一种针对复杂的新兴硬件架构进行编译的新颖方法。 Hydride 使用多个硬件 ISA 的供应商定义的伪代码规范来自动设计 AutoLLVM IR 的可重定向指令，AutoLLVM IR 是一个可扩展编译器 IR，由（正式定义的）语言无关和目标无关的 LLVM IR 指令组成，用于编译为这些 ISA，并自动生成指令选择传递以将 AutoLLVM IR 降低到每个指定的硬件 ISA。 Hydride 还包括一个代码合成器，可以自动为基于调度的语言（例如 Halide）生成代码生成支持，以最佳地生成 AutoLLVM IR。我们的结果表明，Hydride 仅使用 397 个 AutoLLVM IR 指令即可表示 x86、Hexagon、ARM 架构中组合的 3,557 条指令，包括（Intel）SSE2、SSE4、AVX、AVX2、AVX512、（Qualcomm）Hexagon HVX 和（ARM）NEON 矢量 ISA。我们仅使用 Halide IR 的形式语义，利用 Hydride 创建了一个新的 Halide 编译器，利用自动生成的 AutoLLVM IR 和三种硬件架构的后端。在深度学习和图像处理等内核中，该编译器的性能与 Hexagon 上成熟的 Halide 编译器一样好，并且在 x86 上的性能优于 8%，在 ARM 上的性能优于 3%。在相同内核上，Hydride 在 x86 上比量产版 Halide 的 LLVM 后端性能高出 12%，在 HVX 上高出 100%，在 ARM 上高出 26%。

papers.title: IANUS: Integrated Accelerator based on NPU-PIM Unified Memory System.
papers.abstract: Accelerating end-to-end inference of transformer-based large language models (LLMs) is a critical component of AI services in datacenters. However, the diverse compute characteristics of LLMs' end-to-end inference present challenges as previously proposed accelerators only address certain operations or stages (e.g., self-attention, generation stage, etc.). To address the unique challenges of accelerating end-to-end inference, we propose IANUS - Integrated Accelerator based on NPU-PIM Unified Memory System. IANUS is a domain-specific system architecture that combines a Neural Processing Unit (NPU) with a Processing-in-Memory (PIM) to leverage both the NPU's high computation throughput and the PIM's high effective memory bandwidth. In particular, IANUS employs a unified main memory system where the PIM memory is used both for PIM operations and for NPU's main memory. The unified main memory system ensures that memory capacity is efficiently utilized and the movement of shared data between NPU and PIM is minimized. However, it introduces new challenges since normal memory accesses and PIM computations cannot be performed simultaneously. Thus, we propose novel PIM Access Scheduling that manages not only the scheduling of normal memory accesses and PIM computations but also workload mapping across the PIM and the NPU. Our detailed simulation evaluations show that IANUS improves the performance of GPT-2 by 6.2× and 3.2×, on average, compared to the NVIDIA A100 GPU and the state-of-the-art accelerator. As a proof-of-concept, we develop a prototype of IANUS with a commercial PIM, NPU, and an FPGA-based PIM controller to demonstrate the feasibility of IANUS.
papers.abstract_zh: 加速基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的端到端推理是数据中心人工智能服务的关键组成部分。然而，法学硕士端到端推理的多样化计算特征提出了挑战，因为之前提出的加速器仅解决某些操作或阶段（例如，自注意力、生成阶段等）。为了解决加速端到端推理的独特挑战，我们提出了 IANUS - 基于 NPU-PIM 统一内存系统的集成加速器。 IANUS 是一种特定于域的系统架构，它将神经处理单元 (NPU) 与内存处理 (PIM) 相结合，以利用 NPU 的高计算吞吐量和 PIM 的高效内存带宽。特别是，IANUS 采用统一的主存储器系统，其中 PIM 存储器既用于 PIM 操作，又用于 NPU 的主存储器。统一的主内存系统确保内存容量得到有效利用，并最大限度地减少 NPU 和 PIM 之间共享数据的移动。然而，它带来了新的挑战，因为正常的内存访问和 PIM 计算不能同时执行。因此，我们提出了新颖的 PIM 访问调度，它不仅管理正常内存访问和 PIM 计算的调度，还管理 PIM 和 NPU 之间的工作负载映射。我们详细的模拟评估表明，与 NVIDIA A100 GPU 和最先进的加速器相比，IANUS 将 GPT-2 的性能平均提高了 6.2 倍和 3.2 倍。作为概念验证，我们开发了带有商用 PIM、NPU 和基于 FPGA 的 PIM 控制器的 IANUS 原型，以证明 IANUS 的可行性。

papers.title: In-Storage Domain-Specific Acceleration for Serverless Computing.
papers.abstract: While (I) serverless computing is emerging as a popular form of cloud execution, datacenters are going through major changes: (II) storage dissaggregation in the system infrastructure level and (III) integration of domain-specific accelerators in the hardware level. Each of these three trends individually provide significant benefits; however, when combined the benefits diminish. On the convergence of these trends, the paper makes the observation that for serverless functions, the overhead of accessing dissaggregated storage overshadows the gains from accelerators. Therefore, to benefit from all these trends in conjunction, we propose In-Storage Domain-Specific Acceleration for Serverless Computing (dubbed DSCS-Serverless 1 ). The idea contributes a server-less model that utilizes a programmable accelerator embedded within computational storage to unlock the potential of acceleration in disaggregated datacenters. Our results with eight applications show that integrating a comparatively small accelerator within the storage (DSCS-Serverless) that fits within the storage's power constraints (25 Watts), significantly outperforms a traditional disaggregated system that utilizes NVIDIA RTX 2080 Ti GPU (250 Watts). Further, the work highlights that disaggregation, serverless model, and the limited power budget for computation in storage device require a different design than the conventional practices of integrating microprocessors and FPGAs. This insight is in contrast with current practices of designing computational storage devices that are yet to address the challenges associated with the shifts in datacenters. In comparison with two such conventional designs that use ARM cores or a Xilinx FPGA, DSCS-Serverless provides 3.7× and 1.7× end-to-end application speedup, 4.3× and 1.9× energy reduction, and 3.2× and 2.3× better cost efficiency, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然 (I) 无服务器计算正在成为一种流行的云执行形式，但数据中心正在经历重大变化：(II) 系统基础设施级别的存储分解和 (III) 硬件级别的特定领域加速器的集成。这三种趋势中的每一种都带来了显着的好处；然而，当两者结合起来时，好处就会减弱。在这些趋势的融合上，本文观察到，对于无服务器功能，访问分解存储的开销掩盖了加速器带来的收益。因此，为了从所有这些趋势中受益，我们提出了针对无服务器计算的存储域特定加速（称为 DSCS-Serverless 1）。这个想法提供了一种无服务器模型，利用嵌入计算存储中的可编程加速器来释放分解数据中心的加速潜力。我们对八个应用程序的结果表明，在符合存储功率限制（25 瓦）的存储中集成相对较小的加速器（DSCS-Serverless），其性能显着优于使用 NVIDIA RTX 2080 Ti GPU（250 瓦）的传统分解系统。此外，该工作还强调，分解、无服务器模型以及存储设备中计算的有限功率预算需要与集成微处理器和 FPGA 的传统实践不同的设计。这种见解与当前设计计算存储设备的实践形成鲜明对比，这些实践尚未解决与数据中心转变相关的挑战。与使用 ARM 内核或 Xilinx FPGA 的两种传统设计相比，DSCS-Serverless 分别提供了 3.7 倍和 1.7 倍的端到端应用加速、4.3 倍和 1.9 倍的能耗降低以及 3.2 倍和 2.3 倍的成本效率。

papers.title: JUNO: Optimizing High-Dimensional Approximate Nearest Neighbour Search with Sparsity-Aware Algorithm and Ray-Tracing Core Mapping.
papers.abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) search is a widely applied technique in modern intelligent applications, such as recommendation systems and vector databases. Therefore, efficient and high-throughput execution of ANN search has become increasingly important. In this paper, we first characterize the state-of-the-art product quantization-based method of ANN search and identify a significant source of inefficiency in the form of unnecessary pairwise distance calculations and accumulations. To improve efficiency, we propose Juno, an end-to-end ANN search system that adopts a carefully designed sparsity- and locality-aware search algorithm. We also present an efficient hardware mapping that utilizes ray tracing cores in modern GPUs with pipelined execution on tensor cores to execute our sparsity-aware ANN search algorithm. Our evaluations on four datasets from 1 to 100 million search points demonstrate 2.2×-8.5× improvements in search throughput. Moreover, our algorithmic enhancements alone achieve a maximal 2.6× improvement on the hardware without the acceleration of the RT core.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻（ANN）搜索是现代智能应用中广泛应用的技术，例如推荐系统和向量数据库。因此，高效、高通量执行 ANN 搜索变得越来越重要。在本文中，我们首先描述了最先进的基于乘积量化的 ANN 搜索方法，并以不必要的成对距离计算和累积的形式确定了效率低下的一个重要根源。为了提高效率，我们提出了 Juno，一种端到端的 ANN 搜索系统，采用精心设计的稀疏性和局部性感知搜索算法。我们还提出了一种高效的硬件映射，它利用现代 GPU 中的光线追踪核心以及张量核心上的流水线执行来执行我们的稀疏感知 ANN 搜索算法。我们对 1 到 1 亿搜索点的四个数据集的评估表明，搜索吞吐量提高了 2.2×-8.5×。此外，仅我们的算法增强就在没有 RT 核心加速的情况下实现了硬件上最大 2.6 倍的提升。

papers.title: Kaleidoscope: Precise Invariant-Guided Pointer Analysis.
papers.abstract: Pointer analysis techniques are crucial for many software security mitigation approaches. However, these techniques suffer from imprecision; hence, the reported points-to sets are a superset of the actual points-to sets that can possibly form during program execution. To improve the precision of pointer analysis techniques, we propose Kaleidoscope. By using an invariant-guided optimistic (IGO) pointer analysis approach, Kaleidoscope makes optimistic assumptions during the pointer analysis that it later validates at runtime. If these optimistic assumptions do not hold true at runtime, Kaleidoscope falls back to an imprecise baseline analysis, thus preserving soundness. We show that Kaleidoscope reduces the average points-to set size by 13.15× across a set of 9 applications over the current state-of-the-art pointer analysis framework. Furthermore, we demonstrate how Kaleidoscope can implement control flow integrity (CFI) to increase the security of traditional CFI policies.
papers.abstract_zh: 指针分析技术对于许多软件安全缓解方法至关重要。然而，这些技术存在不精确性。因此，报告的点集是程序执行期间可能形成的实际点集的超集。为了提高指针分析技术的精度，我们提出了万花筒。通过使用不变引导乐观 (IGO) 指针分析方法，Kaleidscope 在指针分析过程中做出乐观假设，并在运行时进行验证。如果这些乐观的假设在运行时不成立，万花筒就会退回到不精确的基线分析，从而保持稳健性。我们表明，与当前最先进的指针分析框架相比，Kaleidscope 将 9 个应用程序的平均点集大小减少了 13.15 倍。此外，我们还演示了 Kaleidscope 如何实现控制流完整性 (CFI) 以提高传统 CFI 策略的安全性。

papers.title: Kimbap: A Node-Property Map System for Distributed Graph Analytics.
papers.abstract:
Most distributed graph analytics systems such as Gemini, Gluon, and SympleGraph support a computational model in which node properties are updated iteratively using properties of adjacent neighbors of those nodes. However, there are many algorithms that cannot be expressed in this model, such as the Louvain algorithm for community detection and the Shiloach-Vishkin algorithm for connected components. These algorithms may be more efficient or may produce better quality output than simpler algorithms that can be expressed using updates only from adjacent vertices.

This paper describes Kimbap, a distributed graph analytics programming framework, and its high-performance implementation that addresses this problem. Kimbap supports general vertex-centric algorithms by permitting the computation at a node to read and write properties of any node in the graph, not just its adjacent neighbors. The programming model allows programmers to specify iterative graph analytics applications, while the Kimbap compiler automatically generates the required communication code, and the Kimbap runtime organizes and synchronizes node-property pairs across the distributed-memory machines. The underlying system uses a distributed node-property map that is optimized for highly concurrent sparse reductions by using a graph-partition-aware sparse representation and by avoiding thread conflicts, thereby eliminating a major bottleneck that throttles performance in systems like Pregel that also support general vertex programs. Our experiments on CPU clusters with up to 256 machines (roughly 12000 threads total) show that (1) Louvain clustering algorithm in Kimbap is on average 4× faster than the state-of-the-art hand-optimized implementation for the same algorithm and (2) Kimbap matches or outperforms the state-of-the-art distributed graph analytics system for algorithms that can be expressed in both systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
大多数分布式图分析系统（例如 Gemini、Gluon 和 SympleGraph）都支持计算模型，其中使用这些节点的相邻邻居的属性来迭代更新节点属性。然而，有许多算法无法在此模型中表达，例如用于社区检测的Louvain算法和用于连通组件的Shiloach-Vishkin算法。与仅使用来自相邻顶点的更新来表达的更简单的算法相比，这些算法可能更高效或者可以产生更好质量的输出。

本文介绍了 Kimbap（一种分布式图形分析编程框架）及其解决此问题的高性能实现。 Kimbap 支持一般的以顶点为中心的算法，允许节点处的计算读取和写入图中任何节点的属性，而不仅仅是其相邻节点的属性。该编程模型允许程序员指定迭代图分析应用程序，而 Kimbap 编译器会自动生成所需的通信代码，而 Kimbap 运行时则在分布式内存机器上组织和同步节点属性对。底层系统使用分布式节点属性映射，该映射通过使用图分区感知稀疏表示并避免线程冲突，针对高度并发的稀疏缩减进行了优化，从而消除了限制像 Pregel 这样也支持通用顶点程序的系统性能的主要瓶颈。我们在最多 256 台机器（总共大约 12000 个线程）的 CPU 集群上进行的实验表明，(1) Kimbap 中的 Louvain 聚类算法平均比同一算法的最先进的手动优化实现快 4 倍，并且 (2) 对于可以在两个系统中表达的算法，Kimbap 匹配或优于最先进的分布式图分析系统。

papers.title: Last-Level Cache Side-Channel Attacks Are Feasible in the Modern Public Cloud.
papers.abstract:
Last-level cache side-channel attacks have been mostly demonstrated in highly-controlled, quiescent local environments. Hence, it is unclear whether such attacks are feasible in a production cloud environment. In the cloud, side channels are flooded with noise from activities of other tenants and, in Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) workloads, the attacker has a very limited time window to mount the attack.

In this paper, we show that such attacks are feasible in practice, although they require new techniques. We present an end-to-end, cross-tenant attack on a vulnerable ECDSA implementation in the public FaaS Google Cloud Run environment. We introduce several new techniques to improve every step of the attack. First, to speed-up the generation of eviction sets, we introduce L2-driven candidate address filtering and a Binary Search-based algorithm for address pruning. Second, to monitor victim memory accesses with high time resolution, we introduce Parallel Probing. Finally, we leverage power spectral density from signal processing to easily identify the victim's target cache set in the frequency domain. Overall, using these mechanisms, we extract a median value of 81% of the secret ECDSA nonce bits from a victim container in 19 seconds on average.
papers.abstract_zh:
最后一级缓存侧通道攻击主要在高度受控的静态本地环境中进行演示。因此，尚不清楚此类攻击在生产云环境中是否可行。在云中，侧通道充斥着来自其他租户活动的噪音，并且在功能即服务 (FaaS) 工作负载中，攻击者发起攻击的时间窗口非常有限。

在本文中，我们证明此类攻击在实践中是可行的，尽管它们需要新技术。我们对公共 FaaS Google Cloud Run 环境中易受攻击的 ECDSA 实施进行了端到端的跨租户攻击。我们引入了几种新技术来改进攻击的每一步。首先，为了加速驱逐集的生成，我们引入了 L2 驱动的候选地址过滤和基于二分搜索的地址修剪算法。其次，为了以高时间分辨率监视受害者内存访问，我们引入了并行探测。最后，我们利用信号处理中的功率谱密度来轻松识别频域中受害者的目标缓存集。总体而言，使用这些机制，我们平均在 19 秒内从受害者容器中提取了 81% 的秘密 ECDSA 随机数位的中值。

papers.title: LazyBarrier: Reconstructing Android IO Stack for Barrier-Enabled Flash Storage.
papers.abstract: Costly synchronous write---a.k.a., fsync()---is a common approach to preserve the storage order of data. Android smart-phones use No-Barrier by default to improve fsync() performance. Recently, Barrier-Enabled IO Stack (BEIOS) provides an efficient order-preserving method for flash storage by barrier write commands (BWCs). However, our evaluation shows that BEIOS suffers from performance degradation in multi-threaded scenarios since BWCs increase linearly with the number of threads. This paper proposes LazyBarrier, a new order-preserving IO stack mainly involving order-preserving write (OPW) Model, the Lazy Issue algorithm, modified F2FS, and Barrier Scheduling. OPW Model is based on Finite Automata and defines state transition in OPW. Lazy Issue is a novel algorithm that minimizes BWCs. F2FS is modified to support OPW, and Barrier Scheduling solves the ordering problem in multi-queue block layer. The experiments on Android smartphones show that, compared with BEIOS, LazyBarrier improves OPW performance by 73% and 29% under the FIO benchmark and in real applications respectively. And LazyBarrier also outperforms BEIOS by 19% in dbench workload in servers.
papers.abstract_zh: 成本高昂的同步写入（又名 fsync()）是保留数据存储顺序的常见方法。 Android 智能手机默认使用 No-Barrier 来提高 fsync() 性能。最近，Barrier-Enabled IO Stack (BEIOS) 通过屏障写入命令 (BWC) 为闪存存储提供了一种高效的保序方法。然而，我们的评估表明，BEIOS 在多线程场景中会遇到性能下降的问题，因为 BWC 随线程数量线性增加。本文提出了LazyBarrier，一种新的保序IO堆栈，主要涉及保序写入（OPW）模型、Lazy Issue算法、改进的F2FS和Barrier Scheduling。 OPW模型基于有限自动机，定义了OPW中的状态转换。 Lazy Issue 是一种最小化 BWC 的新颖算法。 F2FS被修改为支持OPW，Barrier Scheduling解决了多队列块层的排序问题。在Android智能手机上的实验表明，与BEIOS相比，LazyBarrier在FIO基准下和实际应用中分别提高了OPW性能73%和29%。 LazyBarrier 在服务器中的 dbench 工作负载方面也比 BEIOS 高出 19%。

papers.title: LazyDP: Co-Designing Algorithm-Software for Scalable Training of Differentially Private Recommendation Models.
papers.abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is widely being employed in the industry as a practical standard for privacy protection. While private training of computer vision or natural language processing applications has been studied extensively, the computational challenges of training of recommender systems (RecSys) with DP have not been explored. In this work, we first present our detailed characterization of private RecSys training using DP-SGD, root-causing its several performance bottlenecks. Specifically, we identify DP-SGD's noise sampling and noisy gradient update stage to suffer from a severe compute and memory bandwidth limitation, respectively, causing significant performance overhead in training private RecSys. Based on these findings, we propose LazyDP, an algorithm-software co-design that addresses the compute and memory challenges of training RecSys with DP-SGD. Compared to a state-of-the-art DP-SGD training system, we demonstrate that LazyDP provides an average 119× training throughput improvement while also ensuring mathematically equivalent, differentially private RecSys models to be trained.
papers.abstract_zh: 差分隐私（DP）作为隐私保护的实用标准在业界得到广泛应用。虽然计算机视觉或自然语言处理应用程序的私人培训已被广泛研究，但尚未探讨使用 DP 培训推荐系统 (RecSys) 的计算挑战。在这项工作中，我们首先介绍了使用 DP-SGD 进行私有 RecSys 训练的详细特征，从根本上导致了其几个性能瓶颈。具体来说，我们发现 DP-SGD 的噪声采样和噪声梯度更新阶段分别受到严重的计算和内存带宽限制，导致训练私有 RecSys 时产生显着的性能开销。基于这些发现，我们提出了 LazyDP，这是一种算法软件协同设计，可解决使用 DP-SGD 训练 RecSys 时的计算和内存挑战。与最先进的 DP-SGD 训练系统相比，我们证明 LazyDP 提供平均 119 倍的训练吞吐量改进，同时还确保训练数学上等效的、差分私有的 RecSys 模型。

papers.title: Lifting Micro-Update Models from RTL for Formal Security Analysis.
papers.abstract:
Hardware execution attacks exploit subtle microarchitectural interactions to leak secret data. While checking programs for the existence of such attacks is essential, verification of software against the full hardware implementation does not scale. Verification using abstract formal models of the hardware can help provide strong security guarantees while leveraging abstraction to achieve scalability. However, handwriting accurate abstract models is tedious and error-prone. Hence, we need techniques to generate models that enable sound yet scalable security analysis automatically.

In this work, we propose micro-update models as a modelling framework that enables sound and abstract modelling of microarchitectural features. We also develop algorithms to generate micro-update models from RTL semi-automatically. We implement our modelling and generation framework in a prototype tool called PAUL. We evaluate our approach by synthesizing micro-update models for the Sodor5Stage processor and components from the cva6 (Ariane) processor. We demonstrate how these models can be generated hierarchically, thus increasing scalability to larger designs. We observe up to 8× improvement in run time when performing analysis with the generated models as compared to the source RTL.
papers.abstract_zh:
硬件执行攻击利用微妙的微架构交互来泄露秘密数据。虽然检查程序是否存在此类攻击至关重要，但针对完整硬件实现的软件验证却无法扩展。使用硬件的抽象形式模型进行验证可以帮助提供强大的安全保证，同时利用抽象来实现可扩展性。然而，手写准确的抽象模型是乏味且容易出错的。因此，我们需要技术来生成能够自动实现健全且可扩展的安全分析的模型。

在这项工作中，我们提出微更新模型作为建模框架，可以对微架构特征进行合理且抽象的建模。我们还开发了从 RTL 半自动生成微更新模型的算法。我们在名为 PAUL 的原型工具中实现了我们的建模和生成框架。我们通过综合 Sodor5Stage 处理器的微更新模型和 cva6 (Ariane) 处理器的组件来评估我们的方法。我们演示了如何分层生成这些模型，从而提高更大设计的可扩展性。与源 RTL 相比，我们观察到使用生成的模型执行分析时运行时间提高了 8 倍。

papers.title: Lightweight Fault Isolation: Practical, Efficient, and Secure Software Sandboxing.
papers.abstract: Software-based fault isolation (SFI) is a longstanding technique that allows isolation of one or more processes from each other with minimal or no use of hardware protection mechanisms. The demand for SFI systems has been increasing due to the advent of cloud and serverless computing, which require systems to run untrusted code with low latency and low context switch times. SFI systems must optimize for a combination of performance, trusted code base (TCB) size, scalability, and implementation complexity. With the rise of ARM64 in both cloud and personal computers, we revisit classic SFI in the context of ARM64 and present a new multi-sandbox SFI scheme that is practical to implement, efficient, and maintains a small TCB. Our technique, called Lightweight Fault Isolation (LFI), supports tens of thousands of 4GiB sandboxes in a single address space and does full software isolation of loads, stores, and jumps with a runtime overhead of 7% on the compatible subset of the SPEC 2017 benchmark suite. In addition to providing low runtime and code size overheads compared to existing multi-sandbox systems, LFI is implemented independently of existing compiler toolchains, has a small static verifier to reduce TCB size, is hardened against basic Spectre attacks, and has broad software support, including for language mechanisms like exceptions and ISA features such as SIMD.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于软件的故障隔离 (SFI) 是一项长期存在的技术，它允许在最少或不使用硬件保护机制的情况下将一个或多个进程彼此隔离。由于云和无服务器计算的出现，对 SFI 系统的需求不断增加，这要求系统以低延迟和低上下文切换时间运行不受信任的代码。 SFI 系统必须针对性能、可信代码库 (TCB) 大小、可扩展性和实现复杂性的组合进行优化。随着 ARM64 在云和个人计算机中的兴起，我们在 ARM64 的背景下重新审视经典的 SFI，并提出一种新的多沙箱 SFI 方案，该方案易于实现、高效且维护较小的 TCB。我们的技术称为轻量级故障隔离 (LFI)，在单个地址空间中支持数万个 4GiB 沙箱，并对加载、存储和跳转进行完全软件隔离，在 SPEC 2017 基准套件的兼容子集上运行时开销为 7%。与现有的多沙箱系统相比，除了提供较低的运行时和代码大小开销之外，LFI 的实现独立于现有的编译器工具链，具有小型静态验证器以减少 TCB 大小，针对基本 Spectre 攻击进行了强化，并具有广泛的软件支持，包括对异常等语言机制和 SIMD 等 ISA 功能的支持。

papers.title: Lightweight, Modular Verification for WebAssembly-to-Native Instruction Selection.
papers.abstract: Language-level guarantees---like module runtime isolation for WebAssembly (Wasm)---are only as strong as the compiler that produces a final, native-machine-specific executable. The process of lowering language-level constructions to ISA-specific instructions can introduce subtle bugs that violate security guarantees. In this paper, we present Crocus, a system for lightweight, modular verification of instruction-lowering rules within Cranelift, a production retargetable Wasm native code generator. We use Crocus to verify lowering rules that cover WebAssembly 1.0 support for integer operations in the ARM aarch64 backend. We show that Crocus can reproduce 3 known bugs (including a 9.9/10 severity CVE), identify 2 previously-unknown bugs and an underspecified compiler invariant, and help analyze the root causes of a new bug.
papers.abstract_zh: 语言级保证（例如 WebAssembly (Wasm) 的模块运行时隔离）的强度取决于生成最终的、本机特定可执行文件的编译器。将语言级构造降低为 ISA 特定指令的过程可能会引入违反安全保证的微妙错误。在本文中，我们介绍了 Crocus，这是一个用于在 Cranelift 中对指令降低规则进行轻量级模块化验证的系统，Cranelift 是一种生产可重定向 Wasm 本机代码生成器。我们使用 Crocus 来验证降低规则，这些规则涵盖了 ARM aarch64 后端中对整数运算的 WebAssembly 1.0 支持。我们证明 Crocus 可以重现 3 个已知错误（包括 9.9/10 严重性 CVE），识别 2 个先前未知的错误和一个未指定的编译器不变量，并帮助分析新错误的根本原因。

papers.title: Limoncello: Prefetchers for Scale.
papers.abstract: This paper presents Limoncello, a novel software system that dynamically configures data prefetchers for high-utilization systems. We demonstrate that in resource-constrained environments, such as large data centers, traditional methods of hardware prefetching can increase memory latency and decrease available memory bandwidth. To address this issue, Limoncello disables hardware prefetchers when memory bandwidth utilization is high, and it leverages targeted software prefetching to reduce cache misses when hardware prefetchers are disabled. Limoncello is software-centric and does not require any modifications to hardware. Our evaluation of the deployment on Google's fleet reveals that Limoncello unlocks significant performance gains for high-utilization systems: It improves application throughput by 10%, due to a 15% reduction in memory latency, while maintaining minimal change in cache miss rate for targeted library functions.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Limoncello，这是一种新颖的软件系统，可为高利用率系统动态配置数据预取器。我们证明，在资源受限的环境中，例如大型数据中心，传统的硬件预取方法会增加内存延迟并减少可用内存带宽。为了解决这个问题，Limoncello 在内存带宽利用率较高时禁用硬件预取器，并在禁用硬件预取器时利用有针对性的软件预取来减少缓存未命中。 Limoncello 以软件为中心，不需要对硬件进行任何修改。我们对 Google 车队部署的评估表明，Limoncello 为高利用率系统带来了显着的性能提升：由于内存延迟减少了 15%，它使应用程序吞吐量提高了 10%，同时保持目标库函数的缓存未命中率变化最小。

papers.title: Litmus: Fair Pricing for Serverless Computing.
papers.abstract:
Serverless computing has emerged as a market-dominant paradigm in modern cloud computing, benefiting both cloud providers and tenants. While service providers can optimize their machine utilization, tenants only need to pay for the resources they use. To maximize resource utilization, these serverless systems co-run numerous short-lived functions, bearing frequent system condition shifts. When the system gets overcrowded, a tenant's function may suffer from disturbing slowdowns. Ironically, tenants also incur higher costs during these slowdowns, as commercial serverless platforms determine costs proportional to their execution times.

This paper argues that cloud providers should compensate tenants for losses incurred when the server is over-provisioned. However, estimating tenants' losses is challenging without pre-profiled information about their functions. Prior studies have indicated that assessing tenant losses leads to heavy overheads. As a solution, this paper introduces a new pricing model that offers discounts based on the machine's state while presuming the tenant's loss under that state. To monitor the machine state accurately, Litmus pricing frequently conducts Litmus tests, an effective and lightweight solution for measuring system congestion. Our experiments show that Litmus pricing can accurately gauge the impact of system congestion and offer nearly ideal prices, with only a 0.2% price difference on average, in a heavily congested system.
papers.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算已成为现代云计算中的市场主导范例，使云提供商和租户都受益。虽然服务提供商可以优化其机器利用率，但租户只需为他们使用的资源付费。为了最大限度地提高资源利用率，这些无服务器系统共同运行许多短期功能，承受频繁的系统状况变化。当系统过度拥挤时，租户的功能可能会出现令人不安的速度下降。具有讽刺意味的是，在这些减速期间，租户也会承担更高的成本，因为商业无服务器平台确定的成本与其执行时间成正比。

本文认为，云提供商应该补偿租户因服务器过度配置而造成的损失。然而，如果没有预先了解租户职能的信息，估计租户的损失就具有挑战性。先前的研究表明，评估租户损失会导致高昂的管理费​​用。作为解决方案，本文引入了一种新的定价模型，该模型根据机器的状态提供折扣，同时假定租户在该状态下的损失。为了准确监控机器状态，Litmus定价经常进行Litmus测试，这是一种用于测量系统拥塞的有效且轻量级的解决方案。我们的实验表明，Litmus 定价可以准确衡量系统拥塞的影响，并在严重拥塞的系统中提供近乎理想的价格，平均价格差异仅为 0.2%。

papers.title: Longnail: High-Level Synthesis of Portable Custom Instruction Set Extensions for RISC-V Processors from Descriptions in the Open-Source CoreDSL Language.
papers.abstract:
In the RISC-V ecosystem, custom instruction set architecture extensions (ISAX) are an energy-efficient and cost-effective way to accelerate modern embedded workloads. However, exploring different combinations of base cores and ISAXes for a specific application requires automation and a level of portability across microarchitectures that is not provided by existing approaches.

To that end, we present an end-to-end flow for ISAX specification, generation, and integration into a number of host cores having a range of different microarchitectures. For ISAX specification, we propose CoreDSL, a novel behavioral architecture description language that is concise, easy to learn, and open source. Hardware generation is handled by Longnail, a domain-specific high-level synthesis tool that compiles CoreDSL specifications into hardware modules compatible with the recently introduced SCAIE-V extension interface, which we rely on for automatic integration into the host cores.

We demonstrate our tooling by generating ISAXes using a mix of features, including complex multi-cycle computations, memory accesses, branch instructions, custom registers, and decoupled execution across four embedded cores and evaluate the quality of results on a 22nm ASIC process.
papers.abstract_zh:
在 RISC-V 生态系统中，自定义指令集架构扩展 (ISAX) 是一种节能且经济高效的方式来加速现代嵌入式工作负载。然而，针对特定应用探索基础内核和 ISAX 的不同组合需要自动化和跨微体系结构的一定程度的可移植性，而现有方法无法提供这一点。

为此，我们提出了用于 ISAX 规范、生成和集成到具有一系列不同微架构的多个主机内核的端到端流程。对于ISAX规范，我们提出了CoreDSL，一种简洁、易学且开源的新型行为架构描述语言。硬件生成由 Longnail 处理，Longnail 是一种特定领域的高级综合工具，可将 CoreDSL 规范编译为与最近推出的 SCAIE-V 扩展接口兼容的硬件模块，我们依靠该扩展接口自动集成到主机内核中。

我们通过使用多种功能（包括复杂的多周期计算、内存访问、分支指令、自定义寄存器和跨四个嵌入式内核的解耦执行）生成 ISAX 来演示我们的工具，并评估 22nm ASIC 工艺的结果质量。

papers.title: Loupe: Driving the Development of OS Compatibility Layers.
papers.abstract:
Supporting mainstream applications is fundamental for a new OS to have impact. It is generally achieved by developing a layer of compatibility allowing applications developed for a mainstream OS like Linux to run unmodified on the new OS. Building such a layer, as we show, results in large engineering inefficiencies due to the lack of efficient methods to precisely measure the OS features required by a set of applications.

We propose Loupe, a novel method based on dynamic analysis that determines the OS features that need to be implemented in a prototype OS to bring support for a target set of applications and workloads.
