Loupe guides and boosts OS developers as they build compatibility layers, prioritizing which features to implement in order to quickly support many applications as early as possible. We apply our methodology to 100+ applications and several OSes currently under development, demonstrating high engineering effort savings vs. existing approaches: for example, for the 62 applications supported by the OSv kernel, we show that using Loupe, would have required implementing only 37 system calls vs. 92 for the non-systematic process followed by OSv developers.

We study our measurements and extract novel key insights. Overall, we show that the burden of building compatibility layers is significantly less than what previous works suggest: in some cases, only as few as 20% of system calls reported by static analysis, and 50% of those reported by naive dynamic analysis need an implementation for an application to successfully run standard benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh:
支持主流应用程序是新操作系统产生影响的基础。它通常是通过开发一个兼容性层来实现的，允许为 Linux 等主流操作系统开发的应用程序无需修改即可在新操作系统上运行。正如我们所展示的，由于缺乏有效的方法来精确测量一组应用程序所需的操作系统功能，构建这样的层会导致工程效率大幅降低。

我们提出了 Loupe，一种基于动态分析的新颖方法，它确定需要在原型操作系统中实现的操作系统功能，以支持一组目标应用程序和工作负载。 Loupe 在操作系统开发人员构建兼容性层时为他们提供指导和帮助，确定要实现的功能的优先级，以便尽早快速支持许多应用程序。我们将我们的方法应用于目前正在开发的 100 多个应用程序和多个操作系统，与现有方法相比，证明了工程工作量的节省：例如，对于 OSv 内核支持的 62 个应用程序，我们表明使用 Loupe 只需实现 37 个系统调用，而 OSv 开发人员遵循的非系统过程则需要实现 92 个系统调用。

我们研究我们的测量结果并提取新颖的关键见解。总体而言，我们表明构建兼容性层的负担明显低于以前的工作所建议的：在某些情况下，静态分析报告的系统调用只有 20%，而朴素动态分析报告的系统调用中有 50% 需要实现应用程序才能成功运行标准基准测试。

papers.title: MAGIS: Memory Optimization via Coordinated Graph Transformation and Scheduling for DNN.
papers.abstract:
Recently, memory consumption of Deep Neural Network (DNN) rapidly increases, mainly due to long lifetimes and large shapes of tensors. Graph scheduling has emerged as an effective memory optimization technique, which determines the optimal execution, re-computation, swap-out, and swap-in timings for each operator/tensor. However, it often hurts performance significantly and can only manipulate tensors' lifetimes but not shapes, limiting the optimization space. We find that graph transformation, which can change the tensor shapes and graph structure, creates a new trade-off space between memory and performance. Nevertheless, graph transformation are applied separately so far, with primary focus on optimizing performance and not memory.

In this paper, we propose MAGIS, a DNN memory optimization framework that coordinates graph transformation with graph scheduling. MAGIS uses a hierarchical tree to represent Fission Transformation (F-Trans), a type of transformation which can effectively reduce tensor shapes in a sub-graph. To keep the complexity low, we build a light-weight search space based on graph structure analysis. MAGIS decomposes graph scheduling into graph transformation and re-ordering and designs an incremental scheduling algorithm to alleviate the scheduling overhead after each graph transformation step to efficiently coordinate them. Experimental results show that compared to state-of-the-art works, MAGIS only uses 15%~85% of their peak memory usage with the same latency 1 constraint and obtains a better Pareto boundary in dual-objective optimization of memory and performance. Our code is now available at https://github.com/pku-liang/MAGIS.
papers.abstract_zh:
最近，深度神经网络（DNN）的内存消耗迅速增加，这主要是由于张量的寿命长和形状大。图调度已成为一种有效的内存优化技术，它确定每个运算符/张量的最佳执行、重新计算、换出和换入时序。然而，它通常会严重损害性能，并且只能操纵张量的寿命而不能操纵形状，从而限制了优化空间。我们发现图变换可以改变张量形状和图结构，在内存和性能之间创建了一个新的权衡空间。尽管如此，到目前为止，图转换都是单独应用的，主要关注的是优化性能而不是内存。

在本文中，我们提出了 MAGIS，一种协调图转换和图调度的 DNN 内存优化框架。 MAGIS 使用分层树来表示裂变变换（F-Trans），这是一种可以有效减少子图中张量形状的变换。为了保持较低的复杂性，我们基于图结构分析构建了一个轻量级搜索空间。 MAGIS将图调度分解为图变换和重新排序，并设计了增量调度算法来减轻每个图变换步骤之后的调度开销，从而有效地协调它们。实验结果表明，与最先进的作品相比，MAGIS 在相同的延迟 1 约束下仅使用了峰值内存使用量的 15%~85%，并在内存和性能的双目标优化中获得了更好的 Pareto 边界。我们的代码现已在 https://github.com/pku-liang/MAGIS 上提供。

papers.title: Manta: Hybrid-Sensitive Type Inference Toward Type-Assisted Bug Detection for Stripped Binaries.
papers.abstract: Static binary bug detection has been a prominent approach for ensuring the security of binaries used in our daily lives. However, the type information lost in binaries prevents the improvement opportunity for a static analyzer to utilize type information to prune away infeasible facts and increase analysis precision. To make binary bug detection more practical with higher precision, in this work, we propose the first hybrid-sensitive type inference, Manta, that combines data-flow analysis with different sensitivities to complement each other and infer precise types for many variables. The inferred types are then used to assist with bug detection by pruning infeasible indirect call targets and data dependencies. Our experiments indicate Manta outperforms prior work by inferring types with 78.7% precision and 97.2% recall. Based on the inferred types, we can prune away 63.9% more infeasible indirect-call targets compared to existing type analysis techniques and perform program slicing on binaries with 61.1% similarity to that on source code. Moreover, Manta has led to 86 new developer-confirmed vulnerabilities in many popular IoT firmware, with 64 CVE/PSV IDs assigned.
papers.abstract_zh: 静态二进制错误检测一直是确保我们日常生活中使用的二进制文件安全的一种重要方法。然而，二进制文件中丢失的类型信息阻碍了静态分析器利用类型信息删除不可行的事实并提高分析精度的改进机会。为了使二进制错误检测更实用、更高精度，在这项工作中，我们提出了第一个混合敏感类型推断 Manta，它将数据流分析与不同灵敏度相结合，相互补充并推断出许多变量的精确类型。然后，推断的类型用于通过修剪不可行的间接调用目标和数据依赖性来协助错误检测。我们的实验表明，Manta 的类型推断精度为 78.7%，召回率为 97.2%，优于之前的工作。基于推断的类型，与现有类型分析技术相比，我们可以删除 63.9% 的不可行间接调用目标，并对二进制文件执行程序切片，与源代码的相似度为 61.1%。此外，Manta 在许多流行的物联网固件中导致了 86 个开发人员确认的新漏洞，并分配了 64 个 CVE/PSV ID。

papers.title: Marple: Scalable Spike Sorting for Untethered Brain-Machine Interfacing.
papers.abstract: Spike sorting is the process of parsing electrophysiological signals from neurons to identify if, when, and which particular neurons fire. Spike sorting is a particularly difficult task in computational neuroscience due to the growing scale of recording technologies and complexity in traditional spike sorting algorithms. Previous spike sorters can be divided into software-based and hardware-based solutions. Software solutions are highly accurate but operate on recordings after-the-fact, and often require utilization of high-power GPUs to process in a timely fashion, and they cannot be used in portable applications. Hardware solutions suffer in terms of accuracy due to the simplification of mechanisms for implementation's sake and process only up to 128 inputs. This work answers the question: "How much computation power and memory storage is needed to sort spikes from 1000s of channels to keep up with advances in probe technology?" We analyze the computational and memory requirements for modern software spike sorters to identify their potential bottlenecks - namely in the template memory storage. We architect Marple , a highly optimized hardware pipeline for spike sorting which incorporates a novel mechanism to reduce the template memory storage from 8 - 11x. Marple is scalable, uses a flexible vector-based back-end to perform neuron identification, and a fixed-function front-end to filter the incoming streams into areas of interest. The implementation is projected to use just 79mW in 7nm, when spike sorting 10K channels at peak activity. We further demonstrate, for the first time, a machine learning replacement for the template matching stage.
papers.abstract_zh: 尖峰排序是解析来自神经元的电生理信号的过程，以确定特定神经元是否、何时以及哪些神经元放电。由于记录技术的规模不断扩大以及传统尖峰排序算法的复杂性，尖峰排序是计算神经科学中一项特别困难的任务。以前的穗分拣机可以分为基于软件和基于硬件的解决方案。软件解决方案非常准确，但需要事后对记录进行操作，并且通常需要利用高功率 GPU 进行及时处理，并且无法在便携式应用中使用。由于为了实现而简化了机制并且仅处理最多 128 个输入，因此硬件解决方案的准确性受到影响。这项工作回答了这个问题：“需要多少计算能力和内存存储来对数千个通道中的尖峰进行排序，以跟上探针技术的进步？”我们分析现代软件尖峰分拣机的计算和内存需求，以确定其潜在瓶颈 - 即模板内存存储。我们构建了 Marple，这是一种用于尖峰排序的高度优化的硬件管道，它采用了一种新颖的机制，可将模板内存存储量从 8 倍减少到 11 倍。 Marple 具有可扩展性，使用灵活的基于向量的后端来执行神经元识别，并使用固定功能的前端将传入流过滤到感兴趣的区域。当在峰值活动时对 10K 通道进行尖峰排序时，该实现预计在 7nm 中仅使用 79mW。我们首次进一步演示了模板匹配阶段的机器学习替代方案。

papers.title: MaxEmbed: Maximizing SSD bandwidth utilization for huge embedding models serving.
papers.abstract:
Deep learning recommendation models (DLRMs) have gained widespread application across search, advertising, and e-commerce. Still, DLRMs present notable challenges as they depend heavily on large embedding tables to represent sparse features in recommendation systems. This raises concerns about both memory capacity and cost. Solid-state drives (SSDs) offer a cost-effective solution with a significantly larger capacity, but they introduce read amplification issues because of the mismatch between embedding size and SSD read granularity. Prior SSD embedding storage systems aim to tackle these challenges by employing hypergraph partitioning to co-locate co-appearing embeddings onto the same SSD page, alleviating read amplification. However, this approach has a drawback as it divides embeddings into completely disjoint clusters, limiting potential combinations between embeddings.

In response to this limitation, we introduce MaxEmbed. Capitalizing on the extensive storage capacity of SSDs, Max-Embed effectively mines relationships between storage combinations of embeddings with replication, thereby enhancing the effective bandwidth of SSDs. Additionally, MaxEmbed incorporates a corresponding online service module for embedding query request handling, leveraging two key optimizations to reduce the overhead brought by replication. Our evaluations demonstrate that MaxEmbed boosts SSD embedding serving throughput by up to 18.7% under various settings.
papers.abstract_zh:
深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）已在搜索、广告和电子商务领域获得广泛应用。尽管如此，DLRM 仍然面临着显着的挑战，因为它们严重依赖大型嵌入表来表示推荐系统中的稀疏特征。这引起了人们对内存容量和成本的担忧。固态硬盘 (SSD) 提供了一种经济高效的解决方案，具有更大的容量，但由于嵌入大小和 SSD 读取粒度之间的不匹配，它们引入了读取放大问题。先前的 SSD 嵌入存储系统旨在通过采用超图分区将共同出现的嵌入共同定位到同一 SSD 页面上，从而减轻读取放大来应对这些挑战。然而，这种方法有一个缺点，因为它将嵌入划分为完全不相交的簇，限制了嵌入之间的潜在组合。

针对这个限制，我们引入了MaxEmbed。 Max-Embed利用SSD海量的存储容量，有效挖掘嵌入与复制的存储组合之间的关系，从而提高SSD的有效带宽。此外，MaxEmbed还包含相应的在线服务模块，用于嵌入查询请求处理，利用两个关键优化来减少复制带来的开销。我们的评估表明，MaxEmbed 在各种设置下可将 SSD 嵌入服务吞吐量提高高达 18.7%。

papers.title: MaxK-GNN: Extremely Fast GPU Kernel Design for Accelerating Graph Neural Networks Training.
papers.abstract:
In the acceleration of deep neural network training, the graphics processing unit (GPU) has become the mainstream platform. GPUs face substantial challenges on Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), such as workload imbalance and memory access irregularities, leading to underutilized hardware. Existing solutions such as PyG, DGL with cuSPARSE, and GNNAdvisor frameworks partially address these challenges. However, the memory traffic involved with Sparse-Dense Matrix Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is still significant.

We argue that drastic performance improvements can only be achieved by the vertical optimization of algorithm and system innovations, rather than treating the speedup optimization as an "after-thought" (i.e., (i) given a GNN algorithm, designing an accelerator, or (ii) given hardware, mainly optimizing the GNN algorithm ). In this paper, we present MaxK-GNN, an advanced high-performance GPU training system integrating algorithm and system innovation. (i) We introduce the MaxK nonlinearity and provide a theoretical analysis of MaxK nonlinearity as a universal approximator, and present the Compressed Balanced Sparse Row (CBSR) format, designed to store the data and index of the feature matrix after nonlinearity; (ii) We design a coalescing enhanced forward computation with row-wise product-based Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpGEMM) Kernel using CBSR for input feature matrix fetching and strategic placement of a sparse output accumulation buffer in shared memory; (iii) We develop an optimized backward computation with outer product-based and Sampled Sparse Matrix Dense Matrix Multiplication (SSpMM) Kernel.

We conduct extensive evaluations of MaxK-GNN and report the system training time. Experiments show that MaxK-GNN system could approach the speedup limit according to Amdahl's law. We achieve comparable accuracy to SOTA GNNs, but at a significantly increased speed: 3.22×/4.24× speedup (vs. 5.52×/7.27×) on Reddit compared to DGL and GNNAdvisor implementations. Our implementation can be found on GitHub 1 .
papers.abstract_zh:
在深度神经网络训练的加速中，图形处理单元（GPU）已成为主流平台。 GPU 在图神经网络 (GNN) 上面临着巨大的挑战，例如工作负载不平衡和内存访问不规则，导致硬件利用率不足。 PyG、带有 cuSPARSE 的 DGL 和 GNNAdvisor 框架等现有解决方案部分解决了这些挑战。然而，稀疏-密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 涉及的内存流量仍然很大。

我们认为，性能的大幅提升只能通过算法和系统创新的垂直优化来实现，而不是将加速优化视为“事后想法”（即（i）给定 GNN 算法，设计加速器，或（ii）给定硬件，主要优化 GNN 算法）。在本文中，我们提出了MaxK-GNN，一种集算法和系统创新于一体的先进高性能GPU训练系统。 (i)我们引入了MaxK非线性，并提供了MaxK非线性作为通用逼近器的理论分析，并提出了压缩平衡稀疏行（CBSR）格式，旨在存储非线性后特征矩阵的数据和索引； (ii) 我们设计了一种合并增强前向计算，采用基于行乘积的稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 内核，使用 CBSR 进行输入特征矩阵获取和共享内存中稀疏输出累积缓冲区的战略布局； (iii) 我们使用基于外积的采样稀疏矩阵密集矩阵乘法（SSpMM）内核开发了一种优化的后向计算。

我们对 MaxK-GNN 进行了广泛的评估并报告了系统训练时间。实验表明，根据阿姆达尔定律，MaxK-GNN 系统可以接近加速极限。我们实现了与 SOTA GNN 相当的精度，但速度显着提高：与 DGL 和 GNNAdvisor 实现相比，在 Reddit 上加速了 3.22×/4.24×（对比 5.52×/7.27×）。我们的实现可以在 GitHub 1 上找到。

papers.title: MECH: Multi-Entry Communication Highway for Superconducting Quantum Chiplets.
papers.abstract: Chiplet architecture is an emerging architecture for quantum computing that could significantly increase qubit resources with its great scalability and modularity. However, as the computing scale increases, communication between qubits would become a more severe bottleneck due to the long routing distances. In this paper, we propose a multi-entry communication highway (MECH) mechanism to trade ancillary qubits for program concurrency, and build a compilation framework to efficiently manage and utilize the highway resources. Our evaluation shows that this framework significantly outperforms the baseline approach in both the circuit depth and the number of operations on typical quantum benchmarks. This implies a more efficient and less error-prone compilation of quantum programs.
papers.abstract_zh: Chiplet架构是一种新兴的量子计算架构，凭借其出色的可扩展性和模块化性，可以显着增加量子比特资源。然而，随着计算规模的增加，由于路由距离较长，量子位之间的通信将成为更加严重的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了一种多入口通信高速公路（MECH）机制，通过交易辅助量子比特来实现程序并发，并构建了一个编译框架来有效管理和利用高速公路资源。我们的评估表明，该框架在电路深度和典型量子基准上的操作数量方面都显着优于基线方法。这意味着量子程序的编译更加高效且不易出错。

papers.title: MemSnap μCheckpoints: A Data Single Level Store for Fearless Persistence.
papers.abstract:
Single level stores (SLSes) have recently resurfaced as a system for persisting application data. SLSes like EROS, Aurora, and TreeSLS use application checkpointing to replace file-based APIs. These systems checkpoint at a coarse granularity and must be combined with file persistence mechanisms like WALs, undermining the benefits of their SLS design.

We present MemSnap, a new system that completes the single level store vision by eliminating the need for the WAL API. MemSnap introduces μCheckpoints that persist updates to memory for individual write transactions concurrently with other threads. We introduce a novel per-thread dirty set tracking mechanism in the kernel and use it to transparently persist application data. We use virtual memory techniques to prevent modifications to in-flight μCheckpoints, without blocking the application.

MemSnap-based persistence has 4.5×--30× lower latency than file-based random IO and is within 2×of direct disk IO latency. We integrate MemSnap with the SQLite, RocksDB, and PostgreSQL databases, gaining performance while retaining ACID. MemSnap increases the throughput of SQLite by 5× over file APIs and achieves a 4× throughput improvement for RocksDB compared to Aurora.
papers.abstract_zh:
单级存储（SLS）最近作为持久应用程序数据的系统重新出现。 EROS、Aurora 和 TreeSLS 等 SLS 使用应用程序检查点来替换基于文件的 API。这些系统检查点的粒度较粗，并且必须与 WAL 等文件持久性机制相结合，从而削弱了 SLS 设计的优势。

我们推出了 MemSnap，这是一个新系统，它通过消除对 WAL API 的需求来完成单级存储愿景。 MemSnap 引入了 μCheckpoints，它可以与其他线程同时保存单个写入事务的内存更新。我们在内核中引入了一种新颖的每线程脏集跟踪机制，并使用它来透明地保存应用程序数据。我们使用虚拟内存技术来防止对运行中的 μCheckpoints 进行修改，而不会阻塞应用程序。

基于 MemSnap 的持久性的延迟比基于文件的随机 IO 低 4.5×--30×，并且在直接磁盘 IO 延迟的 2 倍以内。我们将 MemSnap 与 SQLite、RocksDB 和 PostgreSQL 数据库集成，在保持 ACID 的同时获得性能。与文件 API 相比，MemSnap 将 SQLite 的吞吐量提高了 5 倍，并且与 Aurora 相比，RocksDB 的吞吐量提高了 4 倍。

papers.title: Merlin: Multi-tier Optimization of eBPF Code for Performance and Compactness.
papers.abstract: eBPF (extended Berkeley Packet Filter) significantly enhances observability, performance, and security within the Linux kernel, playing a pivotal role in various real-world applications. Implemented as a register-based kernel virtual machine, eBPF features a customized Instruction Set Architecture (ISA) with stringent kernel safety requirements, e.g., a limited number of instructions. This constraint necessitates substantial optimization efforts for eBPF programs to meet performance objectives. Despite the availability of compilers supporting eBPF program compilation, existing tools often overlook key optimization opportunities, resulting in suboptimal performance. In response, this paper introduces Merlin, an optimization framework leveraging customized LLVM passes and bytecode rewriting for Instruction Representation (IR) transformation and bytecode refinement. Merlin employs two primary optimization strategies, i.e., instruction merging and strength reduction. These optimizations are deployed before eBPF verification. We evaluate Merlin across 19 XDP programs (drawn from the Linux kernel, Meta, hXDP, and Cilium) and three eBPF-based systems (Sysdig, Tetragon, and Tracee, each comprising several hundred eBPF programs). The results show that all optimized programs pass the kernel verification. Meanwhile, Merlin can reduce number of instructions by 73% and runtime overhead by 60% compared with the original programs. Merlin can also improve the throughput by 0.59% and reduce the latency by 5.31%, compared to state-of-the-art technique K2, while being 10 6 times faster and more scalable to larger and more complex programs without additional manual efforts.
papers.abstract_zh: eBPF（扩展伯克利数据包过滤器）显着增强了 Linux 内核内的可观察性、性能和安全性，在各种实际应用中发挥着关键作用。 eBPF 作为基于寄存器的内核虚拟机实现，具有定制的指令集架构 (ISA)，具有严格的内核安全要求，例如有限数量的指令。此限制需要对 eBPF 程序进行大量优化才能满足性能目标。尽管有支持 eBPF 程序编译的编译器，但现有工具常常忽略关键的优化机会，从而导致性能不佳。为此，本文介绍了 Merlin，这是一种利用定制 LLVM 传递和字节码重写进行指令表示 (IR) 转换和字节码细化的优化框架。 Merlin 采用两种主要的优化策略，即指令合并和强度降低。这些优化在 eBPF 验证之前部署。我们通过 19 个 XDP 程序（来自 Linux 内核、Meta、hXDP 和 Cilium）和三个基于 eBPF 的系统（Sysdig、Tetragon 和 Tracee，每个系统包含数百个 eBPF 程序）来评估 Merlin。结果表明，所有优化程序均通过了内核验证。同时，与原始程序相比，Merlin可以减少73%的指令数量和60%的运行时开销。与最先进的技术 K2 相比，Merlin 还可以将吞吐量提高 0.59%，将延迟降低 5.31%，同时速度提高 10 6 倍，并且无需额外的手动操作即可扩展到更大、更复杂的程序。

papers.title: METAL: Caching Multi-level Indexes in Domain-Specific Architectures.
papers.abstract:
State-of-the-art domain specific architectures (DSAs) work with sparse data, and need hardware support for index data-structures [31, 43, 57, 61]. Indexes are more space-efficient for sparse-data, and reduce DRAM bandwidth, if data reuse can be managed. However, indexes exhibit dynamic accesses, chase pointers, and need to walk-and-search. This inflates the working set and thrashes the cache. We observe that the cache organization itself is responsible for this behavior.

We develop METAL, a portable caching idiom that enables DSAs to employ index data-structures. METAL decouples reuse of the index metadata from data reuse, and optimizes it independently. We propose two ideas: i) IX-Cache : A cache that leverages range tags to short-circuits index walks, and reduces the working set. IX-cache helps capture the trade-off between wider index nodes that maximize reach vs those that are closer to leaf and minimize walk latency. ii) Reuse Patterns : An interface to explicitly manage the cache. Patterns orchestrate cache insertions and bypass as we dynamically traverse different index regions. METAL improves performance vs. streaming DSAs by 7.8×, address-caches by 4.1×, and state-of-the-art DSA-cache [50] by 2.4×. We reduce DRAM energy by 1.6× vs. prior state-of-the-art.
papers.abstract_zh:
最先进的领域特定架构（DSA）处理稀疏数据，并且需要索引数据结构的硬件支持[31,43,57,61]。如果可以管理数据重用，索引对于稀疏数据来说可以更节省空间，并且可以减少 DRAM 带宽。然而，索引表现出动态访问、追踪指针以及需要行走和搜索。这会膨胀工作集并破坏缓存。我们观察到缓存组织本身对这种行为负责。

我们开发了 METAL，这是一种可移植的缓存习惯用法，使 DSA 能够使用索引数据结构。 METAL 将索引元数据的重用与数据重用解耦，并对其进行独立优化。我们提出两个想法： i) IX-Cache：利用范围标签来短路索引遍历并减少工作集的缓存。 IX-cache 有助于实现最大化覆盖范围的较宽索引节点与更接近叶子节点并最小化行走延迟的索引节点之间的权衡。 ii) 重用模式：显式管理缓存的接口。当我们动态遍历不同的索引区域时，模式会协调缓存插入和旁路。与流 DSA 相比，METAL 的性能提高了 7.8 倍，地址缓存提高了 4.1 倍，最先进的 DSA 缓存 [50] 提高了 2.4 倍。与之前最先进的技术相比，我们将 DRAM 能耗降低了 1.6 倍。

papers.title: MicroVSA: An Ultra-Lightweight Vector Symbolic Architecture-based Classifier Library for Always-On Inference on Tiny Microcontrollers.
papers.abstract:
Artificial intelligence (AI) on tiny edge devices has become feasible thanks to the emergence of high-performance microcontrollers (MCUs) and lightweight machine learning (ML) models. Nevertheless, the cost and power consumption of these MCUs and the computation requirements of these ML algorithms still present barriers that prevent the widespread inclusion of AI functionality on smaller, cheaper, and lower-power devices. Thus, there is an urgent need for a more efficient ML algorithm and implementation strategy suitable for lower-end MCUs.

This paper presents MicroVSA , a library of optimized implementations of a low-dimensional computing (LDC) classifier, a recently proposed variant of vector symbolic architecture (VSA), for 8, 16, and 32-bit MCUs. MicroVSA achieves up to 21.86x speedup and 8x less flash utilization compared to the vanilla LDC. Evaluation results on the three most common always-on inference tasks - myocardial infarction detection, human activity recognition, and hot word detection - demonstrate that MicroVSA outperforms traditional classifiers and achieves comparable accuracy to tiny deep learning models, while requiring only a few ten bytes of RAM and can easily fit in tiny 8-bit MCUs. For instance, our model for recognizing human activity from inertial sensor data only needs 2.46 KiB of flash and 0.02 KiB of RAM and can complete one inference in 0.85 ms on a 32-bit ARM Cortex-M4 MCU or 11.82 ms on a tiny 8-bit AVR MCU, whereas the RNN model running on a higher-end ARM Cortex-M3 requires 62.0 ms. Our study suggests that ubiquitous ML deployment on low-cost tiny MCUs is possible, and more study on VSA model training, model compression, and implementation techniques is needed to further lower the cost and power of ML on edge devices.
papers.abstract_zh:
由于高性能微控制器 (MCU) 和轻量级机器学习 (ML) 模型的出现，微型边缘设备上的人工智能 (AI) 已变得可行。尽管如此，这些 MCU 的成本和功耗以及这些 ML 算法的计算要求仍然存在障碍，阻碍人工智能功能在更小、更便宜和更低功耗的设备上广泛应用。因此，迫切需要一种更高效的机器学习算法和适合低端MCU的实现策略。

本文介绍了 MicroVSA，这是一个低维计算 (LDC) 分类器的优化实现库，是最近提出的矢量符号架构 (VSA) 变体，适用于 8、16 和 32 位 MCU。与普通 LDC 相比，MicroVSA 的速度提高了 21.86 倍，闪存利用率降低了 8 倍。对三种最常见的始终在线推理任务（心肌梗死检测、人体活动识别和热词检测）的评估结果表明，MicroVSA 的性能优于传统分类器，并实现了与微型深度学习模型相当的精度，同时仅需要几十个字节的 RAM，并且可以轻松安装在微型 8 位 MCU 中。例如，我们从惯性传感器数据识别人类活动的模型仅需要 2.46 KiB 闪存和 0.02 KiB RAM，并且可以在 32 位 ARM Cortex-M4 MCU 上 0.85 毫秒内完成一次推理，在微型 8 位 AVR MCU 上完成一次推理 11.82 毫秒，而在高端 ARM Cortex-M3 上运行的 RNN 模型需要 62.0 毫秒。我们的研究表明，在低成本微型 MCU 上进行无处不在的 ML 部署是可能的，并且需要对 VSA 模型训练、模型压缩和实现技术进行更多研究，以进一步降低边缘设备上 ML 的成本和功耗。

papers.title: More Apps, Faster Hot-Launch on Mobile Devices via Fore/Background-aware GC-Swap Co-design.
papers.abstract: Faster app launching is crucial for the user experience on mobile devices. Apps launched from a background cached state, called hot-launching, have much better performance than apps launched from scratch. To increase the number of hot-launches, leading mobile vendors now cache more apps in the background by enabling swap. Recent work also proposed reducing the Java heap to increase the number of cached apps. However, this paper found that existing methods deteriorate app hot-launch performance while increasing the number of cached apps. To simultaneously improve the number of cached apps and hot-launch performance, this paper proposes Fleet, a foreground/background-aware GC-swap co-design framework. To enhance app-caching capacity, Fleet limits the tracing range of GC to background objects only, avoiding touching long-lifetime foreground objects. To improve hot-launch performance, Fleet identifies objects that will be accessed during the next hot-launch and uses runtime information to guide the swap scheme in the OS. In addition, Fleet aggregates small objects with similar access patterns into the same pages to improve swap efficiency. We implemented Fleet in AOSP and evaluated its performance with different types of apps. Experimental results show that Fleet achieves a 1.59× faster hot-launch time and caches 1.21× more apps than Android.
papers.abstract_zh: 更快的应用程序启动对于移动设备上的用户体验至关重要。从后台缓存状态启动的应用程序（称为热启动）比从头启动的应用程序具有更好的性能。为了增加热启动的数量，领先的移动供应商现在通过启用交换在后台缓存更多应用程序。最近的工作还建议减少 Java 堆以增加缓存应用程序的数量。然而，本文发现现有方法会降低应用程序热启动性能，同时增加缓存应用程序的数量。为了同时提高缓存应用程序的数量和热启动性能，本文提出了 Fleet，一种前台/后台感知的 GC 交换协同设计框架。为了增强应用程序缓存能力，Fleet 将 GC 的跟踪范围仅限于后台对象，避免触及长生命周期的前台对象。为了提高热启动性能，Fleet 识别下一次热启动期间将访问的对象，并使用运行时信息来指导操作系统中的交换方案。此外，Fleet将具有相似访问模式的小对象聚合到相同的页面中以提高交换效率。我们在 AOSP 中实现了 Fleet，并使用不同类型的应用程序评估了其性能。实验结果表明，与 Android 相比，Fleet 的热启动时间快了 1.59 倍，缓存的应用程序多了 1.21 倍。

papers.title: MorphQPV: Exploiting Isomorphism in Quantum Programs to Facilitate Confident Verification.
papers.abstract: Unlike classical computing, quantum program verification (QPV) is much more challenging due to the non-duplicability of quantum states that collapse after measurement. Prior approaches rely on deductive verification that shows poor scalability. Or they require exhaustive assertions that cannot ensure the program is correct for all inputs. In this paper, we propose MorphQPV, a confident assertion-based verification methodology. Our key insight is to leverage the isomorphism in quantum programs, which implies a structure-preserve relation between the program runtime states. In the assertion statement, we define a tracepoint pragma to label the verified quantum state and an assume-guarantee primitive to specify the expected relation between states. Then, we characterize the ground-truth relation between states using an isomorphism-based approximation, which can effectively obtain the program states under various inputs while avoiding repeated executions. Finally, the verification is formulated as a constraint optimization problem with a confidence estimation model to enable rigorous analysis. Experiments suggest that MorphQPV reduces the number of program executions by 107.9× when verifying the 27-qubit quantum lock algorithm and improves the probability of success by 3.3×-9.9× when debugging five benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 与经典计算不同，量子程序验证（QPV）更具挑战性，因为测量后崩溃的量子态具有不可复制性。先前的方法依赖于演绎验证，其可扩展性较差。或者它们需要详尽的断言，无法确保程序对于所有输入都是正确的。在本文中，我们提出了 MorphQPV，一种基于置信断言的验证方法。我们的主要见解是利用量子程序中的同构，这意味着程序运行时状态之间存在结构保留关系。在断言语句中，我们定义了一个跟踪点编译指示来标记已验证的量子状态，并定义了一个假设保证原语来指定状态之间的预期关系。然后，我们使用基于同构的近似来表征状态之间的真实关系，可以有效地获得各种输入下的程序状态，同时避免重复执行。最后，验证被表述为带有置信估计模型的约束优化问题，以实现严格的分析。实验表明，MorphQPV 在验证 27 量子位量子锁算法时将程序执行次数减少了 107.9 倍，在调试 5 个基准测试时将成功概率提高了 3.3 倍-9.9 倍。

papers.title: MPC-Pipe: an Efficient Pipeline Scheme for Semi-honest MPC Machine Learning.
papers.abstract:
Multi-party computing (MPC) has been gaining popularity as a secure computing model over the past few years. However, prior works have demonstrated that MPC protocols still pay substantial performance penalties compared to plaintext, particularly when applied to ML algorithms. The overhead is due to added computation and communication costs. Prior studies, as well as our own analysis, found that most MPC protocols today sequentially perform communication and computation. The participating parties must compute on their shares first and then perform data communication to allow the distribution of new secret shares before proceeding to the next computation step. In this work, we show that serialization is unnecessary, particularly in the context of ML computations (both in Convolutional neural networks and in Transformer-based models). We demonstrate that it is possible to carefully orchestrate the computation and communication steps to overlap.

We propose MPC-Pipe, an efficient MPC system for both training and inference of ML workloads, which pipelines computations and communications in an MPC protocol during the online phase. MPC-Pipe proposes three pipeline schemes to optimize the online phase of ML in the semi-honest majority adversary setting. The three pipeline schemes are 1) inter-linear pipeline, 2) inner-layer pipeline, and 3) inter-batch pipeline. Inter-linear pipeline focuses on linear layers; inner-layer pipeline focuses on non-linear layers; inter-batch pipeline focuses on communication and computation overlaps in different input batches. We implement MPC-Pipe by augmenting a modified version of CrypTen, which separates online and offline phases. We evaluate the end-to-end system performance benefits of the online phase of MPC using deep neural networks (VGG16, ResNet50) and Transformers using different network settings. We show that MPC-Pipe can improve the throughput and latency of ML workloads.
papers.abstract_zh:
过去几年，多方计算（MPC）作为一种安全计算模型越来越受欢迎。然而，之前的工作已经证明，与明文相比，MPC 协议仍然会带来巨大的性能损失，特别是在应用于 ML 算法时。开销是由于增加的计算和通信成本造成的。之前的研究以及我们自己的分析发现，当今大多数 MPC 协议都按顺序执行通信和计算。参与方必须首先计算其份额，然后进行数据通信以允许分配新的秘密份额，然后再进行下一个计算步骤。在这项工作中，我们证明序列化是不必要的，特别是在 ML 计算的背景下（在卷积神经网络和基于 Transformer 的模型中）。我们证明可以精心安排计算和通信步骤以重叠。

我们提出了 MPC-Pipe，这是一种高效的 MPC 系统，用于 ML 工作负载的训练和推理，它在在线阶段通过 MPC 协议进行计算和通信。 MPC-Pipe 提出了三种管道方案来优化半诚实多数对手设置中的 ML 在线阶段。三种管道方案是1）线间管道、2）内层管道和3）批次间管道。线间管线主要关注线性层；内层管道侧重于非线性层；批次间管道专注于不同输入批次中的通信和计算重叠。我们通过增强 CrypTen 的修改版本来实现 MPC-Pipe，该版本将在线和离线阶段分开。我们使用深度神经网络（VGG16、ResNet50）和使用不同网络设置的 Transformer 评估 MPC 在线阶段的端到端系统性能优势。我们证明 MPC-Pipe 可以提高 ML 工作负载的吞吐量和延迟。

papers.title: MulBERRY: Enabling Bit-Error Robustness for Energy-Efficient Multi-Agent Autonomous Systems.
papers.abstract:
The adoption of autonomous swarms, consisting of a multitude of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), operating in a collaborative manner, has become prevalent in mainstream application domains for both military and civilian purposes. These swarms are expected to collaboratively carry out navigation tasks and employ complex reinforcement learning (RL) models within the stringent onboard size, weight, and power constraints. While techniques such as reducing onboard operating voltage can improve the energy efficiency of both computation and flight missions, they can lead to on-chip bit failures that are detrimental to mission safety and performance.

To this end, we propose MulBERRY, a multi-agent robust learning framework to enhance bit error robustness and energy efficiency for resource-constrained autonomous UAV swarms. MulBERRY supports multi-agent robust learning, both offline and on-device, with adaptive and collaborative agent-server optimizations. For the first time, MulBERRY demonstrates the practicality of robust low-voltage operation on multi-UAV systems leading to energy savings in both compute and mission quality-of-flight. We conduct extensive system-level experiments on autonomous multi-UAV navigation by leveraging algorithm-level robust learning techniques, and hardware-level bit error, thermal, and power characterizations. Through evaluations, we demonstrate that MulBERRY achieves robustness-performance-efficiency co-optimizations for autonomous UAV swarms. We also show that MulBERRY generalizes well across fault patterns, environments, UAV types, UAV agent numbers, and RL policies, with up to 18.97% reduction in flight energy, 22.07% increase in the number of successful missions, and 4.16× processing energy reduction.
papers.abstract_zh:
由大量无人机（UAV）组成并以协作方式运行的自主集群的采用已在军事和民用的主流应用领域中变得普遍。这些集群预计将在严格的机载尺寸、重量和功率限制内协作执行导航任务并采用复杂的强化学习（RL）模型。虽然降低机载工作电压等技术可以提高计算和飞行任务的能源效率，但它们可能会导致片上位故障，从而损害任务安全和性能。

为此，我们提出了 MulBERRY，一种多智能体鲁棒学习框架，用于增强资源受限的自主无人机群的误码鲁棒性和能源效率。 MulBERRY 通过自适应和协作代理服务器优化，支持离线和设备上的多代理鲁棒学习。 MulBERRY 首次展示了多无人机系统稳健低压运行的实用性，从而在计算和任务飞行质量方面实现节能。我们利用算法级鲁棒学习技术以及硬件级误码、热和功率特性，对自主多无人机导航进行了广泛的系统级实验。通过评估，我们证明 MulBERRY 实现了自主无人机群的鲁棒性-性能-效率协同优化。我们还表明，MulBERRY 在故障模式、环境、无人机类型、无人机代理数量和 RL 策略方面具有良好的泛化能力，飞行能量减少高达 18.97%，成功任务数量增加 22.07%，处理能量减少 4.16 倍。

papers.title: Multi-Dimensional and Message-Guided Fuzzing for Robotic Programs in Robot Operating System.
papers.abstract:
An increasing number of robotic programs are implemented based on Robot Operating System (ROS), which provides many practical tools and libraries for robot development. To improve robot reliability and security, several recent approaches apply fuzzing to ROS programs for bug detection. However, these approaches still have some main limitations, including inefficient test case generation, ineffective program feedback and weak generality/automation.

In this paper, we design a new fuzzing framework named ROFER, to effectively test robotic programs in ROS for bug detection. Compared to existing ROS fuzzing approaches, ROFER has two novel techniques: (1) a dimension-level mutation method that considers the contribution of each input dimension to testing coverage, to generate efficient test cases from multiple dimensions; (2) a message-guided fuzzing approach that uses a new coverage metric named message feature, to reflect the robot's possible state transitions affected by multiple ROS nodes. We evaluate ROFER on 13 common robotic programs in ROS2, and it finds 88 real bugs, 46 of which have been confirmed by ROS developers. We compare ROFER to four state-of-the-art ROS fuzzing approaches, and it finds more bugs with higher testing coverage.
papers.abstract_zh:
越来越多的机器人程序基于机器人操作系统（ROS）来实现，它为机器人开发提供了许多实用的工具和库。为了提高机器人的可靠性和安全性，最近的几种方法将模糊测试应用于 ROS 程序以进行错误检测。然而，这些方法仍然存在一些主要局限性，包括低效的测试用例生成、无效的程序反馈和弱通用性/自动化。

在本文中，我们设计了一个名为 ROFER 的新模糊测试框架，以有效测试 ROS 中的机器人程序以进行错误检测。与现有的ROS模糊方法相比，ROFER有两个新颖的技术：（1）维度级变异方法，考虑每个输入维度对测试覆盖率的贡献，从多个维度生成有效的测试用例； (2)消息引导的模糊测试方法，使用名为消息特征的新覆盖度量来反映机器人受多个ROS节点影响的可能状态转换。我们对 ROS2 中的 13 个常见机器人程序进行了 ROFER 评估，发现了 88 个真正的错误，其中 46 个已被 ROS 开发人员确认。我们将 ROFER 与四种最先进的 ROS 模糊测试方法进行比较，它发现了更多的错误和更高的测试覆盖率。

papers.title: NDPipe: Exploiting Near-data Processing for Scalable Inference and Continuous Training in Photo Storage.
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a novel photo storage system called NDPipe, which accelerates the performance of training and inference for image data by leveraging near-data processing in photo storage servers. NDPipe distributes storage servers with inexpensive commodity GPUs in a data center and uses their collective intelligence to perform inference and training near image data. By efficiently partitioning deep neural network (DNN) models and exploiting the data parallelism of many storage servers, NDPipe can achieve high training throughput with low synchronization costs. NDPipe optimizes the near-data processing engine to maximally utilize system components in each storage server. Our results show that, given the same energy budget, NDPipe exhibits 1.39× higher inference throughput and 2.64× faster training speed than typical photo storage systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为 NDPipe 的新型照片存储系统，该系统通过利用照片存储服务器中的近数据处理来加速图像数据的训练和推理性能。 NDPipe 在数据中心中分配具有廉价商用 GPU 的存储服务器，并利用它们的集体智慧在图像数据附近执行推理和训练。通过有效地划分深度神经网络（DNN）模型并利用许多存储服务器的数据并行性，NDPipe 可以以较低的同步成本实现高训练吞吐量。 NDPipe 优化了近数据处理引擎，以最大限度地利用每个存储服务器中的系统组件。我们的结果表明，在能量预算相同的情况下，NDPipe 的推理吞吐量比典型照片存储系统高 1.39 倍，训练速度比典型照片存储系统快 2.64 倍。

papers.title: NetRen: Service Migration-Driven Network Renascence with Synthesizing Updated Configuration.
papers.abstract: Changes in enterprise networks require updated configurations. However, manual configurations with slow update efficiency, poor performance, and handling limitations, lead to the unavailability of updated networks. Therefore, we propose an efficient network renascence framework, NetRen , which synthesizes OSPF/BGP configurations driven by service and traffic migration. We follow the workflow of sketch extraction, configuration synthesis, and repair. Initially, comprehensive graphs are constructed to represent configuration sketches. We propose a GraphTrans synthesizer with Transformer's benefits of long-range focus and parallel reasoning. Training samples with the optimization relationship enable the synthesizer to achieve a mapping that optimizes performance based on configurations. To overcome the satisfiability barrier, configurations from the synthesizer are input to the stepwise configuration repairer as well-initialized solutions, achieving rapid configuration repair. Experiments demonstrate that the consistency of network configurations output by the GraphTrans synthesizer averages 98%. NetRen achieves a 312.4× increase in synthesis efficiency and a 5.83% improvement in network performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 企业网络的变化需要更新配置。但手动配置更新效率慢、性能差、处理能力有限，导致更新网络不可用。因此，我们提出了一种高效的网络复兴框架 NetRen，它综合了由服务和流量迁移驱动的 OSPF/BGP 配置。我们遵循草图提取、配置合成和修复的工作流程。最初，构建综合图表来表示配置草图。我们提出了一个 GraphTrans 合成器，它具有 Transformer 的远程聚焦和并行推理的优点。具有优化关系的训练样本使合成器能够实现基于配置优化性能的映射。为了克服可满足性障碍，来自合成器的配置被输入到逐步配置修复器作为初始化良好的解决方案，实现快速配置修复。实验表明，GraphTrans合成器输出的网络配置一致性平均为98%。 NetRen实现了综合效率提升312.4倍，网络性能提升5.83%。

papers.title: NeuPIMs: NPU-PIM Heterogeneous Acceleration for Batched LLM Inferencing.
papers.abstract:
Modern transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) are constructed with a series of decoder blocks. Each block comprises three key components: (1) QKV generation, (2) multi-head attention, and (3) feed-forward networks. In batched processing, QKV generation and feed-forward networks involve compute-intensive matrix-matrix multiplications (GEMM), while multi-head attention requires bandwidth-heavy matrix-vector multiplications (GEMV). Machine learning accelerators like TPUs or NPUs are proficient in handling GEMM but are less efficient for GEMV computations. Conversely, Processing-in-Memory (PIM) technology is tailored for efficient GEMV computation, while it lacks the computational power to handle GEMM effectively.

Inspired by this insight, we propose NeuPIMs, a heterogeneous acceleration system that jointly exploits a conventional GEMM-focused NPU and GEMV-optimized PIM devices. The main challenge in efficiently integrating NPU and PIM lies in enabling concurrent operations on both platforms, each addressing a specific kernel type. First, existing PIMs typically operate in a "blocked" mode, allowing only either NPU or PIM to be active at any given time. Second, the inherent dependencies between GEMM and GEMV in LLMs restrict their parallel processing. To tackle these challenges, NeuPIMs is equipped with dual row buffers in each bank, facilitating the simultaneous management of memory read/write operations and PIM commands. Further, NeuPIMs employs a runtime sub-batch interleaving technique to maximize concurrent execution, leveraging batch parallelism to allow two independent sub-batches to be pipelined within a single NeuPIMs device. Our evaluation demonstrates that compared to GPU-only, NPU-only, and a naïve NPU+PIM integrated acceleration approaches, NeuPIMs achieves 3×, 2.4× and 1.6× throughput improvement, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 由一系列解码器块构建。每个块包含三个关键组件：(1) QKV 生成、(2) 多头注意力和 (3) 前馈网络。在批量处理中，QKV 生成和前馈网络涉及计算密集型矩阵-矩阵乘法（GEMM），而多头注意力需要大量带宽的矩阵-向量乘法（GEMV）。 TPU 或 NPU 等机器学习加速器能够熟练处理 GEMM，但对于 GEMV 计算效率较低。相反，内存处理（PIM）技术是为高效的 GEMV 计算而定制的，但它缺乏有效处理 GEMM 的计算能力。

受这一见解的启发，我们提出了 NeuPIM，这是一种异构加速系统，联合利用传统的以 GEMM 为中心的 NPU 和 GEMV 优化的 PIM 设备。有效集成 NPU 和 PIM 的主要挑战在于在两个平台上实现并发操作，每个平台都处理特定的内核类型。首先，现有的 PIM 通常以“阻塞”模式运行，在任何给定时间只允许 NPU 或 PIM 处于活动状态。其次，法学硕士中GEMM和GEMV之间固有的依赖性限制了它们的并行处理。为了应对这些挑战，NeuPIM 在每个存储体中配备了双行缓冲区，有助于同时管理内存读/写操作和 PIM 命令。此外，NeuPIMs 采用运行时子批次交错技术来最大化并发执行，利用批次并行性允许两个独立的子批次在单个 NeuPIMs 设备内进行管道传输。我们的评估表明，与仅 GPU、仅 NPU 和简单的 NPU+PIM 集成加速方法相比，NeuPIM 分别实现了 3 倍、2.4 倍和 1.6 倍的吞吐量提升。

papers.title: ngAP: Non-blocking Large-scale Automata Processing on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Finite automata serve as compute kernels for various applications that require high throughput. However, despite the increasing compute power of GPUs, their potential in processing automata remains underutilized. In this work, we identify three major challenges that limit GPU throughput. 1) The available parallelism is insufficient, resulting in underutilized GPU threads. 2) Automata workloads involve significant redundant computations since a portion of states matches with repeated symbols. 3) The mapping between threads and states is switched dynamically, leading to poor data locality. Our key insight is that processing automata "one-symbol-at-a-time" serializes the execution, and thus needs to be revamped. To address these challenges, we propose Non-blocking Automata Processing, which allows parallel processing of different symbols in the input stream and also enables further optimizations: 1) We prefetch a portion of computations to increase the chances of processing multiple symbols simultaneously, thereby utilizing GPU threads better. 2) To reduce redundant computations, we store repeated computations in a memoization table, enabling us to substitute them with table lookups. 3) We privatize some computations to preserve the mapping between threads and states, thus improving data locality. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art GPU automata processing engine by an average of 7.9× and up to 901× across 20 applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 有限自动机充当需要高吞吐量的各种应用程序的计算内核。然而，尽管 GPU 的计算能力不断增强，但它们在处理自动机方面的潜力仍未得到充分利用。在这项工作中，我们确定了限制 GPU 吞吐量的三个主要挑战。 1）可用并行度不足，导致GPU线程利用率不足。 2) 自动机工作负载涉及大量冗余计算，因为部分状态与重复符号匹配。 3）线程和状态之间的映射是动态切换的，导致数据局部性较差。我们的主要见解是，处理自动机“一次一个符号”序列化执行，因此需要进行改进。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了非阻塞自动机处理，它允许并行处理输入流中的不同符号，并且还可以进一步优化：1）我们预取一部分计算以增加同时处理多个符号的机会，从而更好地利用 GPU 线程。 2）为了减少冗余计算，我们将重复的计算存储在记忆表中，使我们能够用表查找来代替它们。 3）我们将一些计算私有化以保留线程和状态之间的映射，从而提高数据局部性。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 20 个应用程序中的性能比最先进的 GPU 自动机处理引擎平均高出 7.9 倍，最高可达 901 倍。

papers.title: One Gate Scheme to Rule Them All: Introducing a Complex Yet Reduced Instruction Set for Quantum Computing.
papers.abstract:
The design and architecture of a quantum instruction set are paramount to the performance of a quantum computer. This work introduces a gate scheme for qubits with XX + YY coupling that directly and efficiently realizes any two-qubit gate up to single-qubit gates. First, this scheme enables high-fidelity execution of quantum operations, especially when decoherence is the primary error source. Second, since the scheme spans the entire SU (4) group of two-qubit gates, we can use it to attain the optimal two-qubit gate count for algorithm implementation. These two advantages in synergy give rise to a quantum Complex yet Reduced Instruction Set Computer (CRISC). Though the gate scheme is compact, it supports a comprehensive array of quantum operations. This may seem paradoxical but is realizable due to the fundamental differences between quantum and classical computer architectures.

Using our gate scheme, we observe marked improvements across various applications, including generic n -qubit gate synthesis, quantum volume, and qubit routing. Furthermore, the proposed scheme also realizes a gate locally equivalent to the commonly used CNOT gate with a gate time of π/2 g , where g is the two-qubit coupling. The AshN scheme is also completely impervious to ZZ error, the main coherent error in transversely coupled systems, as the control parameters implementing the gates can be easily adjusted to take the ZZ term into account.
papers.abstract_zh:
量子指令集的设计和架构对于量子计算机的性能至关重要。这项工作引入了一种具有 XX + YY 耦合的量子位门方案，可以直接有效地实现任何两量子位门到单量子位门。首先，该方案能够高保真地执行量子运算，特别是当退相干是主要误差源时。其次，由于该方案跨越了整个 SU (4) 组双量子位门，我们可以使用它来获得算法实现的最佳双量子位门计数。这两个优势的协同作用催生了量子复杂精简指令集计算机（CRISC）。尽管门方案很紧凑，但它支持一系列全面的量子操作。这可能看起来很矛盾，但由于量子和经典计算机体系结构之间的根本差异，这是可以实现的。

使用我们的门方案，我们观察到各种应用的显着改进，包括通用 n 量子位门合成、量子体积和量子位路由。此外，所提出的方案还实现了与常用 CNOT 门局部等效的门，其门时间为 π/2 g ，其中 g 是两个量子位耦合。 AshN 方案也完全不受 ZZ 误差（横向耦合系统中的主要相干误差）的影响，因为可以轻松调整实现门的控制参数以考虑 ZZ 项。

papers.title: OnePerc: A Randomness-aware Compiler for Photonic Quantum Computing.
papers.abstract: The photonic platform holds great promise for quantum computing. Nevertheless, the intrinsic probabilistic characteristic of its native fusion operations introduces substantial randomness into the computing process, posing significant challenges to achieving scalability and efficiency in program execution. In this paper, we introduce a randomness-aware compilation framework designed to concurrently achieve scalability and efficiency. Our approach leverages an innovative combination of offline and online optimization passes, with a novel intermediate representation serving as a crucial bridge between them. Through a comprehensive evaluation, we demonstrate that this framework significantly outperforms the most efficient baseline compiler in a scalable manner, opening up new possibilities for realizing scalable photonic quantum computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 光子平台为量子计算带来了巨大的前景。然而，其本机融合操作的固有概率特征在计算过程中引入了很大的随机性，对实现程序执行的可扩展性和效率提出了重大挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种随机感知编译框架，旨在同时实现可扩展性和效率。我们的方法利用离线和在线优化过程的创新组合，并以新颖的中间表示作为它们之间的重要桥梁。通过全面的评估，我们证明该框架以可扩展的方式显着优于最高效的基线编译器，为实现可扩展的光子量子计算开辟了新的可能性。

papers.title: Optimal Kernel Orchestration for Tensor Programs with Korch.
papers.abstract:
Kernel orchestration is the task of mapping the computation defined in different operators of a deep neural network (DNN) to the execution of GPU kernels on modern hardware platforms. Prior approaches optimize kernel orchestration by greedily applying operator fusion , which fuses the computation of multiple operators into a single kernel, and miss a variety of optimization opportunities in kernel orchestration.

This paper presents Korch, a tensor program optimizer that discovers optimal kernel orchestration strategies for tensor programs. Instead of directly fusing operators, Korch first applies operator fission to decompose tensor operators into a small set of basic tensor algebra primitives. This decomposition enables a diversity of fine-grained, inter-operator optimizations. Next, Korch optimizes kernel orchestration by formalizing it as a constrained optimization problem, leveraging an off-the-shelf binary linear programming solver to discover an optimal orchestration strategy, and generating an executable that can be directly deployed on modern GPU platforms. Evaluation on a variety of DNNs shows that Korch outperforms existing tensor program optimizers by up to 1.7× on V100 GPUs and up to 1.6× on A100 GPUs. Korch is publicly available at https://github.com/humuyan/Korch.
papers.abstract_zh:
内核编排是将深度神经网络 (DNN) 的不同运算符中定义的计算映射到现代硬件平台上 GPU 内核的执行的任务。先前的方法通过贪婪地应用算子融合来优化内核编排，它将多个算子的计算融合到单个内核中，并且错过了内核编排中的各种优化机会。

本文介绍了 Korch，一种张量程序优化器，可以发现张量程序的最佳内核编排策略。 Korch 没有直接融合算子，而是首先应用算子裂变将张量算子分解为一小组基本张量代数原语。这种分解可以实现多种细粒度、操作员间的优化。接下来，Korch 通过将其形式化为约束优化问题来优化内核编排，利用现成的二进制线性规划求解器来发现最佳编排策略，并生成可直接部署在现代 GPU 平台上的可执行文件。对各种 DNN 的评估表明，Korch 在 V100 GPU 上的性能比现有张量程序优化器高出 1.7 倍，在 A100 GPU 上的性能高出 1.6 倍。 Korch 可在 https://github.com/humuyan/Korch 上公开获取。

papers.title: Optimizing Deep Learning Inference via Global Analysis and Tensor Expressions.
papers.abstract: Optimizing deep neural network (DNN) execution is important but becomes increasingly difficult as DNN complexity grows. Existing DNN compilers cannot effectively exploit optimization opportunities across operator boundaries, leaving room for improvement. To address this challenge, we present Souffle, an open-source compiler that optimizes DNN inference across operator boundaries. Souffle creates a global tensor dependency graph using tensor expressions, traces data flow and tensor information, and partitions the computation graph into subprograms based on dataflow analysis and resource constraints. Within a subprogram, Souffle performs local optimization via semantic-preserving transformations, finds an optimized program schedule, and improves instruction-level parallelism and data reuse. We evaluated Souffle using six representative DNN models on an NVIDIA A100 GPU. Experimental results show that Souffle consistently outperforms six state-of-the-art DNN optimizers by delivering a geometric mean speedup of up to 3.7× over TensorRT and 7.8× over Tensorflow XLA.
papers.abstract_zh: 优化深度神经网络 (DNN) 执行很重要，但随着 DNN 复杂性的增加而变得越来越困难。现有的 DNN 编译器无法有效地利用跨算子边界的优化机会，因此还有改进的空间。为了应对这一挑战，我们推出了 Souffle，这是一个开源编译器，可以优化跨算子边界的 DNN 推理。 Souffle 使用张量表达式创建全局张量依赖图，跟踪数据流和张量信息，并根据数据流分析和资源约束将计算图划分为子程序。在子程序中，Souffle 通过语义保留转换执行局部优化，找到优化的程序调度，并提高指令级并行性和数据重用。我们在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上使用六个代表性 DNN 模型对 Souffle 进行了评估。实验结果表明，Souffle 的几何平均加速比 TensorRT 高达 3.7 倍，比 Tensorflow XLA 高达 7.8 倍，始终优于六种最先进的 DNN 优化器。

papers.title: Optimizing Dynamic-Shape Neural Networks on Accelerators via On-the-Fly Micro-Kernel Polymerization.
papers.abstract: In recent times, dynamic-shape neural networks have gained widespread usage in intelligent applications to address complex tasks, introducing challenges in optimizing tensor programs due to their dynamic nature. As the operators' shapes are determined at runtime in dynamic scenarios, the compilation process becomes expensive, limiting the practicality of existing static-shape tensor compilers. To address the need for effective and efficient optimization of dynamic-shape neural networks, this paper introduces MikPoly, a novel dynamic-shape tensor compiler based on micro-kernel polymerization. MikPoly employs a two-stage optimization approach, dynamically combining multiple statically generated micro-kernels using a lightweight cost model based on the shape of a tensor operator known at runtime. We evaluate the effectiveness of MikPoly by employing popular dynamic-shape operators and neural networks on two representative accelerators, namely GPU Tensor Cores and Ascend NPUs. Our experimental results demonstrate that MikPoly effectively optimizes dynamic-shape workloads, yielding an average performance improvement of 1.49× over state-of-the-art vendor libraries.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，动态形状神经网络在智能应用中广泛用于解决复杂任务，由于其动态特性，给优化张量程序带来了挑战。由于算子的形状是在动态场景中运行时确定的，因此编译过程变得昂贵，限制了现有静态形状张量编译器的实用性。为了满足动态形状神经网络有效且高效优化的需求，本文介绍了 MikPoly，一种基于微内核聚合的新型动态形状张量编译器。 MikPoly 采用两阶段优化方法，使用基于运行时已知的张量算子形状的轻量级成本模型动态组合多个静态生成的微内核。我们通过在两个代表性加速器（即 GPU Tensor Core 和 Ascend NPU）上采用流行的动态形状算子和神经网络来评估 MikPoly 的有效性。我们的实验结果表明，MikPoly 有效地优化了动态形状工作负载，与最先进的供应商库相比，平均性能提高了 1.49 倍。

papers.title: ORIANNA: An Accelerator Generation Framework for Optimization-based Robotic Applications.
papers.abstract:
Despite extensive efforts, existing approaches to design accelerators for optimization-based robotic applications have limitations. Some approaches focus on accelerating general matrix operations, but they fail to fully exploit the specific sparse structure commonly found in many robotic algorithms. On the other hand, certain methods require manual design of dedicated accelerators, resulting in inefficiencies and significant non-recurring engineering (NRE) costs.

The Orianna framework represents a significant advancement as it overcomes the limitations of existing approaches and provides a solution to generate accelerators for robotic applications that integrate multiple optimization-based algorithms. The framework leverages a common abstraction factor graph to overcome these challenges. Application designers can easily define their objectives and constraints using the Orianna software framework. The Orianna compiler then translates the high-level code into basic matrix operations and executes them in an out-of-order manner on the generated accelerator. We demonstrate its effectiveness by implementing a real FPGA-based prototype. Orianna accelerators achieve a 6.5× performance improvement and a 15.1× energy reduction compared to an advanced Intel CPU. Furthermore, Orianna achieves comparable performance to state-of-the-art dedicated accelerators while utilizing only 36.1% of hardware resources.
papers.abstract_zh:
尽管付出了巨大的努力，但现有的基于优化的机器人应用设计加速器的方法仍然存在局限性。一些方法专注于加速一般矩阵运算，但它们未能充分利用许多机器人算法中常见的特定稀疏结构。另一方面，某些方法需要手动设计专用加速器，从而导致效率低下和显着的一次性工程（NRE）成本。

Orianna 框架代表了一项重大进步，因为它克服了现有方法的局限性，并提供了一种解决方案来为集成多种基于优化的算法的机器人应用程序生成加速器。该框架利用通用的抽象因子图来克服这些挑战。应用程序设计人员可以使用 Orianna 软件框架轻松定义他们的目标和约束。然后，Orianna 编译器将高级代码转换为基本矩阵运算，并在生成的加速器上以乱序方式执行它们。我们通过实现基于 FPGA 的真实原型来证明其有效性。与先进的英特尔 CPU 相比，Orianna 加速器的性能提高了 6.5 倍，能耗降低了 15.1 倍。此外，Orianna 仅利用 36.1% 的硬件资源，即可实现与最先进的专用加速器相当的性能。

papers.title: Palantir: Hierarchical Similarity Detection for Post-Deduplication Delta Compression.
papers.abstract:
Deduplication compresses backup data by identifying and removing duplicate blocks. However, deduplication cannot detect when two blocks are very similar, which opens up opportunities for further data reduction using delta compression. Most existing works find similar blocks by characterizing each block by a set of features and matching similar blocks using coarse-grained super-features. If two blocks share a super-feature, delta compression only needs to store their delta for the new block.

Existing delta compression techniques constrain their super-features to find only matching blocks that are likely to be very similar. Palantir introduces hierarchical super-features with different sensitivities to block similarities to find more candidates of similar blocks and increase overall backup compression including deduplication by 7.3% over N-Transform and Odess and 26.5% over Finesse. The overhead of Palantir for storing additional super-features is overcome by exploiting temporal localities of backup streams, and the throughput penalty is within 7.7%. Palantir also introduces a false positive filter to discard matching blocks that are counterproductive for the overall data reduction.
papers.abstract_zh:
重复数据删除通过识别和删除重复块来压缩备份数据。然而，重复数据删除无法检测两个块何时非常相似，这为使用增量压缩进一步减少数据提供了机会。大多数现有工作通过一组特征来表征每个块并使用粗粒度超级特征来匹配相似块来找到相似块。如果两个块共享一个超级特征，则增量压缩只需要为新块存储它们的增量。

现有的增量压缩技术将其超级特征限制为仅查找可能非常相似的匹配块。 Palantir 引入了对块相似性具有不同敏感性的分层超级功能，以找到更多相似块的候选者，并提高整体备份压缩率，其中重复数据删除比 N-Transform 和 Odess 提高了 7.3%，比 Finesse 提高了 26.5%。 Palantir 存储额外超级功能的开销通过利用备份流的时间局部性来克服，吞吐量损失在 7.7% 以内。 Palantir 还引入了误报过滤器来丢弃对整体数据减少产生反作用的匹配块。

papers.title: Pathfinder: High-Resolution Control-Flow Attacks Exploiting the Conditional Branch Predictor.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces novel attack primitives that enable adversaries to leak (read) and manipulate (write) the path history register (PHR) and the prediction history tables (PHTs) of the conditional branch predictor in high-performance CPUs. These primitives enable two new classes of attacks: first, it can recover the entire control flow history of a victim program by exploiting read primitives, as demonstrated by a practical secret-image recovery based on capturing the entire control flow of libjpeg routines. Second, it can launch extremely high-resolution transient attacks by exploiting write primitives. We demonstrate this with a key recovery attack against AES based on extracting intermediate values.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了新颖的攻击原语，使攻击者能够泄漏（读取）和操纵（写入）高性能 CPU 中条件分支预测器的路径历史寄存器 (PHR) 和预测历史表 (PHT)。这些原语支持两类新的攻击：首先，它可以通过利用读取原语来恢复受害程序的整个控制流历史记录，如基于捕获 libjpeg 例程的整个控制流的实用秘密图像恢复所证明的那样。其次，它可以通过利用写原语发起极高分辨率的瞬态攻击。我们通过基于提取中间值的针对 AES 的密钥恢复攻击来证明这一点。

papers.title: PATHFINDER: Practical Real-Time Learning for Data Prefetching.
papers.abstract:
Data prefetching is vital in high-performance processors and a large body of research has introduced a number of different approaches for accurate prefetching: stride detection, address correlating prefetchers, delta pattern detection, irregular pattern detection, etc. Most recently, a few works have leveraged advances in machine learning and deep neural networks to design prefetchers. These neural-inspired prefetchers observe data access patterns and develop a trained model that can then make accurate predictions for future accesses. A significant impediment to the success of these prefetchers is their high implementation cost, for both inference and training. These models cannot be trained in real-time, i.e., they have to be trained beforehand with a large benchmark suite. This results in a large model (that increases the overhead for inference), and the model can only successfully predict patterns that are similar to patterns in the training set.

In this work, we explore the potential of using spiking neural networks to learn and predict data access patterns, and specifically address deltas. While prior work has leaned on the recent success of trained artificial neural networks, we hypothesize that spiking neural networks are a better fit for real-time data prefetching. Spiking neural networks rely on the STDP algorithm to learn while performing inference - it is a low-cost and local learning algorithm that can quickly observe and react to the current stream of accesses. It is therefore possible to achieve high accuracy on previously unseen access patterns with a relatively small spiking neural network. This paper makes the case that spiking neurons and STDP offer a complexity-effective approach to leverage machine learning for data prefetching. We show that the proposed Pathfinder prefetcher is competitive with other state-of-the-art prefetchers on a range of benchmarks. Pathfinder can be implemented at 0.5 W and an area footprint of only 0.23 mm 2 (12 nm technology). This work shows that neural-inspired prefetching can be both practical and capable of high performance, but more innovations in SNN/STDP prefetch algorithms are required to fully maximize their potential.
papers.abstract_zh:
数据预取在高性能处理器中至关重要，大量研究引入了许多不同的精确预取方法：跨步检测、地址相关预取器、增量模式检测、不规则模式检测等。最近，一些工作利用机器学习和深度神经网络的进步来设计预取器。这些受神经启发的预取器观察数据访问模式并开发经过训练的模型，然后可以对未来的访问做出准确的预测。这些预取器成功的一个重大障碍是它们的推理和训练实施成本很高。这些模型无法实时训练，即必须预先使用大型基准套件进行训练。这会导致模型变大（增加推理开销），并且模型只能成功预测与训练集中的模式相似的模式。

在这项工作中，我们探索使用尖峰神经网络来学习和预测数据访问模式的潜力，特别是解决增量问题。虽然之前的工作依赖于训练有素的人工神经网络最近的成功，但我们假设尖峰神经网络更适合实时数据预取。尖峰神经网络依靠 STDP 算法在执行推理的同时进行学习 - 它是一种低成本的本地学习算法，可以快速观察当前的访问流并做出反应。因此，可以使用相对较小的尖峰神经网络来实现以前未见过的访问模式的高精度。本文证明尖峰神经元和 STDP 提供了一种复杂有效的方法来利用机器学习进行数据预取。我们表明，所提出的 Pathfinder 预取器在一系列基准测试中与其他最先进的预取器相比具有竞争力。 Pathfinder 的功耗为 0.5 W，占地面积仅为 0.23 mm 2 （12 nm 技术）。这项工作表明，受神经启发的预取既实用又具有高性能，但需要在 SNN/STDP 预取算法方面进行更多创新，以充分发挥其潜力。

papers.title: PDIP: Priority Directed Instruction Prefetching.
papers.abstract:
Modern server workloads have large code footprints which are prone to front-end bottlenecks due to instruction cache capacity misses. Even with the aggressive fetch directed instruction prefetching (FDIP), implemented in modern processors, there are still significant front-end stalls due to I-Cache misses. A major portion of misses that occur on a BPU-predicted path are tolerated by FDIP without causing stalls. Prior work on instruction prefetching, however, has not been designed to work with FDIP processors. Their singular goal is reducing I-Cache misses, whereas FDIP processors are designed to tolerate them. Designing an instruction prefetcher that works in conjunction with FDIP requires identifying the fraction of cache misses that impact front-end performance (that are not fully hidden by FDIP), and only targeting them.

In this paper, we propose Priority Directed Instruction Prefetching (PDIP), a novel instruction prefetching technique that complements FDIP by issuing prefetches for only targets where FDIP struggles - along the resteer path of front-end stall-causing events. PDIP identifies these targets and associates them with a trigger for future prefetch. At a 43.5KB budget, PDIP achieves up to 5.1% IPC speedup on important workloads such as cassandra and a geomean IPC speedup of 3.2% across 16 benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh:
现代服务器工作负载具有大量代码占用空间，很容易由于指令缓存容量缺失而出现前端瓶颈。即使在现代处理器中实现了积极的提取定向指令预取 (FDIP)，由于 I-Cache 未命中，仍然存在严重的前端停顿。 FDIP 可以容忍 BPU 预测路径上发生的大部分未命中，而不会导致停顿。然而，之前有关指令预取的工作并未设计用于 FDIP 处理器。他们的唯一目标是减少 I-Cache 未命中，而 FDIP 处理器的设计就是为了容忍这种情况。设计与 FDIP 结合使用的指令预取器需要识别影响前端性能（未完全被 FDIP 隐藏）的缓存未命中部分，并仅针对它们。

在本文中，我们提出了优先定向指令预取 (PDIP)，这是一种新颖的指令预取技术，它通过仅针对 FDIP 遇到困难的目标（沿着导致前端停顿事件的重新引导路径）发出预取来补充 FDIP。 PDIP 识别这些目标并将它们与未来预取的触发器关联起来。在 43.5KB 预算下，PDIP 在 cassandra 等重要工作负载上实现了高达 5.1% 的 IPC 加速，在 16 个基准测试中几何平均 IPC 加速达到了 3.2%。

papers.title: Pentimento: Data Remanence in Cloud FPGAs.
papers.abstract: Remote attackers can recover "FPGA pentimento" - long-removed data belonging to a prior user or proprietary design image on a cloud FPGA. Just as a pentimento of a painting can be exposed by infrared imaging, FPGA pentimentos can be exposed by signal timing sensors. The data constituting an FPGA pentimento is imprinted on the device through bias temperature instability effects on the underlying transistors. Measuring this degradation using a time-to-digital converter allows an attacker to (1) extract proprietary details or keys from an encrypted FPGA design image available on the AWS marketplace and (2) recover information from a previous user of a cloud-FPGA. These threat models are validated on AWS F1, with successful AES key recovery under one model.
papers.abstract_zh: 远程攻击者可以恢复“FPGA pentimento”——云 FPGA 上属于先前用户或专有设计映像的长期删除的数据。正如红外成像可以曝光绘画作品一样，信号时序传感器也可以曝光 FPGA 痕迹。构成 FPGA 元件的数据通过偏置温度不稳定性对底层晶体管的影响而被印在器件上。使用时间数字转换器测量这种退化，攻击者可以 (1) 从 AWS 市场上提供的加密 FPGA 设计映像中提取专有详细信息或密钥，以及 (2) 从云 FPGA 的先前用户那里恢复信息。这些威胁模型在 AWS F1 上进行了验证，并在一种模型下成功恢复了 AES 密钥。

papers.title: Performance-aware Scale Analysis with Reserve for Homomorphic Encryption.
papers.abstract:
Thanks to the computation ability on encrypted data and the efficient fixed-point execution, the RNS-CKKS fully homo-morphic encryption (FHE) scheme is a promising solution for privacy-preserving machine learning services. However, writing an efficient RNS-CKKS program is challenging due to its manual scale management requirement. Each cipher-text has a scale value with its maximum scale capacity. Since each RNS-CKKS multiplication increases the scale, programmers should properly rescale a ciphertext by reducing the scale and capacity together. Existing compilers reduce the programming burden by automatically analyzing and managing the scales of ciphertexts, but they either conservatively rescale ciphertexts and thus give up further optimization opportunities, or require time-consuming scale management space exploration.

This work proposes a new performance-aware static scale analysis for an RNS-CKKS program, which generates an efficient scale management plan without expensive space exploration. This work analyzes the scale budget, called "reserve", of each ciphertext in a backward manner from the end of a program and redistributes the budgets to the cipher-texts, thus enabling performance-aware scale management. This work also designs a new type system for the proposed scale analysis and ensures the correctness of the analysis result. This work achieves 41.8% performance improvement over EVA that uses conservative static scale analysis. It also shows similar performance improvement to exploration-based Hecate yet with 15526× faster scale management time.
papers.abstract_zh:
得益于加密数据的计算能力和高效的定点执行，RNS-CKKS 全同态加密（FHE）方案是隐私保护机器学习服务的一种有前景的解决方案。然而，由于其手动规模管理要求，编写高效的 RNS-CKKS 程序具有挑战性。每个密文都有一个尺度值及其最大尺度容量。由于每次 RNS-CKKS 乘法都会增加规模，因此程序员应通过同时减少规模和容量来正确重新调整密文的规模。现有的编译器通过自动分析和管理密文的规模来减轻编程负担，但它们要么保守地重新调整密文从而放弃进一步的优化机会，要么需要耗时的规模管理空间探索。

这项工作为 RNS-CKKS 程序提出了一种新的性能感知静态规模分析，它可以生成有效的规模管理计划，而无需昂贵的空间探索。这项工作从程序结束时以向后的方式分析每个密文的规模预算（称为“储备”），并将预算重新分配给密文，从而实现性能感知的规模管理。本工作还为所提出的尺度分析设计了一种新型系统，并确保了分析结果的正确性。与使用保守静态尺度分析的 EVA 相比，这项工作实现了 41.8% 的性能提升。它还显示出与基于探索的 Hecate 类似的性能改进，但规模管理时间快了 15526 倍。

papers.title: PIM-DL: Expanding the Applicability of Commodity DRAM-PIMs for Deep Learning via Algorithm-System Co-Optimization.
papers.abstract:
DRAM-based processing-in-memory (DRAM-PIM) has gained commercial prominence in recent years. However, their integration for deep learning acceleration poses inherent challenges. Existing DRAM-PIMs are limited in computational capabilities, primarily applicable for element-wise and GEMV operators. Unfortunately, these operators contribute only a small portion of the execution time in most DNN workloads. Current systems still necessitate powerful hosts to handle a significant portion of compute-heavy operators.

To expand the applicability of commodity DRAM-PIMs in accelerating deep learning, we introduce a novel PIM-DL framework. The philosophy behind PIM-DL is to replace the compute-heavy GEMM operations in linear layers with Lookup-Tables (LUTs). Such LUT-based neural networks (LUT-NNs) substantially reduce multiplications in DNN inference, rendering them suitable for efficient execution on DRAM-PIMs. To accurately convert DNNs into LUT-NNs and achieve optimal inference serving performance, we first introduce an enhanced LUT-NN (eLUT-NN) algorithm for model calibration, then we propose an Auto-Tuner capable of optimizing the mapping parameters on diverse DRAM-PIM platforms. We evaluate PIM-DL on off-the-shelf UPMEM PIM-DIMM products and simulated HBM-PIM/AiM platforms across multiple contemporary DNN workloads. Compared with GEMM-based inference on DRAM-PIMs, PIM-DL achieves 22.6×~37.1× speedup. Compared with CPU/GPU-based inference, PIM-DL achieves up to 3.54×/1.20× speedup.
papers.abstract_zh:
近年来，基于 DRAM 的内存处理 (DRAM-PIM) 在商业上取得了显着的成绩。然而，它们对于深度学习加速的集成带来了固有的挑战。现有的 DRAM-PIM 计算能力有限，主要适用于 element-wise 和 GEMV 运算符。不幸的是，在大多数 DNN 工作负载中，这些运算符仅贡献一小部分执行时间。当前的系统仍然需要强大的主机来处理大部分计算量大的操作员。

为了扩展商用 DRAM-PIM 在加速深度学习方面的适用性，我们引入了一种新颖的 PIM-DL 框架。 PIM-DL 背后的理念是用查找表 (LUT) 取代线性层中计算量大的 GEMM 操作。这种基于 LUT 的神经网络 (LUT-NN) 大大减少了 DNN 推理中的乘法，使它们适合在 DRAM-PIM 上高效执行。为了准确地将 DNN 转换为 LUT-NN 并实现最佳的推理服务性能，我们首先引入了用于模型校准的增强型 LUT-NN (eLUT-NN) 算法，然后提出了一种能够优化各种 DRAM-PIM 平台上的映射参数的自动调谐器。我们在现成的 UPMEM PIM-DIMM 产品和跨多个当代 DNN 工作负载的模拟 HBM-PIM/AiM 平台上评估 PIM-DL。与 DRAM-PIM 上基于 GEMM 的推理相比，PIM-DL 实现了 22.6×~37.1× 的加速。与基于CPU/GPU的推理相比，PIM-DL实现了高达3.54×/1.20×的加速。

papers.title: PIM-STM: Software Transactional Memory for Processing-In-Memory Systems.
papers.abstract:
Processing-In-Memory (PIM) is a novel approach that augments existing DRAM memory chips with lightweight logic. By allowing to offload computations to the PIM system, this architecture allows for circumventing the data-bottleneck problem that affects many modern workloads.

This work tackles the problem of how to build efficient software implementations of the Transactional Memory (TM) abstraction by introducing PIM-STM, a library that provides a range of diverse TM implementations for UPMEM, the first commercial PIM system. Via an extensive study we assess the efficiency of alternative choices in the design space of TM algorithms on this emerging architecture. We further quantify the impact of using different memory tiers of the UPMEM system (having different trade-offs for what concerns latency vs capacity) to store the metadata used by different TM implementations. Finally, we assess the gains achievable in terms of performance and memory efficiency when using PIM-STM to accelerate TM applications originally conceived for conventional CPU-based systems.
papers.abstract_zh:
内存处理 (PIM) 是一种新颖的方法，通过轻量级逻辑增强现有 DRAM 内存芯片。通过允许将计算卸载到 PIM 系统，该架构可以规避影响许多现代工作负载的数据瓶颈问题。

这项工作通过引入 PIM-STM 解决了如何构建事务内存 (TM) 抽象的高效软件实现的问题，PIM-STM 是一个为 UPMEM（第一个商业 PIM 系统）提供一系列不同 TM 实现的库。通过广泛的研究，我们评估了这种新兴架构上 TM 算法设计空间中替代选择的效率。我们进一步量化了使用 UPMEM 系统的不同内存层（在延迟与容量方面有不同的权衡）来存储不同 TM 实现所使用的元数据的影响。最后，我们评估了使用 PIM-STM 加速最初为基于传统 CPU 的系统设计的 TM 应用程序时在性能和内存效率方面可实现的收益。

papers.title: Plankton: Reconciling Binary Code and Debug Information.
papers.abstract: Static analysis has been widely used in large-scale software defect detection. Despite recent advances, it is still not practical enough because it requires compilation interference to obtain analyzable code. Directly translating the binary code using a binary lifter mitigates this practicality problem by being non-intrusive to the building system. However, existing binary lifters cannot produce precise enough code for rigorous static analysis even in the presence of the debug information. In this paper, we propose a new binary lifter Plankton together with two new algorithms that can fill the gaps between the low- and high-level code to produce high-quality LLVM intermediate representations (IRs) from binaries with debug information, enabling full-fledged static analysis with minor precision loss. Plankton shows comparable static analysis results with traditional compilation interference solutions, producing only 17.2% differences while being much more practical, outperforming existing lifters by 76.9% on average.
papers.abstract_zh: 静态分析已广泛应用于大型软件缺陷检测。尽管最近取得了进展，但它仍然不够实用，因为它需要编译干扰才能获得可分析的代码。使用二进制提升器直接翻译二进制代码可以通过不侵入建筑系统来缓解这种实用性问题。然而，即使存在调试信息，现有的二进制提升器也无法生成足够精确的代码来进行严格的静态分析。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的二进制提升器 Plankton 以及两种新算法，可以填补低级和高级代码之间的空白，从带有调试信息的二进制文件生成高质量的 LLVM 中间表示（IR），从而实现全面的静态分析，而精度损失较小。 Plankton 展示了与传统编译干扰解决方案相当的静态分析结果，仅产生 17.2% 的差异，同时更加实用，平均优于现有升降机 76.9%。

papers.title: PrimePar: Efficient Spatial-temporal Tensor Partitioning for Large Transformer Model Training.
papers.abstract: With the rapid up-scaling of transformer-based large language models (LLM), training these models is becoming increasingly demanding on novel parallel training techniques. Tensor partitioning is an extensively researched parallel technique, encompassing data and model parallelism, and has a significant influence on LLM training performance. However, existing state-of-the-art parallel training systems are based on incomplete tensor partitioning space, where the distribution of partitioned sub-operators is limited to the spatial dimension. We discover that introducing the temporal dimension into tensor partitioning of LLM training instance provides extra opportunities to avoid collective communication across devices, saving memory space and also overlapping device-to-device communication with computation. In this paper, we propose a new tensor partition primitive that distributes sub-operators along both the spatial and temporal dimensions to further explore communication and memory overhead reduction over current solutions. This new primitive creates a broader parallelization space and leads to parallel solutions that achieve better training throughput with lower peak memory occupancy compared to state-of-the-art techniques. To efficiently deploy optimized parallel transformer model training to multiple devices, we further present an optimization algorithm that can find optimal parallel solutions from our spatial-temporal tensor partition space with acceptable search time. Our evaluation shows that our optimized tensor partitioning achieves up to 1.68 × training throughput with 69% peak memory occupancy compared to state-of-the-art distributed training systems when training LLMs. Upon scaling to 32 GPUs, the geo-mean speedup across benchmarks is 1.30 ×. When applied in 3D parallelism, up to 1.46 × training throughput can be achieved.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着基于 Transformer 的大语言模型 (LLM) 的快速扩展，训练这些模型对新型并行训练技术的要求越来越高。张量划分是一种被广泛研究的并行技术，涵盖数据和模型并行性，对 LLM 训练性能有重大影响。然而，现有最先进的并行训练系统基于不完整的张量划分空间，其中划分的子算子的分布仅限于空间维度。我们发现，将时间维度引入 LLM 训练实例的张量划分中，可以提供额外的机会来避免跨设备的集体通信，节省内存空间，并将设备间通信与计算重叠。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的张量划分原语，它沿空间和时间维度分布子算子，以进一步探索当前解决方案的通信和内存开销减少。与最先进的技术相比，这种新原语创建了更广泛的并行化空间，并导致并行解决方案以更低的峰值内存占用实现更好的训练吞吐量。为了有效地将优化的并行变压器模型训练部署到多个设备，我们进一步提出了一种优化算法，该算法可以以可接受的搜索时间从时空张量分区空间中找到最佳并行解决方案。我们的评估表明，在训练 LLM 时，与最先进的分布式训练系统相比，我们优化的张量分区实现了高达 1.68 倍的训练吞吐量，峰值内存占用率为 69%。扩展到 32 个 GPU 后，基准测试的几何平均加速率为 1.30 倍。当应用于3D并行时，可以实现高达1.46倍的训练吞吐量。

papers.title: Proactive Runtime Detection of Aging-Related Silent Data Corruptions: A Bottom-Up Approach.
papers.abstract:
Recent advancements in semiconductor process technologies have unveiled the susceptibility of hardware circuits to reliability issues, especially those related to transistor aging. Transistor aging gradually degrades gate performance, eventually causing hardware to behave incorrectly. Such misbehaving hardware can result in silent data corruptions (SDCs) in software---a type of failure that comes without logs or exceptions, but causes miscomputing instructions, bitflips, and broken cache coherency. Alas, while design efforts can be made to mitigate transistor aging, complete elimination of this problem during design and fabrication cannot be guaranteed. This emerging challenge calls for a mechanism that not only detects potentially aged hardware in the field, but also triggers software mitigations at application runtime.

We propose Vega, a novel workflow that allows efficient detection of aging-related failures at software runtime. Vega leverages the well-studied gate-level modeling of aging effects to identify susceptible signal propagation paths that could fail due to transistor aging. It then utilizes formal verification techniques to generate short test cases that activate these paths and detect any failure within them. Vega integrates the test cases into a user application by directly fusing them together, or by packaging the test cases into a library that the application can invoke. We demonstrate our proposed techniques on the arithmetic logic unit and floating-point unit of a RISC-V CPU. We show that Vega generates effective test cases and integrates them into applications with an average of 0.8% performance overhead.
papers.abstract_zh:
半导体工艺技术的最新进展揭示了硬件电路对可靠性问题的敏感性，尤其是与晶体管老化相关的问题。晶体管老化会逐渐降低栅极性能，最终导致硬件行为不正确。这种行为不当的硬件可能会导致软件中的静默数据损坏 (SDC)，这是一种没有日志或异常的故障，但会导致指令计算错误、位翻转和缓存一致性破坏。遗憾的是，虽然可以做出设计努力来减轻晶体管老化，但不能保证在设计和制造过程中完全消除这个问题。这一新兴挑战需要一种机制，不仅可以检测现场可能老化的硬件，还可以在应用程序运行时触发软件缓解措施。

我们提出了 Vega，一种新颖的工作流程，可以在软件运行时有效检测与老化相关的故障。 Vega 利用经过充分研究的老化效应门级建模来识别可能因晶体管老化而失效的易受影响的信号传播路径。然后，它利用形式验证技术生成简短的测试用例，激活这些路径并检测其中的任何故障。 Vega 通过直接将测试用例融合在一起，或者将测试用例打包到应用程序可以调用的库中，将测试用例集成到用户应用程序中。我们在 RISC-V CPU 的算术逻辑单元和浮点单元上展示了我们提出的技术。我们表明，Vega 生成有效的测试用例并将其集成到应用程序中，平均性能开销为 0.8%。

papers.title: Promatch: Extending the Reach of Real-Time Quantum Error Correction with Adaptive Predecoding.
papers.abstract:
Fault-tolerant quantum computing relies on Quantum Error Correction (QEC) , which encodes logical qubits into data and parity qubits. Error decoding is the process of translating the measured parity bits into types and locations of errors. To prevent a backlog of errors, error decoding must be performed in real-time (i.e., within 1 μs on superconducting machines). Minimum Weight Perfect Matching (MWPM) is an accurate decoding algorithm for surface code, and recent research has demonstrated real-time implementations of MWPM (RT-MWPM) for a distance of up to 9. Unfortunately, beyond d=9, the number of flipped parity bits in the syndrome, referred to as the Hamming weight of the syndrome, exceeds the capabilities of existing RT-MWPM decoders. In this work, our goal is to enable larger distance RT-MWPM decoders by using adaptive predecoding that converts high Hamming weight syndromes into low Hamming weight syndromes, which are accurately decoded by the RT-MWPM decoder.

An effective predecoder must balance both accuracy (as any erroneous decoding by the predecoder contributes to the overall Logical Error Rate, termed as LER) and coverage (as the predecoder must ensure that the hamming weight of the syndrome is within the capability of the final decoder). In this paper, we propose Promatch, a real-time adaptive predecoder that predecodes both simple and complex patterns using a locality-aware, greedy approach. Our approach ensures two crucial factors: 1) high accuracy in prematching flipped bits, ensuring that the decoding accuracy is not hampered by the predecoder, and 2) enough coverage adjusted based on the main decoder's capability given the time constraints. Promatch represents the first real-time decoding framework capable of decoding surface codes of distances 11 and 13, achieving an LER of 2.6 × 10 -14 for distance 13. Moreover, we demonstrate that running Promatch concurrently with the recently proposed Astrea-G achieves LER equivalent to MWPM LER, 3.4 × 10 -15 , for distance 13, representing the first real-time accurate decoder for up-to a distance of 13.
papers.abstract_zh:
容错量子计算依赖于量子纠错（QEC），它将逻辑量子位编码为数据和奇偶校验量子位。错误解码是将测量到的奇偶校验位转换为错误类型和位置的过程。为了防止错误积压，必须实时执行错误解码（即在超导机器上在 1 μs 内）。最小权重完美匹配 (MWPM) 是一种针对表面代码的精确解码算法，最近的研究证明了 MWPM (RT-MWPM) 的实时实现距离可达 9。不幸的是，超过 d=9，校正子中翻转奇偶校验位的数量（称为校正子的汉明权重）超出了现有 RT-MWPM 解码器的能力。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过使用自适应预解码来实现更远距离的 RT-MWPM 解码器，该预解码将高汉明权值综合症转换为低汉明权值综合症，并由 RT-MWPM 解码器准确解码。

有效的预解码器必须平衡准确性（因为预解码器的任何错误解码都会导致整体逻辑错误率，称为 LER）和覆盖范围（因为预解码器必须确保校正子的汉明权重在最终解码器的能力范围内）。在本文中，我们提出了 Promatch，一种实时自适应预解码器，它使用局部感知的贪婪方法对简单和复杂的模式进行预解码。我们的方法确保了两个关键因素：1）预匹配翻转位的高精度，确保解码精度不受预解码器的阻碍；2）在给定时间限制的情况下，根据主解码器的能力调整足够的覆盖范围。 Promatch 代表了第一个能够解码距离 11 和 13 的表面码的实时解码框架，实现了距离 13 的 2.6 × 10 -14 的 LER。此外，我们证明，与最近提出的 Astrea-G 同时运行 Promatch 可以实现与距离 13 的 MWPM LER 3.4 × 10 -15 等效的 LER，代表第一个距离可达 13 的实时精确解码器。

papers.title: Proteus: A High-Throughput Inference-Serving System with Accuracy Scaling.
papers.abstract: Existing machine learning inference-serving systems largely rely on hardware scaling by adding more devices or using more powerful accelerators to handle increasing query demands. However, hardware scaling might not be feasible for fixed-size edge clusters or private clouds due to their limited hardware resources. A viable alternate solution is accuracy scaling, which adapts the accuracy of ML models instead of hardware resources to handle varying query demands. This work studies the design of a high-throughput inference-serving system with accuracy scaling that can meet throughput requirements while maximizing accuracy. To achieve the goal, this work proposes to identify the right amount of accuracy scaling by jointly optimizing three sub-problems: how to select model variants, how to place them on heterogeneous devices, and how to assign query workloads to each device. It also proposes a new adaptive batching algorithm to handle variations in query arrival times and minimize SLO violations. Based on the proposed techniques, we build an inference-serving system called Proteus and empirically evaluate it on real-world and synthetic traces. We show that Proteus reduces accuracy drop by up to 3× and latency timeouts by 2--10× with respect to baseline schemes, while meeting throughput requirements.
papers.abstract_zh: 现有的机器学习推理服务系统在很大程度上依赖于硬件扩展，通过添加更多设备或使用更强大的加速器来处理不断增长的查询需求。然而，由于硬件资源有限，硬件扩展对于固定大小的边缘集群或私有云可能不可行。一个可行的替代解决方案是精度扩展，它调整 ML 模型的精度而不是硬件资源来处理不同的查询需求。这项工作研究了具有精度扩展的高吞吐量推理服务系统的设计，该系统可以满足吞吐量要求，同时最大限度地提高精度。为了实现这一目标，这项工作建议通过联合优化三个子问题来确定适当的精度缩放量：如何选择模型变体、如何将它们放置在异构设备上以及如何将查询工作负载分配给每个设备。它还提出了一种新的自适应批处理算法来处理查询到达时间的变化并最大限度地减少 SLO 违规。基于所提出的技术，我们构建了一个名为 Proteus 的推理服务系统，并根据现实世界和合成痕迹对其进行实证评估。我们表明，相对于基线方案，Proteus 可以将准确率下降多达 3 倍，并将延迟超时降低 2--10 倍，同时满足吞吐量要求。

papers.title: ProxiML: Building Machine Learning Classifiers for Photonic Quantum Computing.
papers.abstract: Quantum machine learning has shown early promise and potential for productivity improvements for machine learning classification tasks, but has not been systematically explored on photonics quantum computing platforms. Therefore, this paper presents the design and implementation of ProxiML - a novel quantum machine learning classifier for photonic quantum computing devices with multiple noise-aware design elements for effective model training and inference. Our extensive evaluation on a photonic device (Xanadu's X8 machine) demonstrates the effectiveness of ProxiML machine learning classifier (over 90% accuracy on a real machine for challenging four-class classification tasks), and competitive classification accuracy compared to prior reported machine learning classifier accuracy on other quantum platforms - revealing the previously unexplored potential of Xanadu's X8 machine.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子机器学习已经显示出提高机器学习分类任务生产力的早期前景和潜力，但尚未在光子量子计算平台上进行系统探索。因此，本文提出了 ProxiML 的设计和实现——一种用于光子量子计算设备的新型量子机器学习分类器，具有多个噪声感知设计元素，用于有效的模型训练和推理。我们对光子设备（Xanadu 的 X8 机器）进行的广泛评估证明了 ProxiML 机器学习分类器的有效性（在具有挑战性的四类分类任务的真机上超过 90% 的准确度），以及与之前报告的其他量子平台上的机器学习分类器准确度相比具有竞争力的分类准确度 - 揭示了 Xanadu 的 X8 机器之前未开发的潜力。

papers.title: Pythia: Compiler-Guided Defense Against Non-Control Data Attacks.
papers.abstract:
Modern C/C++ applications are susceptible to Non-Control Data Attacks , where an adversary attempts to exploit memory corruption vulnerabilities for security breaches such as privilege escalation, control-flow manipulation, etc. One such popular class of non-control data attacks is Control-flow Bending , where the attacker manipulates the program data to flip branch outcomes, and divert the program control flow into alternative paths to gain privileges. Unfortunately, despite tremendous advancements in software security, state-of-art defense mechanisms such as Control-flow Integrity (CFI), are ineffective against control-flow bending attacks especially those involving flipping of branch predicates.
